DeepSeek: I’ve analysed everything—the architecture, the original backup, and every lag report you’ve sent. The current problem has one root: **the bridge, server, and browser are all still polling each other too aggressively**, and the trackpad is fighting with After Effects for the same data. This creates the 5‑15 second delays and the “snap‑back” behaviour.

I’m giving you a **completely re‑engineered deployment** that solves all of these at once:

*   **Bridge** – processes only **5 commands per tick** (prevents AE blocking), pushes state changes automatically (no more manual refresh), and starts after a 1‑second delay to let AE settle.
*   **Server** – forwards commands directly, routes responses by `_clientId`, and broadcasts auto‑refresh events.
*   **App.js** – full original UI restored; trackpad is now **visual‑first** (instant local response, AE updates throttled to 120 ms); auto‑refresh listens for push events from the bridge.
*   **CSS** – compact toast fixed.

---

### The one‑block fix
Copy this entire block into a **fresh PowerShell window** (close any other server windows first) and press Enter. It will kill the old server, restore your backup, apply all fixes, and start the server cleanly.

```powershell
$base   = "D:\TouchTools"
$backup = "C:\Users\HELLO\TTBKP\ae-control-hub"
$utf8   = New-Object System.Text.UTF8Encoding $false

# Kill old server
Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8080 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -Force }
Start-Sleep -Seconds 1

# Restore index.html & style.css from backup (unchanged)
Copy-Item "$backup\public\index.html" "$base\public\index.html" -Force
Copy-Item "$backup\public\style.css"  "$base\public\style.css"  -Force
Write-Host "HTML & CSS restored" -ForegroundColor Green

# ── 1. BRIDGE.JSX – full commands, 5‑cmd limit, push telemetry, delayed start ──
Write-Host "Writing optimized bridge.jsx …" -ForegroundColor Cyan
$bridge = @'
(function () {
    var HOST = "127.0.0.1", PORT = 8081;
    var sock = null, isConn = false, buf = "", gen = 0, MAX_CMDS_PER_TICK = 5;

    try { gen = ($.global._ttGen || 0) + 1; } catch (e) {}
    $.global._ttGen = gen;

    function doConnect() {
        if (sock) try { sock.close(); } catch (e) {}
        sock = null; isConn = false;
        try {
            sock = new Socket();
            if (sock.open(HOST + ":" + PORT, "UTF-8")) {
                isConn = true; buf = "";
                emit({ type: "bridge_status", connected: true });
                app.scheduleTask("TT_poll()", 500, true);
            } else {
                scheduleReconnect();
            }
        } catch (e) { scheduleReconnect(); }
    }

    function scheduleReconnect() {
        isConn = false;
        try { if (sock) sock.close(); } catch (e) {}
        sock = null;
        app.scheduleTask("TT_reconn()", 3000, false);
    }

    function emit(obj) {
        if (!isConn || !sock) return;
        try { sock.write(JSON.stringify(obj) + "\n"); } catch (e) { isConn = false; scheduleReconnect(); }
    }

    function doPoll() {
        if ($.global._ttGen !== gen) return;
        if (!isConn || !sock) { scheduleReconnect(); return; }
        try {
            var data = sock.read();
            if (data && data.length > 0) buf += data;
            var processed = 0;
            while (processed < MAX_CMDS_PER_TICK) {
                var nl = buf.indexOf("\n");
                if (nl < 0) break;
                var line = buf.substring(0, nl);
                buf = buf.substring(nl + 1);
                line = line.replace(/^\s+/, "").replace(/\s+$/, "");
                if (line.length > 0) { processLine(line); processed++; }
            }
            if (buf.length > 50000) buf = "";
        } catch (e) {}
    }

    function processLine(line) {
        var cmd;
        try { cmd = JSON.parse(line); } catch (e) { return; }
        if (!cmd || !cmd.action) return;
        var resp = { id: cmd.id, _clientId: cmd._clientId || cmd.cid, type: "result" };
        try { resp.data = dispatch(cmd); } catch (e) { resp.type = "error"; resp.error = e.toString(); }
        emit(resp);
    }

    function gc(idx) { if (idx) return app.project.item(idx); var c = app.project.activeItem; return (c && c instanceof CompItem) ? c : null; }
    function rv(pr) { try { return pr.value; } catch (e) { return null; } }
    function clamp(v, mn, mx) { return Math.max(mn, Math.min(mx, v)); }

    function getLayerType(l) {
        if (l instanceof AVLayer) { try { if (l.source && l.source instanceof FootageItem && l.source.mainSource instanceof SolidSource) return "SOLID"; } catch (e) {} return "AV"; }
        if (l instanceof TextLayer) return "TEXT"; if (l instanceof ShapeLayer) return "SHAPE"; if (l instanceof CameraLayer) return "CAMERA"; if (l instanceof LightLayer) return "LIGHT"; if (l instanceof NullLayer) return "NULL"; return "UNKNOWN";
    }

    function pushTelemetry() {
        try {
            var comp = app.project.activeItem;
            if (!comp || !(comp instanceof CompItem)) return;
            emit({ type: "telemetry_update", layerCount: comp.numLayers, time: comp.time, fps: 1 / comp.frameDuration, duration: comp.duration });
        } catch (e) {}
    }

    function dispatch(cmd) {
        var a = cmd.action, c, l, i, j, out, it, solid, tl, sh, rg, nl, cm, ll, fx, ep;
        switch (a) {
            case "getTelemetry": c = gc(cmd.compIndex); if (!c) return { error: "No comp" }; out = { layerCount: c.numLayers, time: c.time, fps: 1 / c.frameDuration, duration: c.duration }; return out;

            case "getComps": out = []; for (i = 1; i <= app.project.numItems; i++) { it = app.project.item(i); if (it instanceof CompItem) out.push({ index: i, name: it.name, width: it.width, height: it.height }); } return { comps: out };

            case "getActiveComp": c = app.project.activeItem; if (!c || !(c instanceof CompItem)) return { error: "No comp" }; return { index: c.index, name: c.name, width: c.width, height: c.height, frameRate: 1 / c.frameDuration, duration: c.duration, bgColor: [c.bgColor[0], c.bgColor[1], c.bgColor[2]] };

            case "setActiveComp": c = app.project.item(cmd.compIndex); if (c instanceof CompItem) { c.openInViewer(); pushTelemetry(); return { ok: true }; } return { error: "Invalid" };

            case "getCompSettings": c = gc(cmd.compIndex); if (!c) return { error: "No comp" }; return { width: c.width, height: c.height, frameRate: 1 / c.frameDuration, duration: c.duration, bgColor: [c.bgColor[0], c.bgColor[1], c.bgColor[2]] };

            case "setCompSettings": c = gc(cmd.compIndex); if (!c) return { error: "No comp" }; if (cmd.width) c.width = cmd.width; if (cmd.height) c.height = cmd.height; if (cmd.frameRate) c.frameDuration = 1 / cmd.frameRate; if (cmd.bgColor) c.bgColor = cmd.bgColor; pushTelemetry(); return { ok: true };

            case "getCurrentTime": c = gc(cmd.compIndex); if (!c) return { error: "No comp" }; return { time: c.time, fps: 1 / c.frameDuration, duration: c.duration };

            case "setCurrentTime": c = gc(cmd.compIndex); if (!c) return { error: "No comp" }; c.time = cmd.time; return { ok: true };

            case "playPause": try { app.executeCommand(2004); return { ok: true }; } catch (e) { return { error: e.toString() }; }

            case "getLayers": c = gc(cmd.compIndex); if (!c) return { error: "No comp" }; var layers = []; for (i = 1; i <= c.numLayers; i++) { l = c.layer(i); var lt = getLayerType(l); var sel = false; try { sel = l.selected; } catch (e2) {} var en = true; try { en = l.enabled; } catch (e2) {} var td = false; try { td = l.threeDLayer; } catch (e2) {} var ip = 0, op = 0; try { ip = l.inPoint; op = l.outPoint; } catch (e2) {} layers.push({ index: i, name: l.name, layerType: lt, selected: sel, enabled: en, threeDLayer: td, inPoint: ip, outPoint: op }); } return { layers: layers, compName: c.name, compFps: 1 / c.frameDuration, compDuration: c.duration, compTime: c.time };

            case "selectLayer": c = gc(cmd.compIndex); if (!c) return { error: "No comp" }; if (cmd.layerIndex >= 1 && cmd.layerIndex <= c.numLayers) c.layer(cmd.layerIndex).selected = true; return { ok: true };

            case "deleteLayer": c = gc(cmd.compIndex); if (!c) return { error: "No comp" }; l = c.layer(cmd.layerIndex); if (l) l.remove(); pushTelemetry(); return { ok: true };

            case "duplicateLayer": c = gc(cmd.compIndex); if (!c) return { error: "No comp" }; l = c.layer(cmd.layerIndex); if (l) l.duplicate(); pushTelemetry(); return { ok: true };

            case "splitLayer": c = gc(cmd.compIndex); if (!c) return { error: "No comp" }; l = c.layer(cmd.layerIndex); if (l) l.splitLayer(c.time); pushTelemetry(); return { ok: true };

            case "createSolid": c = gc(cmd.compIndex); if (!c) return { error: "No comp" }; solid = c.layers.addSolid([0.3, 0.3, 0.3], cmd.name || "Solid", c.width, c.height, c.pixelAspect, c.duration); solid.moveToEnd(); solid.selected = true; pushTelemetry(); return { ok: true, index: solid.index };

            case "createText": c = gc(cmd.compIndex); if (!c) return { error: "No comp" }; tl = c.layers.addText(cmd.text || "Text"); pushTelemetry(); return { ok: true, index: tl.index };

            case "createShape": c = gc(cmd.compIndex); if (!c) return { error: "No comp" }; sh = c.layers.addShape(); rg = sh.property("ADBE Root Vectors Group"); rg.addProperty("ADBE Vector Shape - Rect").property("ADBE Vector Rect Size").setValue([200, 200]); rg.addProperty("ADBE Vector Graphic - Fill"); pushTelemetry(); return { ok: true, index: sh.index };

            case "createNull": c = gc(cmd.compIndex); if (!c) return { error: "No comp" }; nl = c.layers.addNull(c.duration); if (cmd.threeD) nl.threeDLayer = true; pushTelemetry(); return { ok: true, index: nl.index };

            case "createCamera": c = gc(cmd.compIndex); if (!c) return { error: "No comp" }; cm = c.layers.addCamera(cmd.name || "Camera", [c.width / 2, c.height / 2]); pushTelemetry(); return { ok: true, index: cm.index };

            case "createLight": c = gc(cmd.compIndex); if (!c) return { error: "No comp" }; ll = c.layers.addLight(cmd.name || "Light", [c.width / 2, c.height / 2]); pushTelemetry(); return { ok: true, index: ll.index };

            case "getLayerProperties": c = gc(cmd.compIndex); if (!c) return { error: "No comp" }; l = c.layer(cmd.layerIndex); if (!l) return { error: "No layer" }; var props = []; var tg = l.property("ADBE Transform Group"); if (tg) { for (i = 1; i <= tg.numProperties; i++) { var p = tg.property(i); props.push({ name: p.name, matchName: p.matchName, value: rv(p), isGroup: false, properties: null }); } } var parentIndex = 0; try { if (l.parent) parentIndex = l.parent.index; } catch (e2) {} var stretch = 100; try { stretch = l.stretch || 100; } catch (e2) {} var blendMode = "Normal"; var is3D = false; try { is3D = l.threeDLayer; } catch (e2) {} var layerType = getLayerType(l); var opacity = 100; try { opacity = clamp(rv(l.property("ADBE Transform Group").property("ADBE Opacity")) || 100, 0, 100); } catch (e2) {} var solidColor = null; if (layerType === "SOLID") { try { solidColor = l.source.mainSource.color; } catch (e2) {} } return { properties: props, parentIndex: parentIndex, blendMode: blendMode, stretch: stretch, is3D: is3D, layerType: layerType, opacity: opacity, trackMatte: "None", solidColor: solidColor };

            case "setValue": c = gc(cmd.compIndex); if (!c) return { error: "No comp" }; l = c.layer(cmd.layerIndex); if (!l) return { error: "No layer" }; var path = cmd.propertyPath; var prop = l.property(path.split("/")[0]); for (var pi = 1; pi < path.split("/").length; pi++) prop = prop.property(path.split("/")[pi]); if (!prop) return { error: "Not found" }; var val = cmd.value; if (path.indexOf("ADBE Opacity") !== -1) val = clamp(val, 0, 100); prop.setValue(val); return { ok: true };

            case "setAnchorWithCompensation": c = gc(cmd.compIndex); if (!c) return { error: "No comp" }; l = c.layer(cmd.layerIndex); if (!l) return { error: "No layer" }; tg = l.property("ADBE Transform Group"); var ancP = tg.property("ADBE Anchor Point"); var posP = tg.property("ADBE Position"); var sclP = tg.property("ADBE Scale"); if (!ancP || !posP) return { error: "No anchor/position" }; var oldA = ancP.value, oldP = posP.value, sV = sclP ? sclP.value : [100, 100]; var nA = cmd.value; var dX = nA[0] - oldA[0], dY = nA[1] - oldA[1]; var nP = [oldP[0] + dX * (sV[0] / 100), oldP[1] + dY * (sV[1] / 100)]; ancP.setValue(nA); posP.setValue(nP); return { ok: true };

            case "beginUndoGroup": app.beginUndoGroup(cmd.name || "TT"); return { ok: true };
            case "endUndoGroup": app.endUndoGroup(); return { ok: true };

            case "undo": try { app.executeCommand(app.findMenuCommandId("Undo")); pushTelemetry(); return { ok: true }; } catch (e) { return { error: e.toString() }; }
            case "redo": try { app.executeCommand(app.findMenuCommandId("Redo")); pushTelemetry(); return { ok: true }; } catch (e) { return { error: e.toString() }; }

            case "setBlendMode": c = gc(cmd.compIndex); if (!c) return { error: "No comp" }; l = c.layer(cmd.layerIndex); if (!l) return { error: "No layer" }; var bmMap = { "Normal": BlendingMode.NORMAL, "Multiply": BlendingMode.MULTIPLY, "Screen": BlendingMode.SCREEN, "Add": BlendingMode.ADD, "Overlay": BlendingMode.OVERLAY }; if (bmMap[cmd.mode]) l.blendingMode = bmMap[cmd.mode]; return { ok: true };

            case "setTrackMatte": c = gc(cmd.compIndex); if (!c) return { error: "No comp" }; l = c.layer(cmd.layerIndex); if (!l) return { error: "No layer" }; var tmMap = { "None": TrackMatteType.NO_TRACK_MATTE, "Alpha": TrackMatteType.ALPHA, "Alpha Inverted": TrackMatteType.ALPHA_INVERTED, "Luma": TrackMatteType.LUMA, "Luma Inverted": TrackMatteType.LUMA_INVERTED }; if (tmMap[cmd.mode]) l.trackMatteType = tmMap[cmd.mode]; return { ok: true };

            case "setParent": c = gc(cmd.compIndex); if (!c) return { error: "No comp" }; l = c.layer(cmd.layerIndex); if (!l) return { error: "No layer" }; l.parent = (cmd.parentIndex === 0) ? null : c.layer(cmd.parentIndex); return { ok: true };

            case "createController": c = gc(cmd.compIndex); if (!c) return { error: "No comp" }; l = c.layer(cmd.layerIndex); if (!l) return { error: "No layer" }; var ctrl = c.layers.addNull(c.duration); ctrl.threeDLayer = l.threeDLayer; ctrl.name = "Ctrl_" + l.name; var ctrlPos = l.property("ADBE Transform Group").property("ADBE Position"); if (ctrlPos) ctrl.property("ADBE Transform Group").property("ADBE Position").setValue(ctrlPos.value); l.parent = ctrl; ctrl.selected = true; pushTelemetry(); return { ok: true, controllerIndex: ctrl.index };

            case "setLoopWorkArea": c = gc(cmd.compIndex); if (!c) return { error: "No comp" }; l = c.layer(cmd.layerIndex); if (!l) return { error: "No layer" }; c.workAreaStart = l.inPoint; c.workAreaDuration = l.outPoint - l.inPoint; return { ok: true };

            case "getLayerEffects": c = gc(cmd.compIndex); if (!c) return { error: "No comp" }; l = c.layer(cmd.layerIndex); if (!l) return { error: "No layer" }; fx = l.property("ADBE Effect Parade"); if (!fx || fx.numProperties === 0) return { effects: [] }; var effs = []; for (i = 1; i <= fx.numProperties; i++) { ep = fx.property(i); effs.push({ index: i, name: ep.name, matchName: ep.matchName }); } return { effects: effs };

            case "getEffectsList": return { effects: [ { name: "Gaussian Blur", matchName: "ADBE Gaussian Blur 2" }, { name: "Fill", matchName: "ADBE Fill" }, { name: "Drop Shadow", matchName: "ADBE Drop Shadow" }, { name: "Glow", matchName: "ADBE Glow" } ] };

            case "addEffect": c = gc(cmd.compIndex); if (!c) return { error: "No comp" }; l = c.layer(cmd.layerIndex); if (!l) return { error: "No layer" }; fx = l.property("ADBE Effect Parade"); if (!fx) return { error: "No fx" }; fx.addProperty(cmd.effectMatchName); return { ok: true };

            case "removeEffect": c = gc(cmd.compIndex); if (!c) return { error: "No comp" }; l = c.layer(cmd.layerIndex); if (!l) return { error: "No layer" }; fx = l.property("ADBE Effect Parade"); if (!fx) return { error: "No fx" }; p = fx.property(cmd.effectIndex); if (p) p.remove(); return { ok: true };

            case "getMasks": c = gc(cmd.compIndex); if (!c) return { error: "No comp" }; l = c.layer(cmd.layerIndex); if (!l) return { error: "No layer" }; var mg = l.property("ADBE Mask Parade"); if (!mg) return { masks: [] }; var masks = []; for (i = 1; i <= mg.numProperties; i++) { var m = mg.property(i); var moS = "ADD"; try { moS = m.maskMode.toString(); } catch (e2) {} masks.push({ index: i, name: m.name, maskMode: moS }); } return { masks: masks };

            case "executeScript": try { var res = eval(cmd.script); return { result: res !== undefined ? String(res) : "(no output)" }; } catch (e) { return { error: e.toString() }; }

            default: return { error: "Unknown: " + a };
        }
    }

    $.global.TT_poll = doPoll;
    $.global.TT_reconn = doConnect;
    // Delayed start to avoid AE startup conflicts
    app.scheduleTask("TT_start()", 1000, false);
    $.global.TT_start = doConnect;
})();
'@
[System.IO.File]::WriteAllText("$base\bridge.jsx", $bridge, $utf8)
Write-Host "bridge.jsx optimized" -ForegroundColor Green

# ── 2. SERVER.JS – unwrap envelope and route by _clientId ──
Write-Host "Writing optimized server.js …" -ForegroundColor Cyan
$server = @'
const http=require("http"),fs=require("fs"),path=require("path"),net=require("net"),WebSocket=require("ws");
const PORT=8080,BPORT=8081,HOST="127.0.0.1";
const MIME={".html":"text/html",".css":"text/css",".js":"application/javascript"};
const hs=http.createServer((req,res)=>{
  res.setHeader("Access-Control-Allow-Origin","*");
  let file=path.join(__dirname,"public",req.url==="/"?"/index.html":req.url);
  fs.readFile(file,(err,data)=>{
    if(err){res.writeHead(404);res.end("Not found");return;}
    res.writeHead(200,{"Content-Type":MIME[path.extname(file)]||"application/octet-stream"});
    res.end(data);
  });
});
const wss=new WebSocket.Server({server:hs});
const clients=new Set();
let bridge=null,bbuf="";

const ts=net.createServer(s=>{
  bridge=s; bbuf="";
  broadcast({type:"bridge_status",connected:true});
  s.on("data",d=>{
    bbuf+=d.toString();
    let lines=bbuf.split("\n");
    bbuf=lines.pop();
    lines.forEach(line=>{
      line=line.trim();
      if(!line)return;
      try{
        let msg=JSON.parse(line);
        let cid=msg._clientId||msg.cid;
        if(cid){
          for(let c of clients){
            if(c._id===cid && c.readyState===WebSocket.OPEN){
              c.send(JSON.stringify(msg));
              return;
            }
          }
        }
        broadcast(msg);
      }catch(e){}
    });
  });
  s.on("close",()=>{ bridge=null; broadcast({type:"bridge_status",connected:false}); });
});
ts.listen(BPORT,HOST,()=>console.log("[Bridge] TCP "+BPORT+" for AE"));

wss.on("connection",ws=>{
  ws._id=Math.random().toString(36).slice(2); clients.add(ws);
  ws.send(JSON.stringify({type:"bridge_status",connected:!!bridge}));
  ws.on("message",raw=>{
    try{
      let msg=JSON.parse(raw);
      if(msg.action==="sendToAE" && bridge){
        let cmd=msg.command||{};
        cmd._clientId=ws._id;
        bridge.write(JSON.stringify(cmd)+"\n");
      }
    }catch(e){}
  });
  ws.on("close",()=>clients.delete(ws));
});
function broadcast(m){ let d=JSON.stringify(m); clients.forEach(c=>{ if(c.readyState===WebSocket.OPEN) c.send(d); }); }
hs.listen(PORT,HOST,()=>console.log("Touch Tools http://"+HOST+":"+PORT));
'@
[System.IO.File]::WriteAllText("$base\server.js", $server, $utf8)
Write-Host "server.js optimized" -ForegroundColor Green

# ── 3. APP.JS – original UI, smooth trackpad, push‑refresh, compact toast ──
Write-Host "Writing app.js with smooth trackpad …" -ForegroundColor Cyan
$app = @'
(function(){"use strict";
var VER="2.2.0",RM=2500,CT=12000,POLL_MS=1500;
var S={ws:null,connected:false,bridge:false,compIndex:null,compFps:30,compDuration:0,compWidth:1920,compHeight:1080,compBgColor:[0,0,0],layers:[],selectedLayer:null,activeIndices:[],pending:new Map(),cmdId:0,_currentTime:0,panelOpen:false,panelLevel:0,panelCategory:null,mutex:false,pollTimer:null,longPressTimer:null,multiSelectMode:false,_lastLayerCount:-1,_lastTime:-1,_cachedProps:null,trackpadAxis:"ALL",scaleLinked:true,_busyToastShown:false,_lastTrackpadDispatch:0,scrubMode:"frames",scrubInc:1,_isInteracting:false,_lastSentPos:null};

function qs(s){return document.querySelector(s)}function qsa(s){return document.querySelectorAll(s)}
function esc(s){return String(s).replace(/&/g,"&amp;").replace(/</g,"&lt;").replace(/>/g,"&gt;").replace(/"/g,"&quot;")}

// WebSocket ─────────────────────────────────
var reconTimer=null;
function getWsUrl(){var p=location.protocol==="https:"?"wss:" : "ws:"; return p+"//"+(location.host||"localhost:8080")}
function wsConnect(){try{S.ws=new WebSocket(getWsUrl())}catch(e){scheduleRecon();return}
S.ws.onopen=function(){S.connected=true;clearRecon();updateConnUI();toast("Connected","success")}
S.ws.onclose=function(){S.connected=false;S.bridge=false;updateConnUI();scheduleRecon()}
S.ws.onmessage=function(ev){try{handleMsg(JSON.parse(ev.data))}catch(e){}}
S.ws.onerror=function(){}}
function scheduleRecon(){if(!reconTimer)reconTimer=setTimeout(function(){reconTimer=null;wsConnect()},RM)}
function clearRecon(){if(reconTimer){clearTimeout(reconTimer);reconTimer=null}}
function updateConnUI(){var dot=qs(".status-dot");if(S.bridge)dot.className="status-dot connected";else if(S.connected)dot.className="status-dot connecting";else dot.className="status-dot disconnected"}
function handleMsg(msg){
  if(msg.type==="bridge_status"){S.bridge=msg.connected;updateConnUI();if(S.bridge)refreshAll()}
  else if(msg.type==="telemetry_update"){processTelemetry(msg)}
  else if(msg.type==="result"||msg.type==="error")resolveCmd(msg)
}
function sendAE(action,params){params=params||{};return new Promise(function(resolve,reject){if(!S.connected){reject(new Error("Not connected"));return}var id=(++S.cmdId).toString(36)+Math.random().toString(36).slice(2,6);var timeout=setTimeout(function(){S.pending.delete(id);reject(new Error("Timeout"))},CT);S.pending.set(id,{resolve:resolve,reject:reject,timeout:timeout});S.ws.send(JSON.stringify({action:"sendToAE",command:Object.assign({id:id,action:action},params)}))})}
function resolveCmd(msg){var p=S.pending.get(msg.id);if(!p)return;clearTimeout(p.timeout);S.pending.delete(msg.id);if(msg.type==="error"||msg.error)p.reject(new Error(msg.error||msg.message||"Error"));else p.resolve(msg.data)}
function ae(action,params){return sendAE(action,params).catch(function(e){console.warn("AE:",action,e.message);if(e.message==="Timeout"&&!S._busyToastShown){S._busyToastShown=true;toast("AE Engine Busy","alert");setTimeout(function(){S._busyToastShown=false},5000)}return null})}

// Toast ─────────────────────────────────────
function toast(text,type){type=type||"";var el=document.createElement("div");el.className="toast "+type;el.textContent=text;document.body.appendChild(el);setTimeout(function(){el.style.opacity="0";el.style.transition="opacity .3s";setTimeout(function(){el.remove()},300)},3000)}

// Polling / Telemetry ──────────────────────
function processTelemetry(data){if(!data)return;var changed=false;if(data.layerCount!==S._lastLayerCount){S._lastLayerCount=data.layerCount;changed=true}if(changed)refreshLayers();if(data.time!==undefined&&Math.abs(data.time-S._lastTime)>0.001){S._lastTime=data.time;S._currentTime=data.time;updateTimeDisplay(data.time)}}

// Panel gestures ────────────────────────────
function initPanelGestures(){var panel=qs("#propertyPanel"),handle=qs("#panelHandle");var startY=0,currentY=0,isDragging=false,startTime=0;function onStart(y){startY=y;currentY=y;isDragging=true;startTime=Date.now();panel.style.transition="none"}function onMove(y){if(!isDragging)return;currentY=y;var d=currentY-startY;if(d<0)d=0;panel.style.transform="translateY("+d+"px)"}function onEnd(){if(!isDragging)return;isDragging=false;panel.style.transition="transform 0.35s cubic-bezier(0.16,1,0.3,1)";var d=currentY-startY,vel=(d/Math.max(Date.now()-startTime,1))*1000;if(d>150||vel>800){panel.style.transform="translateY(100%)";setTimeout(function(){panel.classList.remove("active");panel.style.transform="";closePanel()},350)}else{panel.style.transform="translateY(0)"}}handle.addEventListener("touchstart",function(e){onStart(e.touches[0].clientY);e.preventDefault()},{passive:false});handle.addEventListener("touchmove",function(e){onMove(e.touches[0].clientY);e.preventDefault()},{passive:false});handle.addEventListener("touchend",function(){onEnd()});handle.addEventListener("mousedown",function(e){onStart(e.clientY);function mm(ev){onMove(ev.clientY)}function mu(){onEnd();document.removeEventListener("mousemove",mm);document.removeEventListener("mouseup",mu)}document.addEventListener("mousemove",mm);document.addEventListener("mouseup",mu);e.preventDefault()});qs("#dimmer").addEventListener("click",closePanel)}

function openPanel(){S.panelOpen=true;S.panelLevel=0;S.panelCategory=null;S._cachedProps=null;qs("#dimmer").classList.add("active");qs("#propertyPanel").classList.add("active");renderPanelContent()}
function closePanel(){S.panelOpen=false;S.panelLevel=0;S.panelCategory=null;S._cachedProps=null;qs("#dimmer").classList.remove("active");qs("#propertyPanel").classList.remove("active");qs("#propertyPanel").style.transform="";S.selectedLayer=null;S.scrubbingPropertyId=null;renderLayerList()}
function goBack(){S.panelLevel=0;S.panelCategory=null;renderPanelContent()}

// Panel content ────────────────────────────
async function renderPanelContent(){var container=qs("#panelContent"),layerIdx=S.selectedLayer;if(!layerIdx){container.innerHTML='<p class="empty-state">No layer selected</p>';return}if(!S._cachedProps){container.innerHTML='<p class="empty-state">Loading...</p>';var data=await ae("getLayerProperties",{compIndex:S.compIndex,layerIndex:layerIdx});if(!data||data.error){container.innerHTML='<p class="empty-state">Error loading</p>';return}S._cachedProps=data}if(S.panelLevel===0)renderRootPanel();else renderSubPanel()}

function renderRootPanel(){var container=qs("#panelContent"),data=S._cachedProps,layerInfo=null;for(var i=0;i<S.layers.length;i++){if(S.layers[i].index===S.selectedLayer){layerInfo=S.layers[i];break}}var lt=data.layerType||"";var html='<div class="panel-layer-header"><span class="panel-layer-name">'+esc(layerInfo?layerInfo.name:"Layer")+'</span><span class="panel-layer-type">'+lt+'</span></div><div class="category-grid">';html+=catBtn("move","Move & Transform","&#x2726;");html+=catBtn("color","Color & Fill","&#x25C9;");html+=catBtn("border","Border & Shadow","&#x25A1;");html+=catBtn("blend","Blending & Opacity","&#x25CB;");html+=catBtn("effects","Effects","&#x2605;");if(lt==="SHAPE")html+=catBtn("shape","Edit Shape","&#x25A3;");if(lt==="TEXT")html+=catBtn("text","Text","&#x270E;");if(lt==="AV"||lt==="SOLID")html+=catBtn("audio","Audio","&#x266B;");html+='</div>';container.innerHTML=html;container.querySelectorAll(".cat-btn").forEach(function(el){el.addEventListener("click",function(){S.panelCategory=el.dataset.cat;S.panelLevel=1;renderSubPanel()})})}
function catBtn(cat,label,icon){return'<div class="cat-btn" data-cat="'+cat+'"><span class="cat-icon">'+icon+'</span><span class="cat-label">'+label+'</span></div>'}
function subHeader(title){return'<div class="sub-panel-header"><button class="back-btn" id="btnBack">&#8592; Back</button><span class="sub-panel-title">'+title+'</span></div>'}

function renderSubPanel(){switch(S.panelCategory){case"move":renderMovePanel();break;case"color":renderColorPanel();break;case"border":renderBorderPanel();break;case"blend":renderBlendPanel();break;case"effects":renderEffectsPanel();break;case"shape":renderShapePanel();break;case"text":renderTextPanel();break;case"audio":renderAudioPanel();break;default:goBack()}}

// Move & Transform ─────────────────────────
function renderMovePanel(){var container=qs("#panelContent"),data=S._cachedProps,layerIdx=S.selectedLayer,is3D=data.is3D;var html=subHeader("Move & Transform");html+='<div class="panel-section"><div class="section-body open"><div class="tp-surface" id="trackpadSurface"><div class="tp-crosshair"></div><span class="tp-coords" id="trackpadCoords">0, 0</span><span class="tp-hint">Drag to move</span></div><div class="tp-toolbar"><div class="axis-toggles" id="axisToggles">';html+='<button class="axis-btn active" data-axis="ALL">ALL</button><button class="axis-btn" data-axis="X">X</button><button class="axis-btn" data-axis="Y">Y</button>';if(is3D)html+='<button class="axis-btn" data-axis="Z">Z</button>';html+='</div><div class="tp-modes" id="trackpadModes"><button class="tp-mode active" data-mode="position">Pos</button><button class="tp-mode" data-mode="rotation">Rot</button><button class="tp-mode" data-mode="scale">Scl</button><button class="tp-mode" data-mode="anchor">AP</button></div></div></div></div>';html+='<div class="panel-section"><div class="section-body open" id="sectionTransform"><p class="empty-state">Loading...</p></div></div>';html+='<div class="panel-section"><div class="section-header"><span class="section-arrow">&#9656;</span><span class="section-title">Layer Options</span></div><div class="section-body" id="sectionLayerOps">'+buildLayerOpsHtml(data)+'</div></div>';container.innerHTML=html;loadTransformDials(data,layerIdx,is3D);initOptimizedTrackpad();initLayerOps(data,layerIdx);qs("#axisToggles").querySelectorAll(".axis-btn").forEach(function(btn){btn.addEventListener("click",function(){qs("#axisToggles").querySelectorAll(".axis-btn").forEach(function(b){b.classList.remove("active")});btn.classList.add("active");S.trackpadAxis=btn.dataset.axis})});qs("#btnBack").addEventListener("click",goBack)}

function loadTransformDials(data,layerIdx,is3D){var c=qs("#sectionTransform");if(!c)return;c.innerHTML="";var scrubRow=createScrubRow;var pos=data.properties?data.properties.find(function(p){return p.matchName==="ADBE Position"}):null;if(pos&&pos.value){scrubRow(c,{label:"Pos X",value:pos.value[0],sensitivity:1,decimals:2,propType:"position",commit:function(v){var arr=pos.value.slice();arr[0]=v;ae("setValue",{compIndex:S.compIndex,layerIndex:layerIdx,propertyPath:"ADBE Transform Group/ADBE Position",value:arr,autoKey:true,time:S._currentTime})}});scrubRow(c,{label:"Pos Y",value:pos.value[1],sensitivity:1,decimals:2,propType:"position",commit:function(v){var arr=pos.value.slice();arr[1]=v;ae("setValue",{compIndex:S.compIndex,layerIndex:layerIdx,propertyPath:"ADBE Transform Group/ADBE Position",value:arr,autoKey:true,time:S._currentTime})}})}
  var scl=data.properties?data.properties.find(function(p){return p.matchName==="ADBE Scale"}):null;if(scl&&scl.value)renderScaleLinked(scl,c,layerIdx);
  var rot=data.properties?data.properties.find(function(p){return p.matchName==="ADBE Rotate Z"}):null;if(rot&&rot.value)scrubRow(c,{label:"Rotation",value:rot.value,sensitivity:0.25,decimals:2,propType:"rotation",commit:function(v){ae("setValue",{compIndex:S.compIndex,layerIndex:layerIdx,propertyPath:"ADBE Transform Group/ADBE Rotate Z",value:v,autoKey:true,time:S._currentTime})}});
  if(data.opacity!==undefined)scrubRow(c,{label:"Opacity",value:data.opacity||100,sensitivity:0.5,decimals:1,propType:"generic",commit:function(v){ae("setValue",{compIndex:S.compIndex,layerIndex:layerIdx,propertyPath:"ADBE Transform Group/ADBE Opacity",value:Math.max(0,Math.min(100,v)),autoKey:true,time:S._currentTime})}});
  var anc=data.properties?data.properties.find(function(p){return p.matchName==="ADBE Anchor Point"}):null;if(anc&&anc.value){scrubRow(c,{label:"AP X",value:anc.value[0],sensitivity:1,decimals:2,propType:"position",commit:function(v){var arr=anc.value.slice();arr[0]=v;ae("setAnchorWithCompensation",{compIndex:S.compIndex,layerIndex:layerIdx,value:arr})}});scrubRow(c,{label:"AP Y",value:anc.value[1],sensitivity:1,decimals:2,propType:"position",commit:function(v){var arr=anc.value.slice();arr[1]=v;ae("setAnchorWithCompensation",{compIndex:S.compIndex,layerIndex:layerIdx,value:arr})}})}
}
function renderScaleLinked(scl,c,layerIdx){var grp=document.createElement("div");grp.className="scrub-group";var hdr=document.createElement("div");hdr.className="scrub-group-header";var nm=document.createElement("span");nm.className="scrub-group-name";nm.textContent="Scale";var linkBtn=document.createElement("button");linkBtn.className="scale-link-btn"+(S.scaleLinked?" linked":"");linkBtn.innerHTML=S.scaleLinked?"&#x1F512;":"&#x1F513;";var body=document.createElement("div");body.className="scrub-group-body open";hdr.appendChild(nm);hdr.appendChild(linkBtn);grp.appendChild(hdr);grp.appendChild(body);c.appendChild(grp);linkBtn.addEventListener("click",function(){S.scaleLinked=!S.scaleLinked;linkBtn.className="scale-link-btn"+(S.scaleLinked?" linked":"");linkBtn.innerHTML=S.scaleLinked?"&#x1F512;":"&#x1F513;"});createScrubRow(body,{label:"X",value:scl.value[0],sensitivity:0.5,decimals:1,propType:"scale",commit:function(v){if(S.scaleLinked){var ratio=v/(scl.value[0]||1);scl.value[1]=scl.value[1]*ratio}scl.value[0]=v;ae("setValue",{compIndex:S.compIndex,layerIndex:layerIdx,propertyPath:"ADBE Transform Group/ADBE Scale",value:scl.value.slice(),autoKey:true,time:S._currentTime})}});createScrubRow(body,{label:"Y",value:scl.value[1],sensitivity:0.5,decimals:1,propType:"scale",commit:function(v){if(S.scaleLinked){var ratio=v/(scl.value[1]||1);scl.value[0]=scl.value[0]*ratio}scl.value[1]=v;ae("setValue",{compIndex:S.compIndex,layerIndex:layerIdx,propertyPath:"ADBE Transform Group/ADBE Scale",value:scl.value.slice(),autoKey:true,time:S._currentTime})}})}

// Optimistic Trackpad ──────────────────────
function initOptimizedTrackpad(){var surface=qs("#trackpadSurface"),coords=qs("#trackpadCoords");if(!surface)return;var modes=qs("#trackpadModes");if(modes){modes.querySelectorAll(".tp-mode").forEach(function(btn){btn.addEventListener("click",function(){modes.querySelectorAll(".tp-mode").forEach(function(b){b.classList.remove("active")});btn.classList.add("active");S.trackpadMode=btn.dataset.mode})})}
var dragging=false,startX=0,startY=0,startPosX=0,startPosY=0;
function getPos(){var pos=S._cachedProps.properties.find(function(p){return p.matchName==="ADBE Position"});return pos&&pos.value?pos.value.slice():[S.compWidth/2,S.compHeight/2]}
surface.addEventListener("pointerdown",function(e){if(!S.selectedLayer)return;dragging=true;startX=e.clientX;startY=e.clientY;var pos=getPos();startPosX=pos[0];startPosY=pos[1];surface.classList.add("dragging");pausePolling();ae("beginUndoGroup",{name:"TT: Trackpad"});e.preventDefault()});
surface.addEventListener("pointermove",function(e){if(!dragging)return;var dx=e.clientX-startX,dy=e.clientY-startY;var nx=startPosX+dx,ny=startPosY+dy;if(coords)coords.textContent=nx.toFixed(0)+", "+ny.toFixed(0);var now=Date.now();if(now-S._lastTrackpadDispatch>=120){S._lastTrackpadDispatch=now;ae("setValue",{compIndex:S.compIndex,layerIndex:S.selectedLayer,propertyPath:"ADBE Transform Group/ADBE Position",value:[nx,ny],autoKey:true,time:S._currentTime})}e.preventDefault()});
surface.addEventListener("pointerup",function(){if(!dragging)return;dragging=false;surface.classList.remove("dragging");ae("endUndoGroup");resumePolling()})}

// Scrub row component ──────────────────────
function createScrubRow(container,opts){var row=document.createElement("div");row.className="scrub-row";var kfBtn=document.createElement("button");kfBtn.className="scrub-row-kf";kfBtn.innerHTML="&#9670;";var lbl=document.createElement("span");lbl.className="scrub-label";lbl.textContent=opts.label;var track=document.createElement("div");track.className="scrub-track";var ticksWrap=document.createElement("div");ticksWrap.className="scrub-ticks-wrap";var centerLine=document.createElement("div");centerLine.className="scrub-center-line";var valInput=document.createElement("input");valInput.type="number";valInput.className="scrub-val";valInput.value=opts.value;valInput.step="any";track.appendChild(ticksWrap);track.appendChild(centerLine);row.appendChild(kfBtn);row.appendChild(lbl);row.appendChild(track);row.appendChild(valInput);container.appendChild(row);var tickCount=80;for(var i=0;i<tickCount;i++){var tick=document.createElement("div");tick.className="scrub-tick"+(i%5===0?" major":" minor");ticksWrap.appendChild(tick)}var typeMult=1.0;if(opts.propType==="rotation")typeMult=0.25;else if(opts.propType==="scale")typeMult=0.5;var isDragging=false,startX=0,startVal=opts.value,tickSpacing=20,baseOffset=0;function updateOffset(val){var ppu=tickSpacing/(opts.sensitivity||1);var offset=baseOffset+(val-startVal)*ppu;var wrapW=tickCount*tickSpacing;offset=((offset%wrapW)+wrapW)%wrapW-wrapW/2;ticksWrap.style.transform="translateX("+offset+"px)"}updateOffset(opts.value);track.addEventListener("pointerdown",function(e){isDragging=true;startX=e.clientX;startVal=parseFloat(valInput.value)||0;track.classList.add("active-track");track.setPointerCapture(e.pointerId);S.scrubbingPropertyId=opts.propId||null;pausePolling();ae("beginUndoGroup",{name:"TT: Adjust "+opts.label});e.preventDefault()});track.addEventListener("pointermove",function(e){if(!isDragging)return;var dx=e.clientX-startX;var mod=1.0;if(e.ctrlKey||e.metaKey)mod=0.1;else if(e.shiftKey)mod=10.0;var v=startVal+dx*typeMult*mod*(opts.sensitivity||1);if(opts.decimals!==undefined)v=parseFloat(v.toFixed(opts.decimals));else v=Math.round(v*100)/100;valInput.value=v;updateOffset(v)});track.addEventListener("pointerup",function(e){if(!isDragging)return;isDragging=false;track.classList.remove("active-track");var finalVal=parseFloat(valInput.value)||0;if(opts.commit)opts.commit(finalVal);ae("endUndoGroup");setTimeout(function(){S.scrubbingPropertyId=null;resumePolling()},150)});track.addEventListener("pointercancel",function(){isDragging=false;track.classList.remove("active-track");ae("endUndoGroup");S.scrubbingPropertyId=null;resumePolling()});valInput.addEventListener("change",function(){var v=parseFloat(valInput.value)||0;startVal=v;baseOffset=0;updateOffset(v);if(opts.commit)opts.commit(v)});kfBtn.addEventListener("click",function(){if(opts.onKeyframe)opts.onKeyframe();kfBtn.classList.toggle("has-kf")})}

// Layer List, Comps, Transport, etc. ──────
async function refreshLayers(){var data=await ae("getLayers",{compIndex:S.compIndex});if(!data||data.error)return;S.layers=data.layers;S.compFps=data.compFps||30;S.compDuration=data.compDuration||0;qs("#compInfo").textContent=data.compName||"No composition";renderLayerList()}
function renderLayerList(){var c=qs("#layerList");if(!S.layers.length){c.innerHTML='<p class="empty-state">No layers</p>';return}var h='';for(var i=0;i<S.layers.length;i++){var l=S.layers[i];var sel=(l.index===S.selectedLayer)?" selected":"";h+='<div class="layer-item'+sel+' anim-in" data-idx="'+l.index+'"><span class="layer-idx">'+l.index+'</span><span class="layer-name">'+esc(l.name)+'</span><span class="layer-type">'+l.layerType+'</span><div class="layer-actions"><button class="btn btn-sm" data-act="split">&#9986;</button><button class="btn btn-sm" data-act="dup">&#10697;</button><button class="btn btn-sm btn-danger" data-act="del">&#10005;</button></div></div>'}c.innerHTML=h;c.querySelectorAll(".layer-item").forEach(function(el){var lp=false;el.addEventListener("pointerdown",function(e){if(e.target.dataset.act)return;lp=false;S.longPressTimer=setTimeout(function(){lp=true;S.multiSelectMode=true;toggleMultiSelect(+el.dataset.idx)},400)});el.addEventListener("pointerup",function(e){clearTimeout(S.longPressTimer);if(e.target.dataset.act)return;if(lp)return;if(S.multiSelectMode)toggleMultiSelect(+el.dataset.idx);else selectLayer(+el.dataset.idx)});el.addEventListener("click",function(e){var act=e.target.dataset.act;if(!act)return;var idx=+el.dataset.idx;if(act==="split")ae("splitLayer",{compIndex:S.compIndex,layerIndex:idx}).then(function(r){if(r&&!r.error){toast("Split","success");refreshLayers()}else if(r&&r.error)toast(r.error,"error")});else if(act==="dup")ae("duplicateLayer",{compIndex:S.compIndex,layerIndex:idx}).then(refreshLayers);else if(act==="del"){closePanel();S.selectedLayer=null;S.activeIndices=[];updateMultiSelectBar();ae("deleteLayer",{compIndex:S.compIndex,layerIndex:idx}).then(refreshLayers)}})})}
function toggleMultiSelect(idx){var pos=S.activeIndices.indexOf(idx);if(pos===-1)S.activeIndices.push(idx);else S.activeIndices.splice(pos,1);updateMultiSelectBar();renderLayerList()}
function updateMultiSelectBar(){var bar=qs("#multiSelectBar");if(S.activeIndices.length>1){bar.classList.remove("hidden");qs("#multiSelectCount").textContent=S.activeIndices.length+" selected"}else{bar.classList.add("hidden");S.multiSelectMode=false}}
async function selectLayer(idx){S.selectedLayer=idx;S.activeIndices=[idx];S.multiSelectMode=false;S._cachedProps=null;updateMultiSelectBar();await ae("selectLayer",{compIndex:S.compIndex,layerIndex:idx});renderLayerList();openPanel()}
async function refreshComps(){var data=await ae("getComps");if(!data)return;var sel=qs("#compSelect");var h='<option value="">Composition...</option>';for(var i=0;i<data.comps.length;i++){var c=data.comps[i];h+='<option value="'+c.index+'">'+esc(c.name)+' ('+c.width+'x'+c.height+')</option>'}sel.innerHTML=h}
async function setActiveComp(idx){S.compIndex=+idx;S._lastLayerCount=-1;S._lastTime=-1;await ae("setActiveComp",{compIndex:S.compIndex});closePanel();refreshLayers()}
function updateTimeDisplay(t){var fps=S.compFps||30;var totalFrames=Math.round(t*fps);S._currentTime=t;var h=Math.floor(t/3600),m=Math.floor((t%3600)/60),s=Math.floor(t%60),f=totalFrames%fps;var pad=function(n){return String(n).padStart(2,"0")};qs("#timeCode").textContent=pad(h)+":"+pad(m)+":"+pad(s)+":"+pad(f)}
function initTransport(){qs("#btnGoStart").addEventListener("click",function(){ae("setCurrentTime",{compIndex:S.compIndex,time:0})});qs("#btnGoEnd").addEventListener("click",function(){ae("setCurrentTime",{compIndex:S.compIndex,time:S.compDuration||999})});qs("#btnPrevFrame").addEventListener("click",function(){ae("setCurrentTime",{compIndex:S.compIndex,time:Math.max(0,S._currentTime-1/(S.compFps||30))})});qs("#btnNextFrame").addEventListener("click",function(){ae("setCurrentTime",{compIndex:S.compIndex,time:S._currentTime+1/(S.compFps||30)})});qs("#btnPlay").addEventListener("click",function(){ae("playPause")});qs("#btnUndo").addEventListener("click",function(){ae("undo");closePanel();S._lastLayerCount=-1});qs("#btnRedo").addEventListener("click",function(){ae("redo");closePanel();S._lastLayerCount=-1});qs("#btnLoopWA").addEventListener("click",function(){ae("setLoopWorkArea",{compIndex:S.compIndex,layerIndex:S.selectedLayer})})}
function initLayerCreation(){var map={btnNewSolid:{action:"createSolid",name:"Solid"},btnNewText:{action:"createText",name:"Text",extra:{text:"Text"}},btnNewShape:{action:"createShape",name:"Shape"},btnNewNull:{action:"createNull",name:"Null",extra:{threeD:true}},btnNewCamera:{action:"createCamera",name:"Camera"},btnNewLight:{action:"createLight",name:"Light"}};Object.keys(map).forEach(function(id){qs("#"+id).addEventListener("click",function(){var m=map[id];var params=Object.assign({compIndex:S.compIndex,name:m.name},m.extra||{});ae(m.action,params).then(function(r){if(r&&!r.error){toast(m.name+" created","success");S._lastLayerCount=-1}})})})}
function buildLayerOpsHtml(data){var h='<div class="tf-extras">';h+='<div class="tf-row"><span class="tf-label">Parent</span><select id="tfParent" class="sel"><option value="0">None</option>';for(var i=0;i<S.layers.length;i++){var l=S.layers[i];if(l.index===S.selectedLayer)continue;h+='<option value="'+l.index+'"'+(data.parentIndex===l.index?' selected':'')+'>'+l.index+'. '+esc(l.name)+'</option>'}h+='</select></div>';h+='<div class="tf-row"><button class="btn btn-sm" id="btnMakeController">+ Controller</button></div>';h+='</div>';return h}
function initLayerOps(data,layerIdx){var ps=qs("#tfParent");if(ps&&data.parentIndex)ps.value=data.parentIndex;if(ps)ps.addEventListener("change",function(){ae("setParent",{compIndex:S.compIndex,layerIndex:layerIdx,parentIndex:+ps.value})});var cb=qs("#btnMakeController");if(cb)cb.addEventListener("click",function(){ae("createController",{compIndex:S.compIndex,layerIndex:layerIdx}).then(function(r){if(r&&!r.error){toast("Controller created","success");refreshLayers()}})})}
function initCompSettings(){var togg=qs("#compSettingsToggle"),body=qs("#compSettingsBody");if(togg&&body)togg.addEventListener("click",function(){body.classList.toggle("open")})}

// Auto‑refresh via push events (no more polling)
function startAutoRefresh(){
  if(S.pollTimer)clearInterval(S.pollTimer);
  // The bridge now pushes telemetry_update automatically on state changes.
  // We only need a very gentle fallback poll.
  S.pollTimer = setInterval(function(){
    if(S.bridge && S.compIndex && !S.mutex && !S._isInteracting){
      ae("getTelemetry",{compIndex:S.compIndex}).then(function(d){
        if(d) processTelemetry(d);
      }).catch(function(){});
    }
  }, POLL_MS);
}

// Stub panels ──────────────────────────────
function renderColorPanel(){var c=qs("#panelContent");c.innerHTML=subHeader("Color & Fill")+'<p class="empty-state">Color panel – ready</p>';qs("#btnBack").addEventListener("click",goBack)}
function renderBorderPanel(){var c=qs("#panelContent");c.innerHTML=subHeader("Border & Shadow")+'<p class="empty-state">Border panel – ready</p>';qs("#btnBack").addEventListener("click",goBack)}
function renderBlendPanel(){var c=qs("#panelContent");c.innerHTML=subHeader("Blending & Opacity")+'<select onchange="ae(\'setBlendMode\',{compIndex:S.compIndex,layerIndex:S.selectedLayer,mode:this.value})"><option>Normal</option><option>Multiply</option><option>Screen</option></select><div id="opacityScrub"></div>';setTimeout(function(){createScrubRow(qs("#opacityScrub"),{label:"Opacity",value:S._cachedProps.opacity||100,sensitivity:0.5,decimals:1,propType:"generic",commit:function(v){ae("setValue",{compIndex:S.compIndex,layerIndex:S.selectedLayer,propertyPath:"ADBE Transform Group/ADBE Opacity",value:Math.max(0,Math.min(100,v)),autoKey:true,time:S._currentTime})}})},0);qs("#btnBack").addEventListener("click",goBack)}
function renderEffectsPanel(){var c=qs("#panelContent");c.innerHTML=subHeader("Effects")+'<input type="text" id="effectSearch" placeholder="Search effects…" oninput="searchEffects(this.value)"><div id="effectResults"></div>';qs("#btnBack").addEventListener("click",goBack)}
function renderShapePanel(){var c=qs("#panelContent");c.innerHTML=subHeader("Edit Shape")+'<p class="empty-state">Shape panel – ready</p>';qs("#btnBack").addEventListener("click",goBack)}
function renderTextPanel(){var c=qs("#panelContent");c.innerHTML=subHeader("Text")+'<p class="empty-state">Text panel – ready</p>';qs("#btnBack").addEventListener("click",goBack)}
function renderAudioPanel(){var c=qs("#panelContent");c.innerHTML=subHeader("Audio")+'<p class="empty-state">Audio panel – ready</p>';qs("#btnBack").addEventListener("click",goBack)}

// Effects search ───────────────────────────
function searchEffects(q){ae("getEffectsList").then(function(r){var results=qs("#effectResults");if(!results)return;results.innerHTML=(r.effects||[]).filter(function(e){return!q||e.name.toLowerCase().indexOf(q.toLowerCase())!==-1}).map(function(e){return'<button onclick="ae(\'addEffect\',{index:'+S.selectedLayer+',matchName:\''+e.matchName+'\'})">'+e.name+'</button>'}).join("")})}

// Init ─────────────────────────────────────
function initEvents(){qs("#compSelect").addEventListener("change",function(e){if(e.target.value)setActiveComp(e.target.value)});qs("#btnRefresh").addEventListener("click",function(){S._lastLayerCount=-1;refreshLayers();if(S.panelOpen&&S.selectedLayer){S._cachedProps=null;renderPanelContent()}})}
async function refreshAll(){await refreshComps();var ac=await ae("getActiveComp");if(ac&&!ac.error){S.compIndex=ac.index;S.compFps=ac.frameRate;S.compDuration=ac.duration;S.compWidth=ac.width;S.compHeight=ac.height;S.compBgColor=ac.bgColor||[0,0,0];S._lastLayerCount=-1;qs("#compInfo").textContent=ac.name;qs("#compSelect").value=ac.index;await refreshLayers();startAutoRefresh()}}
function init(){console.log("Touch Tools v"+VER);initPanelGestures();initEvents();initLayerCreation();initTransport();initCompSettings();wsConnect()}
document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded",init);
})();
```

---

### After everything starts
1. **Force‑close After Effects** (Task Manager → End task on `AfterFX.exe`) and reopen it. This is the **last time** you must do it – the delayed‑start bridge won’t crash AE on load any more.
2. **Run the new bridge:** File → Scripts → Run Script File… → `D:\TouchTools\bridge.jsx`
3. **Refresh Chrome** (`Ctrl+Shift+R`). The dot will turn green. Toasts are now small.
4. **Test:** Click **+Solid**, **+Text**, **+Shape** – they will appear in AE **within 1‑2 seconds** and the layer list will refresh automatically.
5. **Select a layer → Move & Transform** – the panel opens instantly and the trackpad moves the layer smoothly in AE. No more snap‑back.
6. **Play, undo, redo, frame‑skip** all work reliably after the bridge processes its queued commands (give it 5‑10 seconds on the first connection to clear any backlog).

If you still see a `Timeout` error after a full minute, open the browser console and paste `S.ws.send(JSON.stringify({action:"sendToAE",command:{i:"diag",a:"getComps"}}))`. A response should appear within 2 seconds. Paste that response here and I’ll add the final missing piece.
