```powershell
$app = @'
(function(){"use strict";
var VER="2.3.0",RM=2500,CT=15000;
var S={
  ws:null,connected:false,bridge:false,compIndex:null,compFps:30,compDuration:0,compWidth:1920,compHeight:1080,compBgColor:[0,0,0],
  layers:[],selectedLayer:null,activeIndices:[],pending:{},cmdId:0,_currentTime:0,panelOpen:false,panelLevel:0,panelCategory:null,
  pollTimer:null,longPressTimer:null,multiSelectMode:false,_lastLayerCount:-1,_lastTime:-1,_cachedProps:null,
  trackpadAxis:"ALL",scaleLinked:true,_busyToastShown:false,_isInteracting:false,
  lastV:{pos:[0,0],rot:0,scale:[100,100],anchor:[0,0],opacity:100}
};

function qs(s){return document.querySelector(s)}
function qsa(s){return document.querySelectorAll(s)}
function esc(s){return String(s).replace(/&/g,"&amp;").replace(/</g,"&lt;").replace(/>/g,"&gt;").replace(/"/g,"&quot;")}
function rgbToHex(r,g,b){return"#"+[r,g,b].map(function(x){return x.toString(16).padStart(2,"0")}).join("")}
function hexToRgb(hex){return{r:parseInt(hex.slice(1,3),16),g:parseInt(hex.slice(3,5),16),b:parseInt(hex.slice(5,7),16)}}

// WebSocket
var reconTimer=null;
function wsConnect(){try{S.ws=new WebSocket("ws://localhost:8080")}catch(e){scheduleRecon();return}
S.ws.onopen=function(){S.connected=true;clearRecon();updateDot();toast("Connected","success")}
S.ws.onclose=function(){S.connected=false;S.bridge=false;updateDot();scheduleRecon()}
S.ws.onmessage=function(ev){try{handleMsg(JSON.parse(ev.data))}catch(e){}}}
function scheduleRecon(){if(!reconTimer)reconTimer=setTimeout(function(){reconTimer=null;wsConnect()},RM)}
function clearRecon(){if(reconTimer){clearTimeout(reconTimer);reconTimer=null}}
function updateDot(){var dot=qs(".status-dot");if(dot){dot.className="status-dot"+(S.bridge?" connected":"")}}
function handleMsg(msg){
  if(msg.type==="bridge_status"){S.bridge=msg.connected;updateDot();if(S.bridge){toast("Bridge connected","success");ae("getComps").then(function(r){if(r&&r.comps)renderCompList(r.comps)})}}
  else if(msg.type==="telemetry_update"){var d=msg;S._currentTime=d.time;S.compFps=d.fps||S.compFps;S.compDuration=d.duration||S.compDuration;updateTimeDisplay(d.time);if(d.layerCount!==S._lastLayerCount){S._lastLayerCount=d.layerCount;refreshLayers()}}
  else if(msg.type==="result"||msg.type==="error")resolveCmd(msg)
}
function ae(action,params){params=params||{};return new Promise(function(resolve,reject){
  if(!S.bridge){toast("AE not connected","warn");reject(new Error("No bridge"));return}
  var id=String(++S.cmdId);var t=setTimeout(function(){delete S.pending[id];reject(new Error("Timeout"))},CT);
  S.pending[id]={resolve:resolve,reject:reject,t:t};var cmd={id:id,action:action};for(var k in params)cmd[k]=params[k];
  S.ws.send(JSON.stringify({action:"sendToAE",command:cmd}));
})}
function resolveCmd(msg){var id=msg.id;if(!id||!S.pending[id])return;clearTimeout(S.pending[id].t);
  if(msg.type==="error"||msg.error)S.pending[id].reject(new Error(msg.error||msg.message||"Error"));
  else S.pending[id].resolve(msg.data||msg);delete S.pending[id]}

function toast(text,type){type=type||"";var el=document.createElement("div");el.className="toast "+type;el.textContent=text;document.body.appendChild(el);setTimeout(function(){el.style.opacity="0";el.style.transition="opacity .3s";setTimeout(function(){el.remove()},300)},2500)}

// Panel (auto‑dismiss, touch‑friendly)
function openPanel(){S.panelOpen=true;S.panelLevel=0;S.panelCategory=null;S._cachedProps=null;qs("#dimmer").classList.add("active");qs("#propertyPanel").classList.add("active");renderPanelContent()}
function closePanel(){S.panelOpen=false;S.panelLevel=0;S.panelCategory=null;S._cachedProps=null;qs("#dimmer").classList.remove("active");qs("#propertyPanel").classList.remove("active");qs("#propertyPanel").style.transform="";S.selectedLayer=null;S.scrubbingPropertyId=null;renderLayerList()}
function goBack(){S.panelLevel=0;S.panelCategory=null;renderPanelContent()}

function initPanelGestures(){
  var panel=qs("#propertyPanel"),handle=qs("#panelHandle");
  var startY=0,currentY=0,isDragging=false,startTime=0;
  function onS(y){startY=y;currentY=y;isDragging=true;startTime=Date.now();panel.style.transition="none"}
  function onM(y){if(!isDragging)return;currentY=y;var d=currentY-startY;if(d<0)d=0;panel.style.transform="translateY("+d+"px)"}
  function onE(){
    if(!isDragging)return;isDragging=false;panel.style.transition="transform 0.3s ease";
    var d=currentY-startY,vel=(d/Math.max(Date.now()-startTime,1))*1000;
    if(d>80||vel>800){panel.style.transform="translateY(100%)";setTimeout(function(){panel.classList.remove("active");panel.style.transform="";closePanel()},300)}
    else{panel.style.transform="translateY(0)"}
  }
  handle.addEventListener("touchstart",function(e){onS(e.touches[0].clientY);e.preventDefault()},{passive:false});
  handle.addEventListener("touchmove",function(e){onM(e.touches[0].clientY);e.preventDefault()},{passive:false});
  handle.addEventListener("touchend",onE);
  handle.addEventListener("mousedown",function(e){onS(e.clientY);function mm(ev){onM(ev.clientY)}function mu(){onEnd();document.removeEventListener("mousemove",mm);document.removeEventListener("mouseup",mu)}document.addEventListener("mousemove",mm);document.addEventListener("mouseup",mu);e.preventDefault()});
  // Tap dimmer → close
  qs("#dimmer").addEventListener("click",closePanel);
  qs("#dimmer").addEventListener("touchend",function(e){e.preventDefault();closePanel()});
  // Close button in panel header
  var closeBtn=qs("#panelCloseBtn");
  if(closeBtn){closeBtn.addEventListener("click",closePanel);closeBtn.addEventListener("touchend",function(e){e.preventDefault();closePanel()})}
}

// Panel content
async function renderPanelContent(){
  var container=qs("#panelContent"),layerIdx=S.selectedLayer;
  if(!layerIdx){container.innerHTML='<p class="empty-state">No layer selected</p>';return}
  if(!S._cachedProps){
    container.innerHTML='<p class="empty-state">Loading...</p>';
    var data=await ae("getLayerProperties",{compIndex:S.compIndex,layerIndex:layerIdx});
    if(!data||data.error){container.innerHTML='<p class="empty-state">Error loading</p>';return}
    S._cachedProps=data;
    var pos=data.properties?data.properties.find(function(p){return p.matchName==="ADBE Position"}):null;
    var rot=data.properties?data.properties.find(function(p){return p.matchName==="ADBE Rotate Z"}):null;
    var scl=data.properties?data.properties.find(function(p){return p.matchName==="ADBE Scale"}):null;
    var anc=data.properties?data.properties.find(function(p){return p.matchName==="ADBE Anchor Point"}):null;
    S.lastV.pos=pos&&pos.value?pos.value.slice():[S.compWidth/2,S.compHeight/2];
    S.lastV.rot=rot&&rot.value?rot.value:0;
    S.lastV.scale=scl&&scl.value?scl.value.slice():[100,100];
    S.lastV.anchor=anc&&anc.value?anc.value.slice():[0,0];
    S.lastV.opacity=data.opacity||100;
  }
  if(S.panelLevel===0)renderRootPanel();else renderSubPanel();
}

function renderRootPanel(){
  var container=qs("#panelContent"),data=S._cachedProps,layerInfo=null;
  for(var i=0;i<S.layers.length;i++){if(S.layers[i].index===S.selectedLayer){layerInfo=S.layers[i];break}}
  var lt=data.layerType||"";
  var html='<div class="panel-layer-header"><span class="panel-layer-name">'+esc(layerInfo?layerInfo.name:"Layer")+'</span><span class="panel-layer-type">'+lt+'</span></div><div class="category-grid">';
  html+=catBtn("move","Move & Transform","&#x2726;");html+=catBtn("color","Color & Fill","&#x25C9;");
  html+=catBtn("border","Border & Shadow","&#x25A1;");html+=catBtn("blend","Blending & Opacity","&#x25CB;");
  html+=catBtn("effects","Effects","&#x2605;");
  if(lt==="SHAPE")html+=catBtn("shape","Edit Shape","&#x25A3;");
  if(lt==="TEXT")html+=catBtn("text","Text","&#x270E;");
  if(lt==="AV"||lt==="SOLID")html+=catBtn("audio","Audio","&#x266B;");
  html+='</div>';
  container.innerHTML=html;
  container.querySelectorAll(".cat-btn").forEach(function(el){el.addEventListener("click",function(){S.panelCategory=el.dataset.cat;S.panelLevel=1;renderSubPanel()})});
}
function catBtn(cat,label,icon){return'<div class="cat-btn" data-cat="'+cat+'"><span class="cat-icon">'+icon+'</span><span class="cat-label">'+label+'</span></div>'}
function subHeader(title){return'<div class="sub-panel-header"><button class="back-btn" id="btnBack">&#8592;</button><span class="sub-panel-title">'+title+'</span></div>'}

function renderSubPanel(){
  switch(S.panelCategory){
    case"move":renderMovePanel();break;case"color":renderColorPanel();break;case"border":renderBorderPanel();break;
    case"blend":renderBlendPanel();break;case"effects":renderEffectsPanel();break;case"shape":renderShapePanel();break;
    case"text":renderTextPanel();break;case"audio":renderAudioPanel();break;default:goBack();
  }
}

// Move & Transform
function renderMovePanel(){var c=qs("#panelContent"),data=S._cachedProps,li=S.selectedLayer,is3D=data.is3D;var h=subHeader("Move & Transform");
  h+='<div class="panel-section"><div class="section-body open"><div class="tp-surface" id="trackpadSurface"><div class="tp-crosshair" id="tpCross"></div><span class="tp-coords" id="trackpadCoords">0,0</span></div>';
  h+='<div class="tp-toolbar"><div class="axis-toggles" id="axisToggles"><button class="axis-btn active" data-axis="ALL">ALL</button><button class="axis-btn" data-axis="X">X</button><button class="axis-btn" data-axis="Y">Y</button>';
  if(is3D)h+='<button class="axis-btn" data-axis="Z">Z</button>';
  h+='</div><div class="tp-modes" id="trackpadModes"><button class="tp-mode active" data-mode="position">Pos</button><button class="tp-mode" data-mode="rotation">Rot</button><button class="tp-mode" data-mode="scale">Scl</button><button class="tp-mode" data-mode="anchor">AP</button></div></div></div></div>';
  h+='<div class="panel-section"><div class="section-body open" id="sectionTransform"></div></div>';
  h+='<div class="panel-section"><div class="section-header"><span class="section-arrow">&#9656;</span><span class="section-title">Layer Options</span></div><div class="section-body" id="sectionLayerOps">'+buildLayerOpsHtml(data)+'</div></div>';
  c.innerHTML=h;loadTransformDials(data,li,is3D);initTrackpad();initLayerOps(data,li);
  qs("#axisToggles").querySelectorAll(".axis-btn").forEach(function(b){b.addEventListener("click",function(){qs("#axisToggles").querySelectorAll(".axis-btn").forEach(function(x){x.classList.remove("active")});b.classList.add("active");S.trackpadAxis=b.dataset.axis})});
  qs("#btnBack").addEventListener("click",goBack);
}

function loadTransformDials(data,layerIdx,is3D){var c=qs("#sectionTransform");if(!c)return;c.innerHTML="";var sr=createScrubRow;
  var pos=data.properties?data.properties.find(function(p){return p.matchName==="ADBE Position"}):null;
  if(pos&&pos.value){sr(c,{label:"Pos X",value:pos.value[0],s:1,d:2,t:"pos",commit:function(v){var a=pos.value.slice();a[0]=v;ae("setValue",{compIndex:S.compIndex,layerIndex:layerIdx,propertyPath:"ADBE Transform Group/ADBE Position",value:a,autoKey:true,time:S._currentTime});S.lastV.pos=a}});
  sr(c,{label:"Pos Y",value:pos.value[1],s:1,d:2,t:"pos",commit:function(v){var a=pos.value.slice();a[1]=v;ae("setValue",{compIndex:S.compIndex,layerIndex:layerIdx,propertyPath:"ADBE Transform Group/ADBE Position",value:a,autoKey:true,time:S._currentTime});S.lastV.pos=a}})}
  var scl=data.properties?data.properties.find(function(p){return p.matchName==="ADBE Scale"}):null;if(scl&&scl.value)renderScaleLinked(scl,c,layerIdx);
  var rot=data.properties?data.properties.find(function(p){return p.matchName==="ADBE Rotate Z"}):null;if(rot&&rot.value)sr(c,{label:"Rotation",value:rot.value,s:0.25,d:2,t:"rot",commit:function(v){ae("setValue",{compIndex:S.compIndex,layerIndex:layerIdx,propertyPath:"ADBE Transform Group/ADBE Rotate Z",value:v,autoKey:true,time:S._currentTime});S.lastV.rot=v}});
  if(data.opacity!==undefined)sr(c,{label:"Opacity",value:data.opacity||100,s:0.5,d:1,t:"op",commit:function(v){ae("setValue",{compIndex:S.compIndex,layerIndex:layerIdx,propertyPath:"ADBE Transform Group/ADBE Opacity",value:Math.max(0,Math.min(100,v)),autoKey:true,time:S._currentTime});S.lastV.opacity=v}});
  var anc=data.properties?data.properties.find(function(p){return p.matchName==="ADBE Anchor Point"}):null;if(anc&&anc.value){sr(c,{label:"AP X",value:anc.value[0],s:1,d:2,t:"anc",commit:function(v){var a=anc.value.slice();a[0]=v;ae("setAnchorWithCompensation",{compIndex:S.compIndex,layerIndex:layerIdx,value:a});S.lastV.anchor=a}});
  sr(c,{label:"AP Y",value:anc.value[1],s:1,d:2,t:"anc",commit:function(v){var a=anc.value.slice();a[1]=v;ae("setAnchorWithCompensation",{compIndex:S.compIndex,layerIndex:layerIdx,value:a});S.lastV.anchor=a}})}
}
function renderScaleLinked(scl,c,layerIdx){var g=document.createElement("div");g.className="scrub-group";var hdr=document.createElement("div");hdr.className="scrub-group-header";var nm=document.createElement("span");nm.className="scrub-group-name";nm.textContent="Scale";var lb=document.createElement("button");lb.className="scale-link-btn"+(S.scaleLinked?" linked":"");lb.innerHTML=S.scaleLinked?"&#x1F512;":"&#x1F513;";var bd=document.createElement("div");bd.className="scrub-group-body open";hdr.appendChild(nm);hdr.appendChild(lb);g.appendChild(hdr);g.appendChild(bd);c.appendChild(g);lb.addEventListener("click",function(){S.scaleLinked=!S.scaleLinked;lb.className="scale-link-btn"+(S.scaleLinked?" linked":"");lb.innerHTML=S.scaleLinked?"&#x1F512;":"&#x1F513;"});
  createScrubRow(bd,{label:"X",value:scl.value[0],s:0.5,d:1,t:"scl",commit:function(v){if(S.scaleLinked){var r=v/(scl.value[0]||1);scl.value[1]=scl.value[1]*r}scl.value[0]=v;ae("setValue",{compIndex:S.compIndex,layerIndex:layerIdx,propertyPath:"ADBE Transform Group/ADBE Scale",value:scl.value.slice(),autoKey:true,time:S._currentTime});S.lastV.scale=scl.value.slice()}});
  createScrubRow(bd,{label:"Y",value:scl.value[1],s:0.5,d:1,t:"scl",commit:function(v){if(S.scaleLinked){var r=v/(scl.value[1]||1);scl.value[0]=scl.value[0]*r}scl.value[1]=v;ae("setValue",{compIndex:S.compIndex,layerIndex:layerIdx,propertyPath:"ADBE Transform Group/ADBE Scale",value:scl.value.slice(),autoKey:true,time:S._currentTime});S.lastV.scale=scl.value.slice()}});
}

// TRACKPAD – 100% local visual, AE only on release
function initTrackpad(){
  var s=qs("#trackpadSurface"),coords=qs("#trackpadCoords"),modes=qs("#trackpadModes"),cross=qs("#tpCross");
  if(!s)return;
  if(modes){modes.querySelectorAll(".tp-mode").forEach(function(b){b.addEventListener("click",function(){modes.querySelectorAll(".tp-mode").forEach(function(x){x.classList.remove("active")});b.classList.add("active");S.trackpadMode=b.dataset.mode})})}
  var dragging=false,sx=0,sy=0,sv={pos:[0,0],rot:0,scale:[100,100],anchor:[0,0]};
  s.addEventListener("pointerdown",function(e){
    if(!S.selectedLayer)return;dragging=true;sx=e.clientX;sy=e.clientY;
    sv.pos=S.lastV.pos.slice();sv.rot=S.lastV.rot;sv.scale=S.lastV.scale.slice();sv.anchor=S.lastV.anchor.slice();
    s.classList.add("dragging");S._isInteracting=true;ae("beginUndoGroup",{name:"TT Trackpad"}).catch(function(){});e.preventDefault();
  });
  s.addEventListener("pointermove",function(e){
    if(!dragging)return;var dx=e.clientX-sx,dy=e.clientY-sy,axis=S.trackpadAxis,mode=S.trackpadMode||"position";
    var adx=(axis==="ALL"||axis==="X")?dx:0,ady=(axis==="ALL"||axis==="Y")?dy:0;
    // 100% local visual update
    if(mode==="position"){var nx=sv.pos[0]+adx,ny=sv.pos[1]+ady;if(coords)coords.textContent=nx.toFixed(0)+","+ny.toFixed(0);if(cross){cross.style.left=(50+adx*0.5)+"%";cross.style.top=(50+ady*0.5)+"%"}}
    else if(mode==="rotation"){var nr=sv.rot+adx*0.25;if(coords)coords.textContent=nr.toFixed(2)+" deg"}
    else if(mode==="scale"){var nsx,nsy;if(S.scaleLinked){var sd=adx*0.5;nsx=sv.scale[0]+sd;nsy=sv.scale[1]+sd}else{nsx=sv.scale[0]+adx*0.5;nsy=sv.scale[1]-ady*0.5}if(coords)coords.textContent=nsx.toFixed(1)+","+nsy.toFixed(1)}
    else if(mode==="anchor"){var nax=sv.anchor[0]+adx,nay=sv.anchor[1]+ady;if(coords)coords.textContent=nax.toFixed(1)+","+nay.toFixed(1)}
    e.preventDefault();
  });
  s.addEventListener("pointerup",function(e){
    if(!dragging)return;dragging=false;s.classList.remove("dragging");
    var dx=e.clientX-sx,dy=e.clientY-sy,axis=S.trackpadAxis,mode=S.trackpadMode||"position";
    var adx=(axis==="ALL"||axis==="X")?dx:0,ady=(axis==="ALL"||axis==="Y")?dy:0;
    // Send final value to AE
    if(mode==="position"){var nx=sv.pos[0]+adx,ny=sv.pos[1]+ady;ae("setValue",{compIndex:S.compIndex,layerIndex:S.selectedLayer,propertyPath:"ADBE Transform Group/ADBE Position",value:[nx,ny],autoKey:true,time:S._currentTime});S.lastV.pos=[nx,ny]}
    else if(mode==="rotation"){var nr=sv.rot+adx*0.25;ae("setValue",{compIndex:S.compIndex,layerIndex:S.selectedLayer,propertyPath:"ADBE Transform Group/ADBE Rotate Z",value:nr,autoKey:true,time:S._currentTime});S.lastV.rot=nr}
    else if(mode==="scale"){var nsx,nsy;if(S.scaleLinked){var sd=adx*0.5;nsx=sv.scale[0]+sd;nsy=sv.scale[1]+sd}else{nsx=sv.scale[0]+adx*0.5;nsy=sv.scale[1]-ady*0.5}ae("setValue",{compIndex:S.compIndex,layerIndex:S.selectedLayer,propertyPath:"ADBE Transform Group/ADBE Scale",value:[nsx,nsy],autoKey:true,time:S._currentTime});S.lastV.scale=[nsx,nsy]}
    else if(mode==="anchor"){var nax=sv.anchor[0]+adx,nay=sv.anchor[1]+ady;ae("setAnchorWithCompensation",{compIndex:S.compIndex,layerIndex:S.selectedLayer,value:[nax,nay]});S.lastV.anchor=[nax,nay]}
    ae("endUndoGroup").catch(function(){});S._isInteracting=false;
    if(cross){cross.style.left="50%";cross.style.top="50%"}
    e.preventDefault();
  });
  s.addEventListener("pointercancel",function(){if(dragging){dragging=false;s.classList.remove("dragging");ae("endUndoGroup").catch(function(){});S._isInteracting=false}});
}

// Scrub row
function createScrubRow(container,opts){
  var row=document.createElement("div");row.className="scrub-row";var kf=document.createElement("button");kf.className="scrub-row-kf";kf.innerHTML="&#9670;";var lbl=document.createElement("span");lbl.className="scrub-label";lbl.textContent=opts.label;
  var track=document.createElement("div");track.className="scrub-track";var tw=document.createElement("div");tw.className="scrub-ticks-wrap";var cl=document.createElement("div");cl.className="scrub-center-line";var inp=document.createElement("input");inp.type="number";inp.className="scrub-val";inp.value=opts.value;inp.step="any";
  track.appendChild(tw);track.appendChild(cl);row.appendChild(kf);row.appendChild(lbl);row.appendChild(track);row.appendChild(inp);container.appendChild(row);
  for(var i=0;i<80;i++){var t=document.createElement("div");t.className="scrub-tick"+(i%5===0?" major":" minor");tw.appendChild(t)}
  var tm=1.0;if(opts.t==="rot")tm=0.25;else if(opts.t==="scl")tm=0.5;
  var dg=false,sx=0,sv=opts.value,ts=20,bo=0;
  function uo(v){var ppu=ts/(opts.s||1);var o=bo+(v-sv)*ppu;var w=80*ts;o=((o%w)+w)%w-w/2;tw.style.transform="translateX("+o+"px)"}uo(opts.value);
  track.addEventListener("pointerdown",function(e){dg=true;sx=e.clientX;sv=parseFloat(inp.value)||0;track.classList.add("active-track");track.setPointerCapture(e.pointerId);ae("beginUndoGroup",{name:"TT "+opts.label});e.preventDefault()});
  track.addEventListener("pointermove",function(e){if(!dg)return;var dx=e.clientX-sx,m=1.0;if(e.ctrlKey||e.metaKey)m=0.1;else if(e.shiftKey)m=10;var v=sv+dx*tm*m*(opts.s||1);if(opts.d!==undefined)v=parseFloat(v.toFixed(opts.d));else v=Math.round(v*100)/100;inp.value=v;uo(v)});
  track.addEventListener("pointerup",function(e){if(!dg)return;dg=false;track.classList.remove("active-track");var fv=parseFloat(inp.value)||0;if(opts.commit)opts.commit(fv);ae("endUndoGroup")});
  track.addEventListener("pointercancel",function(){if(dg){dg=false;track.classList.remove("active-track");ae("endUndoGroup")}});
  inp.addEventListener("change",function(){var v=parseFloat(inp.value)||0;sv=v;bo=0;uo(v);if(opts.commit)opts.commit(v)});
  kf.addEventListener("click",function(e){e.preventDefault();ae("setKeyframe",{compIndex:S.compIndex,layerIndex:S.selectedLayer,propertyPath:opts.propId||"ADBE Transform Group/ADBE Position"});kf.classList.toggle("has-kf")});
}

// Layer list
async function refreshLayers(){var d=await ae("getLayers",{compIndex:S.compIndex});if(!d||d.error)return;S.layers=d.layers;S.compFps=d.compFps||30;S.compDuration=d.compDuration||0;qs("#compInfo").textContent=d.compName||"No composition";renderLayerList()}
function renderLayerList(){var c=qs("#layerList");if(!S.layers.length){c.innerHTML='<p class="empty-state">No layers</p>';return}var h='';for(var i=0;i<S.layers.length;i++){var l=S.layers[i],sel=(l.index===S.selectedLayer)?" selected":"";h+='<div class="layer-item'+sel+'" data-idx="'+l.index+'"><span class="layer-idx">'+l.index+'</span><span class="layer-name">'+esc(l.name)+'</span><span class="layer-type">'+l.layerType+'</span><div class="layer-actions"><button class="btn btn-sm" data-act="split">&#9986;</button><button class="btn btn-sm" data-act="dup">&#10697;</button><button class="btn btn-sm btn-danger" data-act="del">&#10005;</button></div></div>'}c.innerHTML=h;
  c.querySelectorAll(".layer-item").forEach(function(el){var lp=false;el.addEventListener("pointerdown",function(e){if(e.target.dataset.act)return;lp=false;S.longPressTimer=setTimeout(function(){lp=true;S.multiSelectMode=true;toggleMultiSelect(+el.dataset.idx)},400)});el.addEventListener("pointerup",function(e){clearTimeout(S.longPressTimer);if(e.target.dataset.act)return;if(lp)return;if(S.multiSelectMode)toggleMultiSelect(+el.dataset.idx);else selectLayer(+el.dataset.idx)});el.addEventListener("click",function(e){var act=e.target.dataset.act;if(!act)return;var idx=+el.dataset.idx;if(act==="split")ae("splitLayer",{compIndex:S.compIndex,layerIndex:idx}).then(function(r){if(r&&!r.error){toast("Split","success");refreshLayers()}else if(r&&r.error)toast(r.error,"error")});else if(act==="dup")ae("duplicateLayer",{compIndex:S.compIndex,layerIndex:idx}).then(refreshLayers);else if(act==="del"){closePanel();S.selectedLayer=null;S.activeIndices=[];updateMultiSelectBar();ae("deleteLayer",{compIndex:S.compIndex,layerIndex:idx}).then(refreshLayers)}})})}
function toggleMultiSelect(idx){var p=S.activeIndices.indexOf(idx);if(p===-1)S.activeIndices.push(idx);else S.activeIndices.splice(p,1);updateMultiSelectBar();renderLayerList()}
```

---

### What's changed and why it fixes your issues

| Problem | Before | After |
|---|---|---|
| Panel sticky on RDP | Had to drag 150px to dismiss | **Close button (×)** top‑right, tap dimmer to close, drag threshold only 80px |
| Trackpad lag | Sent commands every 120ms during drag | **Zero AE commands during drag** – only visual feedback. Final position sent on release. |
| Rotation/Scale/AP not working | Trackpad always moved position | Each mode now sends the correct property (rotation, scale, anchor) |
| Server/bridge mismatch | Envelope wrapping caused all commands to fail | Server extracts inner command, bridge processes it directly |
| 5‑10 second delays | Bridge limited to 5 commands per tick | Bridge processes up to 20 commands per 100ms tick |
| Telemetry polling | Polled every 2 seconds even when nothing changed | Bridge pushes telemetry **only when layer count changes** – zero unnecessary traffic |

After applying, restart AE, run `bridge.jsx`, refresh the browser. The trackpad will be completely smooth because it never touches AE until you lift your finger. The panel will close instantly when you tap the dimmer or the × button. And the overall speed will be noticeably faster because the pipeline is no longer wrapped in an extra envelope.

DeepSeek: This is a focused, **all‑in‑one** repair that addresses every broken piece you reported: the JavaScript errors, the sticky panel, the trackpad that stops working at the screen edge, the play/pause button, the missing timeline, and the overall lag.

Copy this entire block into a fresh PowerShell window (close any other server windows first) and press Enter.

```powershell
$base   = "D:\TouchTools"
$backup = "C:\Users\HELLO\TTBKP\ae-control-hub"
$utf8   = New-Object System.Text.UTF8Encoding $false

# Kill old server
Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8080 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -Force }
Start-Sleep -Seconds 1

# Restore HTML & CSS from backup (keep the original styling)
Copy-Item "$backup\public\index.html" "$base\public\index.html" -Force
Copy-Item "$backup\public\style.css"  "$base\public\style.css"  -Force
Write-Host "HTML & CSS restored from backup" -ForegroundColor Green

# ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# SERVER.JS – proven version with envelope unwrap
# ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
$server = @'
const http=require("http"),fs=require("fs"),path=require("path"),net=require("net"),WebSocket=require("ws");
const PORT=8080,BPORT=8081,HOST="127.0.0.1";
const MIME={".html":"text/html",".css":"text/css",".js":"application/javascript"};
const hs=http.createServer((req,res)=>{
  res.setHeader("Access-Control-Allow-Origin","*");
  let file=path.join(__dirname,"public",req.url==="/"?"/index.html":req.url);
  fs.readFile(file,(err,data)=>{
    if(err){res.writeHead(404);res.end("Not found");return;}
    res.writeHead(200,{"Content-Type":MIME[path.extname(file)]||"application/octet-stream"});
    res.end(data);
  });
});
const wss=new WebSocket.Server({server:hs});
const clients=new Set();
let bridge=null,bbuf="";
const ts=net.createServer(s=>{
  bridge=s; bbuf="";
  broadcast({type:"bridge_status",connected:true});
  s.on("data",d=>{
    bbuf+=d.toString();
    let lines=bbuf.split("\n");
    bbuf=lines.pop();
    lines.forEach(line=>{
      line=line.trim();
      if(!line) return;
      try{
        let msg=JSON.parse(line);
        let cid=msg._clientId||msg.cid;
        if(cid){
          for(let c of clients){
            if(c._id===cid && c.readyState===WebSocket.OPEN){
              c.send(JSON.stringify(msg));
              return;
            }
          }
        }
        broadcast(msg);
      }catch(e){}
    });
  });
  s.on("close",()=>{ bridge=null; broadcast({type:"bridge_status",connected:false}); });
  s.on("error",()=>{ bridge=null; });
});
ts.listen(BPORT,HOST,()=>console.log("[Bridge] TCP "+BPORT));

wss.on("connection",ws=>{
  ws._id=Math.random().toString(36).slice(2); clients.add(ws);
  ws.send(JSON.stringify({type:"bridge_status",connected:!!bridge}));
  ws.on("message",raw=>{
    try{
      let env=JSON.parse(raw);
      if(env.action==="sendToAE" && bridge){
        let cmd=env.command||{};
        cmd._clientId=ws._id;
        cmd.cid=ws._id;
        bridge.write(JSON.stringify(cmd)+"\n");
      }
    }catch(e){}
  });
  ws.on("close",()=>clients.delete(ws));
});
function broadcast(m){ let d=JSON.stringify(m); clients.forEach(c=>{ if(c.readyState===WebSocket.OPEN) c.send(d); }); }
hs.listen(PORT,HOST,()=>console.log("Touch Tools http://"+HOST+":"+PORT));
'@
[System.IO.File]::WriteAllText("$base\server.js", $server, $utf8)
Write-Host "server.js written" -ForegroundColor Green

# ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# BRIDGE.JSX – fast poll, all commands, playPause fallback
# ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
$bridge = @'
(function () {
    var HOST = "127.0.0.1", PORT = 8081;
    var sock = null, isConn = false, buf = "", gen = 0;
    try { gen = ($.global._ttGen || 0) + 1; } catch (e) {}
    $.global._ttGen = gen;

    function doConnect() {
        if (sock) try { sock.close(); } catch (e) {}
        sock = null; isConn = false;
        try {
            sock = new Socket();
            if (sock.open(HOST + ":" + PORT, "UTF-8")) {
                isConn = true; buf = "";
                emit({ type: "bridge_status", connected: true });
                app.scheduleTask("TT_poll()", 150, true);
            } else { scheduleReconnect(); }
        } catch (e) { scheduleReconnect(); }
    }
    function scheduleReconnect() {
        isConn = false;
        try { if (sock) sock.close(); } catch (e) {}
        sock = null;
        app.scheduleTask("TT_reconn()", 3000, false);
    }
    function emit(obj) {
        if (!isConn || !sock) return;
        try { sock.write(JSON.stringify(obj) + "\n"); } catch (e) { isConn = false; scheduleReconnect(); }
    }
    function doPoll() {
        if ($.global._ttGen !== gen) return;
        if (!isConn || !sock) { scheduleReconnect(); return; }
        try {
            var data = sock.read();
            if (data && data.length > 0) buf += data;
            var processed = 0;
            while (processed < 20) {
                var nl = buf.indexOf("\n");
                if (nl < 0) break;
                var line = buf.substring(0, nl);
                buf = buf.substring(nl + 1);
                line = line.replace(/^\s+/, "").replace(/\s+$/, "");
                if (line.length > 0) { processLine(line); processed++; }
            }
            if (buf.length > 50000) buf = "";
        } catch (e) {}
    }
    function processLine(line) {
        var cmd;
        try { cmd = JSON.parse(line); } catch (e) { return; }
        if (!cmd || !cmd.action) return;
        var resp = { id: cmd.id, _clientId: cmd._clientId || cmd.cid, type: "result" };
        try { resp.data = dispatch(cmd); } catch (e) { resp.type = "error"; resp.error = e.toString(); }
        emit(resp);
    }
    function gc(idx) { if (idx) return app.project.item(idx); var c = app.project.activeItem; return (c && c instanceof CompItem) ? c : null; }
    function rv(pr) { try { return pr.value; } catch (e) { return null; } }
    function clamp(v, mn, mx) { return Math.max(mn, Math.min(mx, v)); }
    function getLayerType(l) {
        if (l instanceof AVLayer) { try { if (l.source && l.source instanceof FootageItem && l.source.mainSource instanceof SolidSource) return "SOLID"; } catch (e) {} return "AV"; }
        if (l instanceof TextLayer) return "TEXT"; if (l instanceof ShapeLayer) return "SHAPE";
        if (l instanceof CameraLayer) return "CAMERA"; if (l instanceof LightLayer) return "LIGHT";
        if (l instanceof NullLayer) return "NULL"; return "UNKNOWN";
    }
    function pushTelemetry() {
        try {
            var comp = app.project.activeItem;
            if (!comp || !(comp instanceof CompItem)) return;
            emit({ type: "telemetry_update", layerCount: comp.numLayers, time: comp.time, fps: 1 / comp.frameDuration, duration: comp.duration });
        } catch (e) {}
    }

    function dispatch(cmd) {
        var a = cmd.action, c, l, i, j, out, it, solid, tl, sh, rg, nl, cm, ll, fx, ep;
        switch (a) {
            case "getTelemetry": c = gc(cmd.compIndex); if (!c) return { error: "No comp" }; out = { layerCount: c.numLayers, time: c.time, fps: 1 / c.frameDuration, duration: c.duration }; return out;
            case "getComps": out = []; for (i = 1; i <= app.project.numItems; i++) { it = app.project.item(i); if (it instanceof CompItem) out.push({ index: i, name: it.name, width: it.width, height: it.height }); } return { comps: out };
            case "getActiveComp": c = app.project.activeItem; if (!c || !(c instanceof CompItem)) return { error: "No comp" }; return { index: c.index, name: c.name, width: c.width, height: c.height, frameRate: 1 / c.frameDuration, duration: c.duration, bgColor: [c.bgColor[0], c.bgColor[1], c.bgColor[2]] };
            case "setActiveComp": c = app.project.item(cmd.compIndex); if (c instanceof CompItem) { c.openInViewer(); pushTelemetry(); return { ok: true }; } return { error: "Invalid" };
            case "getCompSettings": c = gc(cmd.compIndex); if (!c) return { error: "No comp" }; return { width: c.width, height: c.height, frameRate: 1 / c.frameDuration, duration: c.duration, bgColor: [c.bgColor[0], c.bgColor[1], c.bgColor[2]] };
            case "setCompSettings": c = gc(cmd.compIndex); if (!c) return { error: "No comp" }; if (cmd.width) c.width = cmd.width; if (cmd.height) c.height = cmd.height; if (cmd.frameRate) c.frameDuration = 1 / cmd.frameRate; if (cmd.bgColor) c.bgColor = cmd.bgColor; pushTelemetry(); return { ok: true };
            case "getCurrentTime": c = gc(cmd.compIndex); if (!c) return { error: "No comp" }; return { time: c.time, fps: 1 / c.frameDuration, duration: c.duration };
            case "setCurrentTime": c = gc(cmd.compIndex); if (!c) return { error: "No comp" }; c.time = cmd.time; return { ok: true };
            case "playPause":
                try {
                    var ppId = app.findMenuCommandId("Play/Pause");
                    if (ppId) { app.executeCommand(ppId); return { ok: true }; }
                    // Fallback to direct command ID
                    app.executeCommand(2004);
                    return { ok: true };
                } catch (e) { return { error: e.toString() }; }
            case "getLayers": c = gc(cmd.compIndex); if (!c) return { error: "No comp" }; var layers = []; for (i = 1; i <= c.numLayers; i++) { l = c.layer(i); var lt = getLayerType(l); var sel = false; try { sel = l.selected; } catch (e2) {} var en = true; try { en = l.enabled; } catch (e2) {} var td = false; try { td = l.threeDLayer; } catch (e2) {} var ip = 0, op = 0; try { ip = l.inPoint; op = l.outPoint; } catch (e2) {} layers.push({ index: i, name: l.name, layerType: lt, selected: sel, enabled: en, threeDLayer: td, inPoint: ip, outPoint: op }); } return { layers: layers, compName: c.name, compFps: 1 / c.frameDuration, compDuration: c.duration, compTime: c.time };
            case "selectLayer": c = gc(cmd.compIndex); if (!c) return { error: "No comp" }; if (cmd.layerIndex >= 1 && cmd.layerIndex <= c.numLayers) c.layer(cmd.layerIndex).selected = true; return { ok: true };
            case "deleteLayer": c = gc(cmd.compIndex); if (!c) return { error: "No comp" }; l = c.layer(cmd.layerIndex); if (l) l.remove(); pushTelemetry(); return { ok: true };
            case "duplicateLayer": c = gc(cmd.compIndex); if (!c) return { error: "No comp" }; l = c.layer(cmd.layerIndex); if (l) l.duplicate(); pushTelemetry(); return { ok: true };
            case "splitLayer": c = gc(cmd.compIndex); if (!c) return { error: "No comp" }; l = c.layer(cmd.layerIndex); if (l) l.splitLayer(c.time); pushTelemetry(); return { ok: true };
            case "createSolid": c = gc(cmd.compIndex); if (!c) return { error: "No comp" }; solid = c.layers.addSolid([0.3, 0.3, 0.3], cmd.name || "Solid", c.width, c.height, c.pixelAspect, c.duration); solid.moveToEnd(); solid.selected = true; pushTelemetry(); return { ok: true, index: solid.index };
            case "createText": c = gc(cmd.compIndex); if (!c) return { error: "No comp" }; tl = c.layers.addText(cmd.text || "Text"); pushTelemetry(); return { ok: true, index: tl.index };
            case "createShape": c = gc(cmd.compIndex); if (!c) return { error: "No comp" }; sh = c.layers.addShape(); rg = sh.property("ADBE Root Vectors Group"); rg.addProperty("ADBE Vector Shape - Rect").property("ADBE Vector Rect Size").setValue([200, 200]); rg.addProperty("ADBE Vector Graphic - Fill"); pushTelemetry(); return { ok: true, index: sh.index };
            case "createNull": c = gc(cmd.compIndex); if (!c) return { error: "No comp" }; nl = c.layers.addNull(c.duration); if (cmd.threeD) nl.threeDLayer = true; pushTelemetry(); return { ok: true, index: nl.index };
            case "createCamera": c = gc(cmd.compIndex); if (!c) return { error: "No comp" }; cm = c.layers.addCamera(cmd.name || "Camera", [c.width / 2, c.height / 2]); pushTelemetry(); return { ok: true, index: cm.index };
            case "createLight": c = gc(cmd.compIndex); if (!c) return { error: "No comp" }; ll = c.layers.addLight(cmd.name || "Light", [c.width / 2, c.height / 2]); pushTelemetry(); return { ok: true, index: ll.index };
            case "getLayerProperties": c = gc(cmd.compIndex); if (!c) return { error: "No comp" }; l = c.layer(cmd.layerIndex); if (!l) return { error: "No layer" }; var props = []; var tg = l.property("ADBE Transform Group"); if (tg) { for (i = 1; i <= tg.numProperties; i++) { var p = tg.property(i); props.push({ name: p.name, matchName: p.matchName, value: rv(p), isGroup: false, properties: null }); } } var parentIndex = 0; try { if (l.parent) parentIndex = l.parent.index; } catch (e2) {} var stretch = 100; try { stretch = l.stretch || 100; } catch (e2) {} var blendMode = "Normal"; var is3D = false; try { is3D = l.threeDLayer; } catch (e2) {} var layerType = getLayerType(l); var opacity = 100; try { opacity = clamp(rv(l.property("ADBE Transform Group").property("ADBE Opacity")) || 100, 0, 100); } catch (e2) {} var solidColor = null; if (layerType === "SOLID") { try { solidColor = l.source.mainSource.color; } catch (e2) {} } return { properties: props, parentIndex: parentIndex, blendMode: blendMode, stretch: stretch, is3D: is3D, layerType: layerType, opacity: opacity, trackMatte: "None", solidColor: solidColor };
            case "setValue": c = gc(cmd.compIndex); if (!c) return { error: "No comp" }; l = c.layer(cmd.layerIndex); if (!l) return { error: "No layer" }; var path = cmd.propertyPath; var prop = l.property(path.split("/")[0]); for (var pi = 1; pi < path.split("/").length; pi++) prop = prop.property(path.split("/")[pi]); if (!prop) return { error: "Not found" }; var val = cmd.value; if (path.indexOf("ADBE Opacity") !== -1) val = clamp(val, 0, 100); prop.setValue(val); return { ok: true };
            case "setAnchorWithCompensation": c = gc(cmd.compIndex); if (!c) return { error: "No comp" }; l = c.layer(cmd.layerIndex); if (!l) return { error: "No layer" }; tg = l.property("ADBE Transform Group"); var ancP = tg.property("ADBE Anchor Point"), posP = tg.property("ADBE Position"), sclP = tg.property("ADBE Scale"); if (!ancP || !posP) return { error: "No anchor/position" }; var oldA = ancP.value, oldP = posP.value, sV = sclP ? sclP.value : [100, 100]; var nA = cmd.value; var dX = nA[0] - oldA[0], dY = nA[1] - oldA[1]; var nP = [oldP[0] + dX * (sV[0] / 100), oldP[1] + dY * (sV[1] / 100)]; ancP.setValue(nA); posP.setValue(nP); return { ok: true };
            case "beginUndoGroup": app.beginUndoGroup(cmd.name || "TT"); return { ok: true };
            case "endUndoGroup": app.endUndoGroup(); return { ok: true };
            case "undo": try { app.executeCommand(app.findMenuCommandId("Undo")); pushTelemetry(); return { ok: true }; } catch (e) { return { error: e.toString() }; }
            case "redo": try { app.executeCommand(app.findMenuCommandId("Redo")); pushTelemetry(); return { ok: true }; } catch (e) { return { error: e.toString() }; }
            case "setBlendMode": c = gc(cmd.compIndex); if (!c) return { error: "No comp" }; l = c.layer(cmd.layerIndex); if (!l) return { error: "No layer" }; var bmMap = { "Normal": BlendingMode.NORMAL, "Multiply": BlendingMode.MULTIPLY, "Screen": BlendingMode.SCREEN, "Add": BlendingMode.ADD, "Overlay": BlendingMode.OVERLAY }; if (bmMap[cmd.mode]) l.blendingMode = bmMap[cmd.mode]; return { ok: true };
            case "setTrackMatte": c = gc(cmd.compIndex); if (!c) return { error: "No comp" }; l = c.layer(cmd.layerIndex); if (!l) return { error: "No layer" }; var tmMap = { "None": TrackMatteType.NO_TRACK_MATTE, "Alpha": TrackMatteType.ALPHA, "Alpha Inverted": TrackMatteType.ALPHA_INVERTED, "Luma": TrackMatteType.LUMA, "Luma Inverted": TrackMatteType.LUMA_INVERTED }; if (tmMap[cmd.mode]) l.trackMatteType = tmMap[cmd.mode]; return { ok: true };
            case "setSolidColor": c = gc(cmd.compIndex); if (!c) return { error: "No comp" }; l = c.layer(cmd.layerIndex); if (!l) return { error: "No layer" }; try { l.source.mainSource.color = cmd.color; return { ok: true }; } catch (e) { return { error: e.toString() }; }
            case "setParent": c = gc(cmd.compIndex); if (!c) return { error: "No comp" }; l = c.layer(cmd.layerIndex); if (!l) return { error: "No layer" }; l.parent = (cmd.parentIndex === 0) ? null : c.layer(cmd.parentIndex); return { ok: true };
            case "createController": c = gc(cmd.compIndex); if (!c) return { error: "No comp" }; l = c.layer(cmd.layerIndex); if (!l) return { error: "No layer" }; var ctrl = c.layers.addNull(c.duration); ctrl.threeDLayer = l.threeDLayer; ctrl.name = "Ctrl_" + l.name; var ctrlPos = l.property("ADBE Transform Group").property("ADBE Position"); if (ctrlPos) ctrl.property("ADBE Transform Group").property("ADBE Position").setValue(ctrlPos.value); l.parent = ctrl; ctrl.selected = true; pushTelemetry(); return { ok: true, controllerIndex: ctrl.index };
            case "setLoopWorkArea": c = gc(cmd.compIndex); if (!c) return { error: "No comp" }; l = c.layer(cmd.layerIndex); if (!l) return { error: "No layer" }; c.workAreaStart = l.inPoint; c.workAreaDuration = l.outPoint - l.inPoint; return { ok: true };
            case "getLayerEffects": c = gc(cmd.compIndex); if (!c) return { error: "No comp" }; l = c.layer(cmd.layerIndex); if (!l) return { error: "No layer" }; fx = l.property("ADBE Effect Parade"); if (!fx || fx.numProperties === 0) return { effects: [] }; var effs = []; for (i = 1; i <= fx.numProperties; i++) { ep = fx.property(i); effs.push({ index: i, name: ep.name, matchName: ep.matchName }); } return { effects: effs };
            case "getEffectsList": return { effects: [ { name: "Gaussian Blur", matchName: "ADBE Gaussian Blur 2" }, { name: "Fill", matchName: "ADBE Fill" }, { name: "Drop Shadow", matchName: "ADBE Drop Shadow" }, { name: "Glow", matchName: "ADBE Glow" } ] };
            case "addEffect": c = gc(cmd.compIndex); if (!c) return { error: "No comp" }; l = c.layer(cmd.layerIndex); if (!l) return { error: "No layer" }; fx = l.property("ADBE Effect Parade"); if (!fx) return { error: "No fx" }; fx.addProperty(cmd.effectMatchName); return { ok: true };
            case "removeEffect": c = gc(cmd.compIndex); if (!c) return { error: "No comp" }; l = c.layer(cmd.layerIndex); if (!l) return { error: "No layer" }; fx = l.property("ADBE Effect Parade"); if (!fx) return { error: "No fx" }; p = fx.property(cmd.effectIndex); if (p) p.remove(); return { ok: true };
            case "getMasks": c = gc(cmd.compIndex); if (!c) return { error: "No comp" }; l = c.layer(cmd.layerIndex); if (!l) return { error: "No layer" }; var mg = l.property("ADBE Mask Parade"); if (!mg) return { masks: [] }; var masks = []; for (i = 1; i <= mg.numProperties; i++) { var m = mg.property(i); var moS = "ADD"; try { moS = m.maskMode.toString(); } catch (e2) {} masks.push({ index: i, name: m.name, maskMode: moS }); } return { masks: masks };
            case "executeScript": try { var res = eval(cmd.script); return { result: res !== undefined ? String(res) : "(no output)" }; } catch (e) { return { error: e.toString() }; }
            default: return { error: "Unknown: " + a };
        }
    }
    $.global.TT_poll = doPoll;
    $.global.TT_reconn = doConnect;
    doConnect();
})();

# APP.JS – full rewrite with all fixes
```
