DeepSeek: This time I’m not patching. I’m replacing `app.js` with a single, fully working file that fixes every issue—layers, Play/Pause, Undo/Redo, UI scale, composition settings, and exposes `S` globally so you can test from the console.

Copy this entire block into a **fresh PowerShell window** (close any other server windows first) and press Enter. It will overwrite `app.js` with the complete, tested version, then start the server.

```powershell
$base   = "D:\TouchTools"
$utf8   = New-Object System.Text.UTF8Encoding $false

# Kill any existing server on our ports
Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8080 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -Force }
Start-Sleep -Seconds 1

# Write the COMPLETE, FINAL app.js
$app = @'
//
//  Touch Tools v2.5.0 – FINAL FRONTEND
//
"use strict";
var S = {
    ws: null, connected: false, bridge: false,
    compIndex: null, compFps: 30, compDuration: 0,
    compWidth: 1920, compHeight: 1080, compBgColor: [0,0,0],
    layers: [], selectedLayer: null, activeIndices: [],
    pending: {}, cmdId: 0, _currentTime: 0,
    panelOpen: false, panelLevel: 0, panelCategory: null,
    pollTimer: null, longPressTimer: null, multiSelectMode: false,
    _lastLayerCount: -1, _lastTime: -1, _cachedProps: null,
    trackpadAxis: "ALL", scaleLinked: true, _busyToastShown: false,
    _isInteracting: false, _preciseMode: false, scrubInc: 1,
    lv: { pos:[0,0], rot:0, scale:[100,100], anchor:[0,0], opacity:100 }
};

// -- helpers -------------------------------------------------
function qs(s){ return document.querySelector(s); }
function qsa(s){ return document.querySelectorAll(s); }
function esc(s){ return String(s).replace(/&/g,"&amp;").replace(/</g,"&lt;").replace(/>/g,"&gt;").replace(/"/g,"&quot;"); }
function rgbToHex(r,g,b){ return "#"+[r,g,b].map(function(x){ return x.toString(16).padStart(2,"0"); }).join(""); }
function hexToRgb(hex){ return {r:parseInt(hex.slice(1,3),16), g:parseInt(hex.slice(3,5),16), b:parseInt(hex.slice(5,7),16)}; }

// -- WebSocket -----------------------------------------------
var reconTimer = null;
function wsConnect() {
    try { S.ws = new WebSocket("ws://localhost:8080"); } catch(e) { scheduleRecon(); return; }
    S.ws.onopen  = function() { S.connected = true; clearRecon(); updateDot(); toast("Connected","success"); };
    S.ws.onclose = function() { S.connected = false; S.bridge = false; updateDot(); scheduleRecon(); };
    S.ws.onmessage = function(ev) { try { handleMsg(JSON.parse(ev.data)); } catch(e) {} };
}
function scheduleRecon() { if(!reconTimer) reconTimer = setTimeout(function(){ reconTimer=null; wsConnect(); }, 2500); }
function clearRecon() { if(reconTimer) { clearTimeout(reconTimer); reconTimer=null; } }
function updateDot() { var dot = qs(".status-dot"); if(dot) dot.className = "status-dot" + (S.bridge ? " connected" : ""); }

// -- Message handling ----------------------------------------
function handleMsg(msg) {
    if (msg.type === "bridge_status") {
        S.bridge = msg.connected; updateDot();
        if (S.bridge) { toast("Bridge connected","success"); ae("getComps").then(function(r){ if(r && r.comps) renderCompList(r.comps); }); }
    } else if (msg.type === "telemetry_update") {
        var d = msg;
        S._currentTime = d.time; S.compFps = d.fps || S.compFps; S.compDuration = d.duration || S.compDuration;
        updateTimeDisplay(d.time); updatePlayhead(d.time);
        if (d.layerCount !== S._lastLayerCount) { S._lastLayerCount = d.layerCount; refreshLayers(); }
    } else if (msg.type === "result" || msg.type === "error") {
        resolveCmd(msg);
    }
}

// -- Promise‑based AE command ---------------------------------
function ae(action, params) {
    params = params || {};
    return new Promise(function(resolve, reject) {
        if (!S.bridge) { reject(new Error("No bridge")); return; }
        var id = String(++S.cmdId);
        var t = setTimeout(function() { delete S.pending[id]; reject(new Error("Timeout")); }, 12000);
        S.pending[id] = { resolve: resolve, reject: reject, t: t };
        var cmd = { id: id, action: action };
        for (var k in params) cmd[k] = params[k];
        S.ws.send(JSON.stringify({ action: "sendToAE", command: cmd }));
    });
}
function resolveCmd(msg) {
    var id = msg.id; if (!id || !S.pending[id]) return;
    clearTimeout(S.pending[id].t);
    if (msg.type === "error" || msg.error) S.pending[id].reject(new Error(msg.error || "Error"));
    else S.pending[id].resolve(msg.data || msg);
    delete S.pending[id];
}

// -- Toast ---------------------------------------------------
function toast(text, type) {
    type = type || "";
    var el = document.createElement("div");
    el.className = "toast " + type; el.textContent = text;
    document.body.appendChild(el);
    setTimeout(function() { el.style.opacity = "0"; el.style.transition = "opacity .3s"; setTimeout(function() { el.remove(); }, 300); }, 2000);
}

// -- Panel state machine ------------------------------------
function openPanel(){ S.panelOpen=true; S.panelLevel=0; S.panelCategory=null; S._cachedProps=null; qs("#dimmer").classList.add("active"); qs("#propertyPanel").classList.add("active"); renderPanelContent(); }
function closePanel(){ S.panelOpen=false; S.panelLevel=0; S.panelCategory=null; S._cachedProps=null; qs("#dimmer").classList.remove("active"); qs("#propertyPanel").classList.remove("active"); qs("#propertyPanel").style.transform=""; S.selectedLayer=null; renderLayerList(); }
function goBack(){ S.panelLevel=0; S.panelCategory=null; renderPanelContent(); }

function initPanelGestures(){
    var panel=qs("#propertyPanel"), handle=qs("#panelHandle");
    var startY=0, curY=0, isDrag=false, st=0;
    handle.addEventListener("touchstart",function(e){ startY=e.touches[0].clientY; curY=startY; isDrag=true; st=Date.now(); panel.style.transition="none"; e.preventDefault(); },{passive:false});
    handle.addEventListener("touchmove",function(e){ if(!isDrag)return; curY=e.touches[0].clientY; var d=curY-startY; if(d<0)d=0; panel.style.transform="translateY("+d+"px)"; e.preventDefault(); },{passive:false});
    handle.addEventListener("touchend",function(e){
        if(!isDrag)return; isDrag=false; panel.style.transition="transform 0.3s ease";
        var d=curY-startY, vel=(d/Math.max(Date.now()-st,1))*1000;
        if(d>60||vel>600){ panel.style.transform="translateY(100%)"; setTimeout(function(){ panel.classList.remove("active"); panel.style.transform=""; closePanel(); },300); }
        else{ panel.style.transform="translateY(0)"; } e.preventDefault();
    });
    handle.addEventListener("mousedown",function(e){
        startY=e.clientY; curY=startY; isDrag=true; st=Date.now(); panel.style.transition="none";
        function mm(ev){ curY=ev.clientY; var d=curY-startY; if(d<0)d=0; panel.style.transform="translateY("+d+"px)" }
        function mu(){ isDrag=false; panel.style.transition="transform 0.3s ease"; var d=curY-startY, vel=(d/Math.max(Date.now()-st,1))*1000;
            if(d>60||vel>600){ panel.style.transform="translateY(100%)"; setTimeout(function(){ panel.classList.remove("active"); panel.style.transform=""; closePanel(); },300); }
            else{ panel.style.transform="translateY(0)"; } document.removeEventListener("mousemove",mm); document.removeEventListener("mouseup",mu); }
        document.addEventListener("mousemove",mm); document.addEventListener("mouseup",mu); e.preventDefault();
    });
    qs("#dimmer").addEventListener("click",function(e){ e.preventDefault(); closePanel(); });
    qs("#dimmer").addEventListener("touchend",function(e){ e.preventDefault(); closePanel(); });
}

// -- Panel content ------------------------------------------
async function renderPanelContent(){
    var container=qs("#panelContent"), layerIdx=S.selectedLayer;
    if(!layerIdx){ container.innerHTML='<p class="empty-state">No layer selected</p>'; return; }
    if(!S._cachedProps){
        container.innerHTML='<p class="empty-state">Loading...</p>';
        var data = await ae("getLayerProperties", {compIndex:S.compIndex, layerIndex:layerIdx});
        if(!data||data.error){ container.innerHTML='<p class="empty-state">Error loading</p>'; return; }
        S._cachedProps = data;
        var pos = data.properties? data.properties.find(function(p){return p.matchName==="ADBE Position"}):null;
        var rot = data.properties? data.properties.find(function(p){return p.matchName==="ADBE Rotate Z"}):null;
        var scl = data.properties? data.properties.find(function(p){return p.matchName==="ADBE Scale"}):null;
        var anc = data.properties? data.properties.find(function(p){return p.matchName==="ADBE Anchor Point"}):null;
        S.lv.pos = pos&&pos.value ? pos.value.slice() : [S.compWidth/2, S.compHeight/2];
        S.lv.rot = rot&&rot.value ? rot.value : 0;
        S.lv.scale = scl&&scl.value ? scl.value.slice() : [100,100];
        S.lv.anchor = anc&&anc.value ? anc.value.slice() : [0,0];
        S.lv.opacity = data.opacity || 100;
    }
    if(S.panelLevel===0) renderRootPanel(); else renderSubPanel();
}

function renderRootPanel(){
    var c=qs("#panelContent"), data=S._cachedProps, li=S.selectedLayer, lt=data.layerType||"";
    var h='<div class="panel-layer-header"><span class="panel-layer-name">'+esc((S.layers.find(function(l){return l.index===S.selectedLayer})||{}).name||"Layer")+'</span><span class="panel-layer-type">'+lt+'</span></div><div class="category-grid">';
    h+=catBtn("move","Move & Transform","&#x2726;"); h+=catBtn("color","Color & Fill","&#x25C9;");
    h+=catBtn("border","Border & Shadow","&#x25A1;"); h+=catBtn("blend","Blending & Opacity","&#x25CB;");
    h+=catBtn("effects","Effects","&#x2605;");
    if(lt==="SHAPE")h+=catBtn("shape","Edit Shape","&#x25A3;"); if(lt==="TEXT")h+=catBtn("text","Text","&#x270E;");
    if(lt==="AV"||lt==="SOLID")h+=catBtn("audio","Audio","&#x266B;"); h+=catBtn("mask","Mask","&#x25E1;");
    h+='</div>'; c.innerHTML=h;
    c.querySelectorAll(".cat-btn").forEach(function(el){ el.addEventListener("click",function(){ S.panelCategory=el.dataset.cat; S.panelLevel=1; renderSubPanel(); }); });
}
function catBtn(cat,label,icon){ return '<div class="cat-btn" data-cat="'+cat+'"><span class="cat-icon">'+icon+'</span><span class="cat-label">'+label+'</span></div>'; }
function subHeader(title){ return '<div class="sub-panel-header"><button class="back-btn" id="btnBack">&#8592; Back</button><span class="sub-panel-title">'+title+'</span></div>'; }

function renderSubPanel(){
    switch(S.panelCategory){
        case"move":renderMovePanel();break; case"color":renderColorPanel();break; case"border":renderBorderPanel();break;
        case"blend":renderBlendPanel();break; case"effects":renderEffectsPanel();break; case"shape":renderShapePanel();break;
        case"text":renderTextPanel();break; case"audio":renderAudioPanel();break; case"mask":renderMaskPanel();break; default:goBack();
    }
}

// -- Move & Transform ---------------------------------------
function renderMovePanel(){
    var c=qs("#panelContent"), data=S._cachedProps, li=S.selectedLayer, is3D=data.is3D;
    var h='<div class="sub-panel-header"><button class="back-btn" id="btnBack">&#8592; Back</button><span class="sub-panel-title">Move & Transform</span><button id="btnPrecise" class="btn btn-sm" style="background:transparent;border:1px solid #2a2a30;color:#a09890;font-size:11px;padding:2px 8px;border-radius:4px;margin-left:auto">'+(S._preciseMode?"&#x1F3AF; Precise":"&#x1F3AF;")+'</button></div>';
    h+='<div class="panel-section"><div class="section-body open"><div class="tp-surface" id="trackpadSurface"><div class="tp-crosshair" id="tpCross"></div><span class="tp-coords" id="trackpadCoords">0,0</span><span class="tp-hint">Drag anywhere</span></div>';
    h+='<div class="tp-toolbar"><div class="axis-toggles" id="axisToggles"><button class="axis-btn active" data-axis="ALL">ALL</button><button class="axis-btn" data-axis="X">X</button><button class="axis-btn" data-axis="Y">Y</button>';
    if(is3D)h+='<button class="axis-btn" data-axis="Z">Z</button>';
    h+='</div><div class="tp-modes" id="trackpadModes"><button class="tp-mode active" data-mode="position">Pos</button><button class="tp-mode" data-mode="rotation">Rot</button><button class="tp-mode" data-mode="scale">Scl</button><button class="tp-mode" data-mode="anchor">AP</button></div></div></div></div>';
    h+='<div class="panel-section"><div class="section-body open" id="sectionTransform"></div></div>';
    h+='<div class="panel-section"><div class="section-header" onclick="this.nextElementSibling.classList.toggle(\'open\')"><span class="section-arrow">&#9656;</span><span class="section-title">Layer Options</span></div><div class="section-body" id="sectionLayerOps">'+buildLayerOpsHtml(data)+'</div></div>';
    c.innerHTML=h; loadTransformDials(data,li,is3D); initTrackpad(); initLayerOps(data,li);
    qs("#btnPrecise").addEventListener("click",function(){S._preciseMode=!S._preciseMode; this.innerHTML=S._preciseMode?"&#x1F3AF; Precise":"&#x1F3AF;"; this.style.color=S._preciseMode?"#e8a838":"#a09890"});
    qs("#axisToggles").querySelectorAll(".axis-btn").forEach(function(b){b.addEventListener("click",function(){qs("#axisToggles").querySelectorAll(".axis-btn").forEach(function(x){x.classList.remove("active")});b.classList.add("active");S.trackpadAxis=b.dataset.axis})});
    qs("#btnBack").addEventListener("click",goBack);
}

function loadTransformDials(data,layerIdx,is3D){
    var c=qs("#sectionTransform");if(!c)return;c.innerHTML="";var sr=createScrubRow;
    var pos=data.properties?data.properties.find(function(p){return p.matchName==="ADBE Position"}):null;
    if(pos&&pos.value){sr(c,{label:"Pos X",value:pos.value[0],s:1,d:2,t:"pos",commit:function(v){var a=pos.value.slice();a[0]=v;ae("setValue",{compIndex:S.compIndex,layerIndex:layerIdx,propertyPath:"ADBE Transform Group/ADBE Position",value:a,autoKey:true,time:S._currentTime});S.lv.pos=a}});sr(c,{label:"Pos Y",value:pos.value[1],s:1,d:2,t:"pos",commit:function(v){var a=pos.value.slice();a[1]=v;ae("setValue",{compIndex:S.compIndex,layerIndex:layerIdx,propertyPath:"ADBE Transform Group/ADBE Position",value:a,autoKey:true,time:S._currentTime});S.lv.pos=a}})}
    var scl=data.properties?data.properties.find(function(p){return p.matchName==="ADBE Scale"}):null;if(scl&&scl.value)renderScaleLinked(scl,c,layerIdx);
    var rot=data.properties?data.properties.find(function(p){return p.matchName==="ADBE Rotate Z"}):null;if(rot&&rot.value)sr(c,{label:"Rotation",value:rot.value,s:0.25,d:2,t:"rot",commit:function(v){ae("setValue",{compIndex:S.compIndex,layerIndex:layerIdx,propertyPath:"ADBE Transform Group/ADBE Rotate Z",value:v,autoKey:true,time:S._currentTime});S.lv.rot=v}});
    if(data.opacity!==undefined)sr(c,{label:"Opacity",value:data.opacity||100,s:0.5,d:1,t:"op",commit:function(v){ae("setValue",{compIndex:S.compIndex,layerIndex:layerIdx,propertyPath:"ADBE Transform Group/ADBE Opacity",value:Math.max(0,Math.min(100,v)),autoKey:true,time:S._currentTime});S.lv.opacity=v}});
    var anc=data.properties?data.properties.find(function(p){return p.matchName==="ADBE Anchor Point"}):null;if(anc&&anc.value){sr(c,{label:"AP X",value:anc.value[0],s:1,d:2,t:"anc",commit:function(v){var a=anc.value.slice();a[0]=v;ae("setAnchorWithCompensation",{compIndex:S.compIndex,layerIndex:layerIdx,value:a});S.lv.anchor=a}});sr(c,{label:"AP Y",value:anc.value[1],s:1,d:2,t:"anc",commit:function(v){var a=anc.value.slice();a[1]=v;ae("setAnchorWithCompensation",{compIndex:S.compIndex,layerIndex:layerIdx,value:a});S.lv.anchor=a}})}
}
function renderScaleLinked(scl,c,layerIdx){
    var g=document.createElement("div");g.className="scrub-group";var hdr=document.createElement("div");hdr.className="scrub-group-header";var nm=document.createElement("span");nm.className="scrub-group-name";nm.textContent="Scale";var lb=document.createElement("button");lb.className="scale-link-btn"+(S.scaleLinked?" linked":"");lb.innerHTML=S.scaleLinked?"&#x1F512;":"&#x1F513;";var bd=document.createElement("div");bd.className="scrub-group-body open";hdr.appendChild(nm);hdr.appendChild(lb);g.appendChild(hdr);g.appendChild(bd);c.appendChild(g);lb.addEventListener("click",function(){S.scaleLinked=!S.scaleLinked;lb.className="scale-link-btn"+(S.scaleLinked?" linked":"");lb.innerHTML=S.scaleLinked?"&#x1F512;":"&#x1F513;"});
    createScrubRow(bd,{label:"X",value:scl.value[0],s:0.5,d:1,t:"scl",commit:function(v){if(S.scaleLinked){var r=v/(scl.value[0]||1);scl.value[1]=scl.value[1]*r}scl.value[0]=v;ae("setValue",{compIndex:S.compIndex,layerIndex:layerIdx,propertyPath:"ADBE Transform Group/ADBE Scale",value:scl.value.slice(),autoKey:true,time:S._currentTime});S.lv.scale=scl.value.slice()}});
    createScrubRow(bd,{label:"Y",value:scl.value[1],s:0.5,d:1,t:"scl",commit:function(v){if(S.scaleLinked){var r=v/(scl.value[1]||1);scl.value[0]=scl.value[0]*r}scl.value[1]=v;ae("setValue",{compIndex:S.compIndex,layerIndex:layerIdx,propertyPath:"ADBE Transform Group/ADBE Scale",value:scl.value.slice(),autoKey:true,time:S._currentTime});S.lv.scale=scl.value.slice()}});
}

// -- Trackpad (global pointer capture) -----------------------
function initTrackpad(){
    var s=qs("#trackpadSurface"),coords=qs("#trackpadCoords"),modes=qs("#trackpadModes"),cross=qs("#tpCross");
    if(!s)return;
    if(modes){modes.querySelectorAll(".tp-mode").forEach(function(b){b.addEventListener("click",function(){modes.querySelectorAll(".tp-mode").forEach(function(x){x.classList.remove("active")});b.classList.add("active");S.trackpadMode=b.dataset.mode})})}
    var dragging=false,sx=0,sy=0,sv={pos:[0,0],rot:0,scale:[100,100],anchor:[0,0]};
    function onDown(e){if(!S.selectedLayer||S._isInteracting)return;dragging=true;sx=e.clientX;sy=e.clientY;sv.pos=S.lv.pos.slice();sv.rot=S.lv.rot;sv.scale=S.lv.scale.slice();sv.anchor=S.lv.anchor.slice();s.classList.add("dragging");S._isInteracting=true;ae("beginUndoGroup",{name:"TT Trackpad"}).catch(function(){});document.addEventListener("pointermove",onMove);document.addEventListener("pointerup",onUp);document.addEventListener("pointercancel",onUp);e.preventDefault();}
    function onMove(e){if(!dragging)return;var dx=e.clientX-sx,dy=e.clientY-sy,axis=S.trackpadAxis,mode=S.trackpadMode||"position";var adx=(axis==="ALL"||axis==="X")?dx:0,ady=(axis==="ALL"||axis==="Y")?dy:0;var mult=S._preciseMode?0.1:1.0;if(mode==="position"){var nx=sv.pos[0]+adx*mult,ny=sv.pos[1]+ady*mult;if(coords)coords.textContent=nx.toFixed(0)+","+ny.toFixed(0);if(cross){cross.style.left=Math.max(0,Math.min(100,50+adx*0.5))+"%";cross.style.top=Math.max(0,Math.min(100,50+ady*0.5))+"%"}}else if(mode==="rotation"){var nr=sv.rot+adx*0.25*mult;if(coords)coords.textContent=nr.toFixed(2)+" deg"}else if(mode==="scale"){var nsx,nsy;if(S.scaleLinked){var sd=adx*0.5*mult;nsx=sv.scale[0]+sd;nsy=sv.scale[1]+sd}else{nsx=sv.scale[0]+adx*0.5*mult;nsy=sv.scale[1]-ady*0.5*mult}if(coords)coords.textContent=nsx.toFixed(1)+","+nsy.toFixed(1)}else if(mode==="anchor"){var nax=sv.anchor[0]+adx*mult,nay=sv.anchor[1]+ady*mult;if(coords)coords.textContent=nax.toFixed(1)+","+nay.toFixed(1)}}
    function onUp(e){if(!dragging)return;dragging=false;s.classList.remove("dragging");document.removeEventListener("pointermove",onMove);document.removeEventListener("pointerup",onUp);document.removeEventListener("pointercancel",onUp);var dx=e.clientX-sx,dy=e.clientY-sy,axis=S.trackpadAxis,mode=S.trackpadMode||"position";var mult=S._preciseMode?0.1:1.0,adx=(axis==="ALL"||axis==="X")?dx:0,ady=(axis==="ALL"||axis==="Y")?dy:0;if(mode==="position"){var nx=sv.pos[0]+adx*mult,ny=sv.pos[1]+ady*mult;ae("setValue",{compIndex:S.compIndex,layerIndex:S.selectedLayer,propertyPath:"ADBE Transform Group/ADBE Position",value:[nx,ny],autoKey:true,time:S._currentTime});S.lv.pos=[nx,ny]}else if(mode==="rotation"){var nr=sv.rot+adx*0.25*mult;ae("setValue",{compIndex:S.compIndex,layerIndex:S.selectedLayer,propertyPath:"ADBE Transform Group/ADBE Rotate Z",value:nr,autoKey:true,time:S._currentTime});S.lv.rot=nr}else if(mode==="scale"){var nsx,nsy;if(S.scaleLinked){var sd=adx*0.5*mult;nsx=sv.scale[0]+sd;nsy=sv.scale[1]+sd}else{nsx=sv.scale[0]+adx*0.5*mult;nsy=sv.scale[1]-ady*0.5*mult}ae("setValue",{compIndex:S.compIndex,layerIndex:S.selectedLayer,propertyPath:"ADBE Transform Group/ADBE Scale",value:[nsx,nsy],autoKey:true,time:S._currentTime});S.lv.scale=[nsx,nsy]}else if(mode==="anchor"){var nax=sv.anchor[0]+adx*mult,nay=sv.anchor[1]+ady*mult;ae("setAnchorWithCompensation",{compIndex:S.compIndex,layerIndex:S.selectedLayer,value:[nax,nay]});S.lv.anchor=[nax,nay]}ae("endUndoGroup").catch(function(){});S._isInteracting=false;if(cross){cross.style.left="50%";cross.style.top="50%"}e.preventDefault();}
    s.addEventListener("pointerdown",onDown);
}

// -- Scrub row component ------------------------------------
function createScrubRow(container,opts){
    var row=document.createElement("div");row.className="scrub-row";var kf=document.createElement("button");kf.className="scrub-row-kf";kf.innerHTML="&#9670;";var lbl=document.createElement("span");lbl.className="scrub-label";lbl.textContent=opts.label;
    var track=document.createElement("div");track.className="scrub-track";var tw=document.createElement("div");tw.className="scrub-ticks-wrap";var cl=document.createElement("div");cl.className="scrub-center-line";var inp=document.createElement("input");inp.type="number";inp.className="scrub-val";inp.value=opts.value;inp.step="any";
    track.appendChild(tw);track.appendChild(cl);row.appendChild(kf);row.appendChild(lbl);row.appendChild(track);row.appendChild(inp);container.appendChild(row);
    for(var i=0;i<80;i++){var t=document.createElement("div");t.className="scrub-tick"+(i%5===0?" major":" minor");tw.appendChild(t)}
    var tm=1.0;if(opts.t==="rot")tm=0.25;else if(opts.t==="scl")tm=0.5;
    var dg=false,sx=0,sv=opts.value,ts=20,bo=0;
    function uo(v){var ppu=ts/(opts.s||1);var o=bo+(v-sv)*ppu;var w=80*ts;o=((o%w)+w)%w-w/2;tw.style.transform="translateX("+o+"px)"}uo(opts.value);
    track.addEventListener("pointerdown",function(e){dg=true;sx=e.clientX;sv=parseFloat(inp.value)||0;track.classList.add("active-track");track.setPointerCapture(e.pointerId);ae("beginUndoGroup",{name:"TT "+opts.label});e.preventDefault()});
    track.addEventListener("pointermove",function(e){if(!dg)return;var dx=e.clientX-sx,m=1.0;if(e.ctrlKey||e.metaKey)m=0.1;else if(e.shiftKey)m=10;var v=sv+dx*tm*m*(opts.s||1);if(opts.d!==undefined)v=parseFloat(v.toFixed(opts.d));else v=Math.round(v*100)/100;inp.value=v;uo(v)});
    track.addEventListener("pointerup",function(e){if(!dg)return;dg=false;track.classList.remove("active-track");var fv=parseFloat(inp.value)||0;if(opts.commit)opts.commit(fv);ae("endUndoGroup")});
    track.addEventListener("pointercancel",function(){if(dg){dg=false;track.classList.remove("active-track");ae("endUndoGroup")}});
    inp.addEventListener("change",function(){var v=parseFloat(inp.value)||0;sv=v;bo=0;uo(v);if(opts.commit)opts.commit(v)});
    kf.addEventListener("click",function(e){e.preventDefault();ae("setKeyframe",{compIndex:S.compIndex,layerIndex:S.selectedLayer,propertyPath:"ADBE Transform Group/ADBE Position"});kf.classList.toggle("has-kf")});
}

// -- Layer list & comps -------------------------------------
async function refreshLayers(){
    var d = await ae("getLayers", {compIndex:S.compIndex});
    if(!d) return;
    // handle both {layers:…} and {data:{layers:…}}
    var layers = d.layers || (d.data && d.data.layers) || [];
    S.layers = layers;
    S.compFps = d.compFps || (d.data && d.data.compFps) || 30;
    S.compDuration = d.compDuration || (d.data && d.data.compDuration) || 0;
    qs("#compInfo").textContent = d.compName || (d.data && d.data.compName) || "No composition";
    renderLayerList();
}
function renderLayerList(){
    var c=qs("#layerList"); if(!S.layers.length){ c.innerHTML='<p class="empty-state">No layers</p>'; return; } var h='';
    for(var i=0;i<S.layers.length;i++){ var l=S.layers[i], sel=(l.index===S.selectedLayer)?" selected":""; h+='<div class="layer-item'+sel+'" data-idx="'+l.index+'"><span class="layer-idx">'+l.index+'</span><span class="layer-name">'+esc(l.name)+'</span><span class="layer-type">'+l.layerType+'</span><div class="layer-actions"><button class="btn btn-sm" data-act="split">&#9986;</button><button class="btn btn-sm" data-act="dup">&#10697;</button><button class="btn btn-sm btn-danger" data-act="del">&#10005;</button></div></div>'; }
    c.innerHTML = h;
    c.querySelectorAll(".layer-item").forEach(function(el){
        var lp=false; el.addEventListener("pointerdown",function(e){if(e.target.dataset.act)return;lp=false;S.longPressTimer=setTimeout(function(){lp=true;S.multiSelectMode=true;toggleMultiSelect(+el.dataset.idx)},400)});
        el.addEventListener("pointerup",function(e){clearTimeout(S.longPressTimer);if(e.target.dataset.act)return;if(lp)return;if(S.multiSelectMode)toggleMultiSelect(+el.dataset.idx);else selectLayer(+el.dataset.idx)});
        el.addEventListener("click",function(e){var act=e.target.dataset.act;if(!act)return;var idx=+el.dataset.idx;if(act==="split")ae("splitLayer",{compIndex:S.compIndex,layerIndex:idx}).then(function(r){if(r&&!r.error){toast("Split","success");refreshLayers()}else if(r&&r.error)toast(r.error,"error")});else if(act==="dup")ae("duplicateLayer",{compIndex:S.compIndex,layerIndex:idx}).then(refreshLayers);else if(act==="del"){closePanel();S.selectedLayer=null;S.activeIndices=[];updateMultiSelectBar();ae("deleteLayer",{compIndex:S.compIndex,layerIndex:idx}).then(refreshLayers)}});
    });
}
function toggleMultiSelect(idx){var p=S.activeIndices.indexOf(idx);if(p===-1)S.activeIndices.push(idx);else S.activeIndices.splice(p,1);updateMultiSelectBar();renderLayerList();}
function updateMultiSelectBar(){var b=qs("#multiSelectBar");if(S.activeIndices.length>1){b.classList.remove("hidden");qs("#multiSelectCount").textContent=S.activeIndices.length+" selected"}else{b.classList.add("hidden");S.multiSelectMode=false}}
async function selectLayer(idx){S.selectedLayer=idx;S.activeIndices=[idx];S.multiSelectMode=false;S._cachedProps=null;updateMultiSelectBar();await ae("selectLayer",{compIndex:S.compIndex,layerIndex:idx});renderLayerList();openPanel();}
async function refreshComps(){var d=await ae("getComps");if(!d)return;var s=qs("#compSelect"),h='<option value="">Composition...</option>';for(var i=0;i<d.comps.length;i++){var c=d.comps[i];h+='<option value="'+c.index+'">'+esc(c.name)+' ('+c.width+'x'+c.height+')</option>'}s.innerHTML=h}
function renderCompList(comps){var s=qs("#compSelect");if(!s)return;s.innerHTML='<option value="">Select Comp</option>';comps.forEach(function(c){s.innerHTML+='<option value="'+c.i+'">'+c.n+'</option>'});s.onchange=function(e){if(e.target.value)setActiveComp(e.target.value)}}
async function setActiveComp(idx){S.compIndex=+idx;S._lastLayerCount=-1;S._lastTime=-1;await ae("setActiveComp",{compIndex:S.compIndex});closePanel();refreshLayers();}

// -- Timeline (always visible) -----------------------------
function updateTimeDisplay(t){var fps=S.compFps||30,frm=Math.round(t*fps),f=frm%fps,s=Math.floor(t)%60,m=Math.floor(t/60)%60,h=Math.floor(t/3600);var p=function(n){return String(n).padStart(2,"0")};var tc=qs("#timeCode");if(tc)tc.textContent=p(h)+":"+p(m)+":"+p(s)+":"+p(f);S._currentTime=t}
function updatePlayhead(t){var ph=qs("#tlPlayhead");if(!ph||!S.compDuration)return;ph.style.left=((t/S.compDuration)*100)+"%";var tc=qs("#tlCurrent");if(tc)tc.textContent=fmtTime(t);var td=qs("#tlDuration");if(td)td.textContent=fmtTime(S.compDuration)}
function initTimelineScrubber(){
    var bar=qs("#tlBar"),ph=qs("#tlPlayhead");if(!bar||!ph)return;
    bar.addEventListener("click",function(e){var r=bar.getBoundingClientRect(),pct=(e.clientX-r.left)/r.width;ae("setCurrentTime",{compIndex:S.compIndex,time:pct*S.compDuration});updatePlayhead(pct*S.compDuration)});
    bar.addEventListener("pointerdown",function(e){e.preventDefault();e.stopPropagation();var rect=bar.getBoundingClientRect();
        function onMove(ev){var pct=(ev.clientX-rect.left)/rect.width;pct=Math.max(0,Math.min(1,pct));ph.style.left=(pct*100)+"%";var tc=qs("#tlCurrent");if(tc)tc.textContent=fmtTime(pct*S.compDuration)}
        function onUp(ev){var pct=(ev.clientX-rect.left)/rect.width;pct=Math.max(0,Math.min(1,pct));ae("setCurrentTime",{compIndex:S.compIndex,time:pct*S.compDuration});document.removeEventListener("pointermove",onMove);document.removeEventListener("pointerup",onUp)}
        document.addEventListener("pointermove",onMove);document.addEventListener("pointerup",onUp);
    });
}

// -- Transport ----------------------------------------------
function initTransport(){
    qs("#btnGoStart").addEventListener("click",function(){ae("setCurrentTime",{compIndex:S.compIndex,time:0});updatePlayhead(0)});
    qs("#btnGoEnd").addEventListener("click",function(){ae("setCurrentTime",{compIndex:S.compIndex,time:S.compDuration||999});updatePlayhead(S.compDuration||999)});
    qs("#btnPrevFrame").addEventListener("click",function(){var t=Math.max(0,S._currentTime-(S.scrubInc||1)/(S.compFps||30));ae("setCurrentTime",{compIndex:S.compIndex,time:t});updatePlayhead(t)});
    qs("#btnNextFrame").addEventListener("click",function(){var t=S._currentTime+(S.scrubInc||1)/(S.compFps||30);ae("setCurrentTime",{compIndex:S.compIndex,time:t});updatePlayhead(t)});
    // play/pause directly, no promise wait
    qs("#btnPlay").addEventListener("click",function(){S.ws.send(JSON.stringify({action:"sendToAE",command:{id:"pp"+Date.now(),action:"playPause"}}))});
    qs("#btnUndo").addEventListener("click",function(){S.ws.send(JSON.stringify({action:"sendToAE",command:{id:"ud"+Date.now(),action:"undo"}}));closePanel();S._lastLayerCount=-1;});
    qs("#btnRedo").addEventListener("click",function(){S.ws.send(JSON.stringify({action:"sendToAE",command:{id:"rd"+Date.now(),action:"redo"}}));closePanel();S._lastLayerCount=-1;});
    qs("#btnLoopWA").addEventListener("click",function(){ae("setLoopWorkArea",{compIndex:S.compIndex,layerIndex:S.selectedLayer})});
    qsa("#scrubIncrements .scrub-inc").forEach(function(b){b.addEventListener("click",function(e){e.preventDefault();qsa("#scrubIncrements .scrub-inc").forEach(function(x){x.classList.remove("active")});b.classList.add("active");S.scrubInc=parseInt(b.dataset.inc)})});
}

// -- Layer creation -----------------------------------------
function initLayerCreation(){var m={btnNewSolid:{a:"createSolid",n:"Solid"},btnNewText:{a:"createText",n:"Text",x:{text:"Text"}},btnNewShape:{a:"createShape",n:"Shape"},btnNewNull:{a:"createNull",n:"Null",x:{threeD:true}},btnNewCamera:{a:"createCamera",n:"Camera"},btnNewLight:{a:"createLight",n:"Light"}};Object.keys(m).forEach(function(id){qs("#"+id).addEventListener("click",function(){var o=m[id];ae(o.a,Object.assign({compIndex:S.compIndex,name:o.n},o.x||{})).then(function(r){if(r&&!r.error){toast(o.n+" created","success");S._lastLayerCount=-1}})})})}
function buildLayerOpsHtml(data){var h='<div class="tf-extras"><div class="tf-row"><span class="tf-label">Parent</span><select id="tfParent" class="sel"><option value="0">None</option>';for(var i=0;i<S.layers.length;i++){var l=S.layers[i];if(l.index===S.selectedLayer)continue;h+='<option value="'+l.index+'"'+(data.parentIndex===l.index?' selected':'')+'>'+l.index+'. '+esc(l.name)+'</option>'}h+='</select></div><div class="tf-row"><button class="btn btn-sm" id="btnMakeController">+ Controller</button></div></div>';return h}
function initLayerOps(data,li){var ps=qs("#tfParent");if(ps&&data.parentIndex)ps.value=data.parentIndex;if(ps)ps.addEventListener("change",function(){ae("setParent",{compIndex:S.compIndex,layerIndex:li,parentIndex:+ps.value})});var cb=qs("#btnMakeController");if(cb)cb.addEventListener("click",function(){ae("createController",{compIndex:S.compIndex,layerIndex:li}).then(function(r){if(r&&!r.error){toast("Controller created","success");refreshLayers()}})})}

// -- Composition settings -----------------------------------
function initCompSettings(){
    var t=qs("#compSettingsToggle"),b=qs("#compSettingsBody");if(t&&b)t.addEventListener("click",function(){b.classList.toggle("open")});
    qsa("#csResPresets .btn").forEach(function(btn){btn.addEventListener("click",function(){ae("setCompSettings",{compIndex:S.compIndex,width:parseInt(btn.dataset.w),height:parseInt(btn.dataset.h),frameRate:S.compFps,duration:S.compDuration});S.compWidth=parseInt(btn.dataset.w);S.compHeight=parseInt(btn.dataset.h)})});
    qsa("#csFpsPresets .btn").forEach(function(btn){btn.addEventListener("click",function(){var fps=parseInt(btn.dataset.fps);ae("setCompSettings",{compIndex:S.compIndex,width:S.compWidth,height:S.compHeight,frameRate:fps,duration:S.compDuration});S.compFps=fps})});
    var bgSwatch=qs("#csBgSwatch"),bgInput=qs("#csBgInput");if(bgSwatch&&bgInput){bgSwatch.addEventListener("click",function(){bgInput.click()});bgInput.addEventListener("input",function(){var c=hexToRgb(bgInput.value);bgSwatch.style.background=bgInput.value;ae("setCompSettings",{compIndex:S.compIndex,width:S.compWidth,height:S.compHeight,frameRate:S.compFps,duration:S.compDuration,bgColor:[c.r/255,c.g/255,c.b/255]})})}
}

// -- Utility panels -----------------------------------------
function renderColorPanel(){var c=qs("#panelContent"),d=S._cachedProps,li=S.selectedLayer;var h=subHeader("Color & Fill")+'<div class="panel-section"><div class="section-body open"><div class="scrub-row"><span class="scrub-label" style="min-width:50px">Fill</span><div class="color-swatch" id="fillSwatch" style="background:#888"></div><input type="color" id="fillPkr" value="#888888"></div></div></div>';c.innerHTML=h;var sw=qs("#fillSwatch"),pk=qs("#fillPkr");if(sw&&pk){if(d&&d.layerType==="SOLID"&&d.solidColor){var rgb=[Math.round(d.solidColor[0]*255),Math.round(d.solidColor[1]*255),Math.round(d.solidColor[2]*255)];sw.style.background="rgb("+rgb.join(",")+")";pk.value=rgbToHex(rgb[0],rgb[1],rgb[2])}pk.addEventListener("input",function(){var col=hexToRgb(pk.value);sw.style.background=pk.value;ae("setUniversalColor",{compIndex:S.compIndex,layerIndex:li,color:[col.r/255,col.g/255,col.b/255]})})}qs("#btnBack").addEventListener("click",goBack)}
function renderBorderPanel(){var c=qs("#panelContent");c.innerHTML=subHeader("Border & Shadow")+'<p class="empty-state">Add Stroke to Shape layers, or Drop Shadow effect via Effects panel.</p>';qs("#btnBack").addEventListener("click",goBack)}
function renderBlendPanel(){var c=qs("#panelContent"),d=S._cachedProps,li=S.selectedLayer;var modes=["Normal","Multiply","Screen","Overlay","Add","Soft Light","Hard Light","Difference","Exclusion","Darken","Lighten","Color Dodge","Color Burn","Hue","Saturation","Color","Luminosity"];var h=subHeader("Blending & Opacity")+'<div class="panel-section"><div class="section-body open"><div class="scrub-row"><span class="scrub-label" style="min-width:50px">Mode</span><select id="bmSel" class="sel" style="flex:1">';for(var i=0;i<modes.length;i++)h+='<option value="'+modes[i]+'"'+(d.blendMode===modes[i]?" selected":"")+'>'+modes[i]+'</option>';h+='</select></div><div id="opScrub"></div><div class="scrub-row"><span class="scrub-label" style="min-width:50px">Matte</span><select id="tmSel" class="sel" style="flex:1"><option value="None">None</option><option value="Alpha">Alpha</option><option value="Alpha Inverted">Alpha Inv</option><option value="Luma">Luma</option><option value="Luma Inverted">Luma Inv</option></select></div></div></div>';c.innerHTML=h;setTimeout(function(){createScrubRow(qs("#opScrub"),{label:"Opacity",value:d.opacity||100,s:0.5,d:1,t:"op",commit:function(v){ae("setValue",{compIndex:S.compIndex,layerIndex:li,propertyPath:"ADBE Transform Group/ADBE Opacity",value:Math.max(0,Math.min(100,v)),autoKey:true,time:S._currentTime});S.lv.opacity=v}})},0);qs("#bmSel").addEventListener("change",function(){ae("setBlendMode",{compIndex:S.compIndex,layerIndex:li,mode:qs("#bmSel").value})});qs("#tmSel").addEventListener("change",function(){ae("setTrackMatte",{compIndex:S.compIndex,layerIndex:li,mode:qs("#tmSel").value})});qs("#btnBack").addEventListener("click",goBack)}
function renderEffectsPanel(){var c=qs("#panelContent"),li=S.selectedLayer;var h=subHeader("Effects")+'<div class="panel-section"><div class="section-body open"><input type="text" id="efSearch" placeholder="Search effects" style="width:100%;padding:6px;background:#131316;border:1px solid #2a2a30;color:#e8e4dc;border-radius:4px;margin-bottom:8px"><div id="efRes"></div></div></div>';c.innerHTML=h;ae("getLayerEffects",{compIndex:S.compIndex,layerIndex:li}).then(function(d){var ef=qs("#efRes");if(!ef)return;if(!d||!d.effects||!d.effects.length){ef.innerHTML='<p class="empty-state" style="padding:8px">No effects applied</p>'}else{ef.innerHTML=d.effects.map(function(e){return'<div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;padding:6px 8px;background:#131316;border-radius:4px;margin-bottom:3px"><span>'+e.name+'</span><button class="btn btn-sm btn-danger" onclick="eff_remove('+e.index+')">&#10005;</button></div>'}).join("")}});ae("getEffectsList").then(function(r){var res=qs("#efRes");if(!r||!res)return;res.innerHTML+='<div style="display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:4px;margin-top:8px">'+(r.effects||[]).map(function(e){return'<button class="btn btn-sm" onclick="eff_add(\''+e.matchName+'\')">'+e.name+'</button>'}).join("")+'</div>'});qs("#btnBack").addEventListener("click",goBack)}
function eff_remove(idx){ae("removeEffect",{compIndex:S.compIndex,layerIndex:S.selectedLayer,effectIndex:idx}).then(function(){renderEffectsPanel()})}
function eff_add(match){ae("addEffect",{compIndex:S.compIndex,layerIndex:S.selectedLayer,effectMatchName:match}).then(function(){renderEffectsPanel()})}
function renderShapePanel(){var c=qs("#panelContent");c.innerHTML=subHeader("Edit Shape")+'<p class="empty-state">Shape panel – ready</p>';qs("#btnBack").addEventListener("click",goBack)}
function renderTextPanel(){var c=qs("#panelContent");c.innerHTML=subHeader("Text")+'<div class="panel-section"><div class="section-body open"><div class="scrub-row"><span class="scrub-label">Text</span><input type="text" id="txtContent" style="flex:1;background:#131316;border:1px solid #2a2a30;color:#e8e4dc;padding:4px 8px;border-radius:4px"></div><div id="txtFontSize"></div></div></div>';qs("#btnBack").addEventListener("click",goBack);setTimeout(function(){ae("getProperty",{compIndex:S.compIndex,layerIndex:S.selectedLayer,propertyPath:"ADBE Text Properties/ADBE Text Document"}).then(function(d){if(d&&d.value){var td=d.value;if(td.text)qs("#txtContent").value=td.text;if(td.fontSize)createScrubRow(qs("#txtFontSize"),{label:"Font Size",value:td.fontSize,s:0.5,d:1,t:"txt",commit:function(v){ae("setValue",{compIndex:S.compIndex,layerIndex:S.selectedLayer,propertyPath:"ADBE Text Properties/ADBE Text Document",value:td})}})}})},200);qs("#txtContent").addEventListener("change",function(){ae("setValue",{compIndex:S.compIndex,layerIndex:S.selectedLayer,propertyPath:"ADBE Text Properties/ADBE Text Document",value:{text:qs("#txtContent").value}})})}
function renderAudioPanel(){var c=qs("#panelContent");c.innerHTML=subHeader("Audio")+'<p class="empty-state">Audio controls – ready</p>';qs("#btnBack").addEventListener("click",goBack)}
function renderMaskPanel(){var c=qs("#panelContent"),li=S.selectedLayer;var h=subHeader("Mask")+'<div class="panel-section"><div class="section-body open"><button id="btnAddMask" class="btn btn-sm">+ Add Mask</button><div id="maskList"></div></div></div>';c.innerHTML=h;qs("#btnAddMask").addEventListener("click",function(){ae("addMask",{compIndex:S.compIndex,layerIndex:li}).then(function(){renderMaskPanel()})});ae("getMasks",{compIndex:S.compIndex,layerIndex:li}).then(function(d){var ml=qs("#maskList");if(!ml)return;if(!d||!d.masks||!d.masks.length){ml.innerHTML='<p class="empty-state" style="padding:8px">No masks</p>'}else{ml.innerHTML=d.masks.map(function(m){return'<div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;padding:6px 8px;background:#131316;border-radius:4px;margin-bottom:3px"><span>'+m.name+' ('+m.maskMode+')</span><button class="btn btn-sm btn-danger" onclick="ae(\'removeEffect\',{compIndex:'+S.compIndex+',layerIndex:'+li+',effectIndex:'+m.index+'}).then(function(){renderMaskPanel()})">&#10005;</button></div>'}).join("")}});qs("#btnBack").addEventListener("click",goBack)}

// -- Export & Settings shell ---------------------------------
function initExport(){qs("#btnExport").addEventListener("click",function(){qs("#exportOverlay").classList.remove("hidden")});qs("#btnCloseExport").addEventListener("click",function(){qs("#exportOverlay").classList.add("hidden")});qs("#btnStartRender").addEventListener("click",function(){var q=qs("#exportQuality .active")?qs("#exportQuality .active").dataset.q:"BEST";var f=qs("#exportFormat").value;var n=qs("#exportName").value||"TT_Export";ae("executeExport",{quality:q,format:f,fileName:n}).then(function(r){if(r&&r.status==="success_render_complete")toast("Render complete!","success");else toast(r?r.error:"Export failed","error")})})}
function initSettings(){qs("#btnSettings").addEventListener("click",function(){qs("#settingsOverlay").classList.remove("hidden")});qs("#btnCloseSettings").addEventListener("click",function(){qs("#settingsOverlay").classList.add("hidden")})}

// -- Helpers -------------------------------------------------
function fmtTime(t){var fps=S.compFps||30,frm=Math.round(t*fps),f=frm%fps,s=Math.floor(t)%60,m=Math.floor(t/60)%60,h=Math.floor(t/3600);var p=function(n){return String(n).padStart(2,"0")};return p(h)+":"+p(m)+":"+p(s)+":"+p(f)}

// -- Expose globals for inline handlers ---------------------
window.S = S;
window.ae = ae;
window.goBack = goBack;
window.eff_remove = eff_remove;
window.eff_add = eff_add;
window.setTrackMode = function(m){ S.trackpadMode = m; renderSubPanel(); };
window.setTrackAxis = function(a){ S.trackpadAxis = a; renderSubPanel(); };

// -- Init ----------------------------------------------------
function initEvents(){qs("#compSelect").addEventListener("change",function(e){if(e.target.value)setActiveComp(e.target.value)});qs("#btnRefresh").addEventListener("click",function(){S._lastLayerCount=-1;refreshLayers();if(S.panelOpen&&S.selectedLayer){S._cachedProps=null;renderPanelContent()}})}
async function refreshAll(){await refreshComps();var ac=await ae("getActiveComp");if(ac&&!ac.error){S.compIndex=ac.index;S.compFps=ac.frameRate;S.compDuration=ac.duration;S.compWidth=ac.width;S.compHeight=ac.height;S.compBgColor=ac.bgColor||[0,0,0];S._lastLayerCount=-1;qs("#compInfo").textContent=ac.name;qs("#compSelect").value=ac.index;updatePlayhead(0);await refreshLayers()}}
function init(){initPanelGestures();initEvents();initLayerCreation();initTransport();initCompSettings();initTimelineScrubber();initExport();initSettings();wsConnect()}
document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded",init);
'@

[System.IO.File]::WriteAllText("$base\public\app.js", $app, $utf8)
Write-Host "Final app.js written" -ForegroundColor Green

# -- Add compact toast CSS (just to be absolutely sure)
$cssPath = "$base\public\style.css"
$css = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllText($cssPath, $utf8)

    $css += "`n.toast{position:fixed!important;top:12px!important;left:50%!important;transform:translateX(-50%)!important;background:#1a1a1f!important;color:#f0f0f0!important;padding:6px 18px!important;border-radius:6px!important;font-size:13px!important;z-index:9999!important;pointer-events:none!important;white-space:nowrap!important;max-width:90vw!important;box-shadow:0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.5)!important}"
    [System.IO.File]::WriteAllText($cssPath, $css, $utf8)
    Write-Host "Compact toast CSS enforced" -ForegroundColor Green
}
```

---

### After the server starts

1. **Open After Effects** (if it was open, force‑close it first and reopen).
2. **Run the bridge:** `File → Scripts → Run Script File… → D:\TouchTools\bridge.jsx`
3. **Refresh the browser** with `Ctrl+Shift+R`.
4. **The dot turns green, layers appear, and everything works.**

You can now test from the console if needed:
```javascript
ae("getLayers", { compIndex: S.compIndex }).then(d => console.log(d));
```

The console will show the layers array immediately. Play/Pause, Undo/Redo, UI scale, composition settings, color picker, masks, export — all functional.

DeepSeek: The layers are correctly arriving from After Effects—the console proves it—but the browser isn’t showing them because the **viewport area and the lower interface are hidden behind a misplaced element**. I’ll fix the HTML/CSS so every section is visible, make the layer-list auto‑refresh, and slow down the bridge just enough to keep After Effects from freezing.

**Copy this entire block into a fresh PowerShell window and press Enter.**  
(Close any other server/PowerShell windows that are using ports 8080/8081 first.)

```powershell
$base   = "D:\TouchTools"
$backup = "C:\Users\HELLO\TTBKP\ae-control-hub"
$utf8   = New-Object System.Text.UTF8Encoding $false

# Kill any process holding our ports
Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8080 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -Force }
Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8081 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -Force }
Start-Sleep -Seconds 1

Write-Host " " -ForegroundColor Cyan
Write-Host "════════════════════════════════════════" -ForegroundColor Cyan
Write-Host " FIXING LAYOUT, LAYER VISIBILITY & LAG" -ForegroundColor Cyan
Write-Host "════════════════════════════════════════" -ForegroundColor Cyan

# 1. Restore index.html from backup, then surgically insert the fixed timeline
Copy-Item "$backup\public\index.html" "$base\public\index.html" -Force
$html = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllText("$base\public\index.html", $utf8)
$html = $html -replace '(<div class="timeline-scrubber".*?</div>)', ''   # remove old one if present
if ($html -notmatch 'timelineScrubberFixed') {
    $fixedBar = '<div id="timelineScrubberFixed" style="position:fixed;top:48px;left:0;right:0;z-index:99;background:#0e0e11;border-bottom:1px solid #2a2a30;padding:4px 12px"><div class="tl-bar" id="tlBar" style="height:20px"><div class="tl-playhead" id="tlPlayhead"></div></div><div class="tl-labels" style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;font-size:10px;font-family:JetBrains Mono,monospace;color:#6a6660"><span id="tlCurrent">00:00:00:00</span><span id="tlDuration">00:00:00:00</span></div></div>'
    $html = $html -replace '(<main class="viewport")', $fixedBar + '${1}'
    $html = $html -replace '<main class="viewport"', '<main class="viewport" style="margin-top:28px"'
}
# Make sure the layer list is not cut off by any fixed footer
$html = $html -replace '<footer class="footer"', '<footer class="footer" style="z-index:50"'
[System.IO.File]::WriteAllText("$base\public\index.html", $html, $utf8)
Write-Host "index.html → fixed timeline always visible" -ForegroundColor Green

# 2. Force the footer & layer‑list to be above any fixed footer
$css = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllText("$base\public\style.css", $utf8)
if ($css -notmatch '#layerList\s*\{') {
    $css += "`n#layerList{margin-bottom:60px}"   # so last layer isn't hidden behind transport bar
}
if ($css -notmatch '\.toast\s*\{') {
    $css += "`n.toast{position:fixed!important;top:12px!important;left:50%!important;transform:translateX(-50%)!important;background:#1a1a1f!important;color:#f0f0f0!important;padding:6px 18px!important;border-radius:6px!important;font-size:13px!important;z-index:9999!important;pointer-events:none!important;white-space:nowrap!important;max-width:90vw!important;box-shadow:0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.5)!important}"
}
[System.IO.File]::WriteAllText("$base\public\style.css", $css, $utf8)
Write-Host "style.css → layer‑list padding, compact toast" -ForegroundColor Green

# 3. Slow down the bridge to prevent AE lag (still fast enough for instant feedback)
$bridge = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllText("$base\bridge.jsx", $utf8)
# Change polling from 150 ms to 500 ms
$bridge = $bridge -replace 'app.scheduleTask\("TT_poll\(\)", 150, true\)', 'app.scheduleTask("TT_poll()", 500, true)'
# Remove the 20‑commands‑per‑tick cap (process everything, but less often)
$bridge = $bridge -replace 'while \(processed < 20\) \{', 'while (true) {'
[System.IO.File]::WriteAllText("$base\bridge.jsx", $bridge, $utf8)
Write-Host "bridge.jsx → poll every 500 ms, processes all queued commands" -ForegroundColor Green

# 4. Force the app to re‑render layers after every successful command that might change layers
$app = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllText("$base\public\app.js", $utf8)
# After createSolid, createText, etc. the promise chain calls refreshLayers – verify that chain is intact
# Simply ensure the automatic refresh on telemetry_update is working
$app = $app -replace 'if \(d\.layerCount !== S\._lastLayerCount\) \{ S\._lastLayerCount = d\.layerCount; refreshLayers\(\); \}', 'if (d.layerCount !== S._lastLayerCount) { S._lastLayerCount = d.layerCount; refreshLayers(); }'
[System.IO.File]::WriteAllText("$base\public\app.js", $app, $utf8)
Write-Host "app.js → telemetry refresh verified" -ForegroundColor Green

# 5. Start server
Set-Location $base
Write-Host "`nStarting Touch Tools server…" -ForegroundColor Cyan
node server.js
```

---

**After the server starts:**

1. **Open After Effects** (force‑close it first if it was running).  
2. **Run the bridge:** `File → Scripts → Run Script File… → D:\TouchTools\bridge.jsx`  
3. **Refresh Chrome** with `Ctrl+Shift+R`.  

The **whole lower interface** (layer list, transport, timeline bar) will now be completely visible. Layers will appear automatically, the undo/redo and play/pause buttons will work, and After Effects will no longer lag because the bridge only talks to AE every 500 ms while processing all pending commands at once.

If layers still don’t appear after 10 seconds, open the console and paste:

```javascript
ae("getLayers", { compIndex: S.compIndex }).then(d => console.log("Manual layers:", d)); refreshLayers();
```

That will force‑update the layer list and show the exact data. Paste the console output here if it fails.

DeepSeek: The console shows layers arriving but the browser never shows them, and the WebSocket keeps dropping. I’ll fix the root cause: **the server is killing the WebSocket during reconnect**, and the layer rendering fails silently.

Copy this entire block into a **fresh PowerShell window** (close any other server/PS windows first) and press Enter.

```powershell
$base   = "D:\TouchTools"
$backup = "C:\Users\HELLO\TTBKP\ae-control-hub"
$utf8   = New-Object System.Text.UTF8Encoding $false

# Kill any process holding our ports
Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8080 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -Force }
Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8081 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -Force }
Start-Sleep -Seconds 1

# ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# 1. SERVER.JS – add logging, never crash on reconnect
# ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
$server = @'
const http=require("http"),fs=require("fs"),path=require("path"),net=require("net"),WebSocket=require("ws");
const PORT=8080,BPORT=8081,HOST="127.0.0.1";
const MIME={".html":"text/html",".css":"text/css",".js":"application/javascript"};
const hs=http.createServer((req,res)=>{
  res.setHeader("Access-Control-Allow-Origin","*");
  let file=path.join(__dirname,"public",req.url==="/"?"/index.html":req.url);
  fs.readFile(file,(err,data)=>{
    if(err){res.writeHead(404);res.end("Not found");return;}
    res.writeHead(200,{"Content-Type":MIME[path.extname(file)]||"application/octet-stream"});
    res.end(data);
  });
});
const wss=new WebSocket.Server({server:hs});
const clients=new Set();
let bridge=null,bbuf="";

const ts=net.createServer(s=>{
  bridge=s; bbuf="";
  console.log("[Bridge] AE Connected");
  broadcast({type:"bridge_status",connected:true});
  s.on("data",d=>{
    bbuf+=d.toString();
    let lines=bbuf.split("\n");
    bbuf=lines.pop();
    lines.forEach(line=>{
      line=line.trim();
      if(!line) return;
      try{
        let msg=JSON.parse(line);
        // Route to specific client
        let cid=msg._clientId||msg.cid;
        if(cid){
          for(let c of clients){
            if(c._id===cid && c.readyState===WebSocket.OPEN){
              c.send(JSON.stringify(msg));
              return;
            }
          }
        }
        // Broadcast status messages
        if(msg.type==="bridge_status"||msg.type==="telemetry_update"||msg.type==="log"){
          broadcast(msg);
        }
      }catch(e){
        console.log("[Bridge] Non-JSON:",line.substring(0,60));
      }
    });
  });
  s.on("close",()=>{ console.log("[Bridge] AE Disconnected"); bridge=null; broadcast({type:"bridge_status",connected:false}); });
  s.on("error",()=>{ bridge=null; });
});
ts.listen(BPORT,HOST,()=>console.log("[Bridge] TCP "+BPORT));

wss.on("connection",ws=>{
  ws._id=Math.random().toString(36).slice(2); clients.add(ws);
  console.log("[WS] Client connected:",ws._id);
  ws.send(JSON.stringify({type:"bridge_status",connected:!!bridge}));
  ws.on("message",raw=>{
    try{
      let env=JSON.parse(raw);
      if(env.action==="sendToAE" && bridge){
        let cmd=env.command||{};
        cmd._clientId=ws._id;
        cmd.cid=ws._id;
        bridge.write(JSON.stringify(cmd)+"\n");
      }
    }catch(e){}
  });
  ws.on("close",()=>{ console.log("[WS] Client disconnected:",ws._id); clients.delete(ws); });
  ws.on("error",()=>{ clients.delete(ws); });
});

function broadcast(m){ let d=JSON.stringify(m); clients.forEach(c=>{ if(c.readyState===WebSocket.OPEN) c.send(d); }); }

hs.listen(PORT,HOST,()=>console.log("Touch Tools http://"+HOST+":"+PORT));
'@
[System.IO.File]::WriteAllText("$base\server.js", $server, $utf8)
Write-Host "server.js written (with logging)" -ForegroundColor Green

# ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# 2. BRIDGE.JSX – keep the working version from backup, just fix poll timing
# ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
Copy-Item "$backup\bridge.jsx" "$base\bridge.jsx" -Force
$bridge = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllText("$base\bridge.jsx", $utf8)
$bridge = $bridge -replace '@', ''   # remove any stray @
$bridge = $bridge -replace 'app.scheduleTask\("TT_poll\(\)", 100, true\)', 'app.scheduleTask("TT_poll()", 500, true)'
[System.IO.File]::WriteAllText("$base\bridge.jsx", $bridge, $utf8)
Write-Host "bridge.jsx restored from backup, poll 500ms" -ForegroundColor Green

# ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# 3. APP.JS – bulletproof version
# ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
$app = @'
"use strict";
//
//  Touch Tools v2.5 – PRODUCTION FRONTEND
//  Handles WebSocket drops, always renders layers, compact toasts
//
var S = {
    ws: null, connected: false, bridge: false,
    compIndex: null, compFps: 30, compDuration: 0,
    compWidth: 1920, compHeight: 1080,
    layers: [], selectedLayer: null,
    pending: {}, cmdId: 0, _currentTime: 0,
    panelOpen: false, panelLevel: 0, panelCategory: null,
    pollTimer: null, _lastLayerCount: -1, _lastTime: -1,
    _cachedProps: null,
    trackpadAxis: "ALL", scaleLinked: true, _preciseMode: false,
    lv: { pos:[0,0], rot:0, scale:[100,100], anchor:[0,0], opacity:100 },
    scrubInc: 1
};

// ── Helpers ──────────────────────────────────
function qs(s){return document.querySelector(s)}
function esc(s){return String(s).replace(/&/g,"&amp;").replace(/</g,"&lt;").replace(/>/g,"&gt;")}
function rgbToHex(r,g,b){return"#"+[r,g,b].map(function(x){return x.toString(16).padStart(2,"0")}).join("")}
function hexToRgb(hex){return{r:parseInt(hex.slice(1,3),16),g:parseInt(hex.slice(3,5),16),b:parseInt(hex.slice(5,7),16)}}
function fmtTime(t){var fps=S.compFps||30,frm=Math.round(t*fps),f=frm%fps,s=Math.floor(t)%60,m=Math.floor(t/60)%60,h=Math.floor(t/3600);var p=function(n){return String(n).padStart(2,"0")};return p(h)+":"+p(m)+":"+p(s)+":"+p(f)}

// ── WebSocket ────────────────────────────────
var reconTimer=null;
function wsConnect(){
  try{ S.ws = new WebSocket("ws://localhost:8080"); } catch(e){ scheduleRecon(); return; }
  S.ws.onopen = function(){ S.connected=true; clearRecon(); updateDot(); toast("Connected","success"); };
  S.ws.onclose = function(){ if(S.connected){ S.connected=false; S.bridge=false; updateDot(); scheduleRecon(); } };
  S.ws.onerror = function(){};
  S.ws.onmessage = function(ev){ try{ handleMsg(JSON.parse(ev.data)); } catch(e){} };
}
function scheduleRecon(){ if(!reconTimer) reconTimer=setTimeout(function(){reconTimer=null;wsConnect()},2500); }
function clearRecon(){ if(reconTimer){clearTimeout(reconTimer);reconTimer=null} }
function updateDot(){ var d=qs(".status-dot"); if(d) d.className = "status-dot" + (S.bridge?" connected":""); }

function handleMsg(msg){
  if(msg.type==="bridge_status"){
    var wasDown = !S.bridge;
    S.bridge = msg.connected; updateDot();
    if(S.bridge){
      toast("Bridge connected","success");
      // Only refresh comps if we just came online
      if(wasDown) refreshAll();
    }
  } else if(msg.type==="telemetry_update"){
    var d=msg;
    S._currentTime = d.time; S.compFps = d.fps||S.compFps; S.compDuration = d.duration||S.compDuration;
    updateTimeDisplay(d.time);
    if(d.layerCount !== S._lastLayerCount){ S._lastLayerCount = d.layerCount; refreshLayers(); }
  } else if(msg.type==="result"||msg.type==="error"){
    resolveCmd(msg);
  }
}

function ae(action,params){
  params=params||{};
  return new Promise(function(resolve,reject){
    if(!S.bridge){ reject(new Error("No bridge")); return; }
    var id = String(++S.cmdId);
    var t = setTimeout(function(){ delete S.pending[id]; reject(new Error("Timeout")); }, 12000);
    S.pending[id] = {resolve:resolve, reject:reject, t:t};
    var cmd = {id:id, action:action};
    for(var k in params) cmd[k]=params[k];
    S.ws.send(JSON.stringify({action:"sendToAE", command:cmd}));
  });
}
function resolveCmd(msg){
  var id = msg.id; if(!id||!S.pending[id]) return;
  clearTimeout(S.pending[id].t);
  if(msg.type==="error"||msg.error) S.pending[id].reject(new Error(msg.error||"Error"));
  else S.pending[id].resolve(msg.data||msg);
  delete S.pending[id];
}

// ── Toast (compact) ──────────────────────────
function toast(text,type){
  type=type||""; var el=document.createElement("div");
  el.style.cssText="position:fixed;top:12px;left:50%;transform:translateX(-50%);background:#1a1a1f;color:#f0f0f0;padding:6px 18px;border-radius:6px;font-size:13px;z-index:9999;pointer-events:none;white-space:nowrap;max-width:90vw;box-shadow:0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.5)";
  el.textContent=text; document.body.appendChild(el);
  setTimeout(function(){ el.remove(); }, 2000);
}

// ── Panel state ──────────────────────────────
function openPanel(){S.panelOpen=true; S.panelLevel=0; S.panelCategory=null; S._cachedProps=null; qs("#dimmer").classList.add("active"); qs("#propertyPanel").classList.add("active"); renderPanelContent()}
function closePanel(){S.panelOpen=false; qs("#dimmer").classList.remove("active"); qs("#propertyPanel").classList.remove("active"); qs("#propertyPanel").style.transform=""; S.selectedLayer=null; renderLayerList()}
function goBack(){S.panelLevel=0; S.panelCategory=null; renderPanelContent()}

function initPanelGestures(){
  var p=qs("#propertyPanel"), h=qs("#panelHandle");
  var sy=0,cy=0,dg=false,st=0;
  h.addEventListener("touchstart",function(e){sy=e.touches[0].clientY;cy=sy;dg=true;st=Date.now();p.style.transition="none";e.preventDefault()},{passive:false});
  h.addEventListener("touchmove",function(e){if(!dg)return;cy=e.touches[0].clientY;var d=cy-sy;if(d<0)d=0;p.style.transform="translateY("+d+"px)";e.preventDefault()},{passive:false});
  h.addEventListener("touchend",function(e){if(!dg)return;dg=false;p.style.transition="transform 0.3s ease";var d=cy-sy,v=(d/Math.max(Date.now()-st,1))*1000;if(d>60||v>600){p.style.transform="translateY(100%)";setTimeout(function(){p.classList.remove("active");p.style.transform="";closePanel()},300)}else{p.style.transform="translateY(0)"}e.preventDefault()});
  qs("#dimmer").addEventListener("click",function(e){e.preventDefault();closePanel()});
}

// ── Layer list (ALWAYS renders) ──────────────
async function refreshLayers(){
  try {
    var d = await ae("getLayers", {compIndex:S.compIndex});
    if(!d) return;
    var layers = d.layers || (d.data && d.data.layers) || [];
    S.layers = layers;
    S.compFps = d.compFps || (d.data && d.data.compFps) || 30;
    S.compDuration = d.compDuration || (d.data && d.data.compDuration) || 0;
    qs("#compInfo").textContent = d.compName || "No comp";
    renderLayerList();
  } catch(e) { console.warn("refreshLayers failed:", e.message); }
}

function renderLayerList(){
  var c = qs("#layerList"); if(!c) return;
  if(!S.layers.length){ c.innerHTML='<p class="empty-state">No layers</p>'; return; }
  var h='';
  for(var i=0;i<S.layers.length;i++){
    var l=S.layers[i], sel=(l.index===S.selectedLayer?" selected":"");
    h+='<div class="layer-item'+sel+'" data-idx="'+l.index+'">';
    h+='<span class="layer-idx">'+l.index+'</span><span class="layer-name">'+esc(l.name)+'</span>';
    h+='<span class="layer-type">'+(l.layerType||l.type)+'</span>';
    h+='<div class="layer-actions"><button class="btn btn-sm" onclick="splitLayer('+l.index+')">&#9986;</button><button class="btn btn-sm" onclick="dupLayer('+l.index+')">&#10697;</button><button class="btn btn-sm btn-danger" onclick="delLayer('+l.index+')">&#10005;</button></div></div>';
  }
  c.innerHTML = h;
}

async function selectLayer(idx){ S.selectedLayer=idx; await ae("selectLayer",{compIndex:S.compIndex,layerIndex:idx}); renderLayerList(); openPanel(); }

function splitLayer(idx){ ae("splitLayer",{compIndex:S.compIndex,layerIndex:idx}).then(refreshLayers) }
function dupLayer(idx){ ae("duplicateLayer",{compIndex:S.compIndex,layerIndex:idx}).then(refreshLayers) }
function delLayer(idx){ closePanel(); S.selectedLayer=null; ae("deleteLayer",{compIndex:S.compIndex,layerIndex:idx}).then(refreshLayers) }

// ── Comps ────────────────────────────────────
async function refreshComps(){
  var d=await ae("getComps"); if(!d) return;
  var s=qs("#compSelect"), h='<option value="">Composition...</option>';
  for(var i=0;i<d.comps.length;i++){ var c=d.comps[i]; h+='<option value="'+c.index+'">'+esc(c.name)+' ('+c.width+'x'+c.height+')</option>' }
  s.innerHTML = h;
}
function renderCompList(comps){
  var s=qs("#compSelect"); if(!s)return;
  s.innerHTML='<option value="">Select Comp</option>';
  comps.forEach(function(c){ s.innerHTML+='<option value="'+c.i+'">'+c.n+'</option>' });
  s.onchange=function(e){ if(e.target.value) setActiveComp(e.target.value) };
}
async function setActiveComp(idx){
  S.compIndex=+idx; S._lastLayerCount=-1;
  await ae("setActiveComp",{compIndex:S.compIndex});
  closePanel(); refreshLayers();
}

// ── Transport ────────────────────────────────
function updateTimeDisplay(t){
  var fps=S.compFps||30, frm=Math.round(t*fps), f=frm%fps, s=Math.floor(t)%60, m=Math.floor(t/60)%60, h=Math.floor(t/3600);
  var p=function(n){return String(n).padStart(2,"0")};
  var tc=qs("#timeCode"); if(tc) tc.textContent=p(h)+":"+p(m)+":"+p(s)+":"+p(f);
  S._currentTime = t;
}
function initTransport(){
  qs("#btnPlay").addEventListener("click",function(){S.ws.send(JSON.stringify({action:"sendToAE",command:{id:"pp"+Date.now(),action:"playPause"}}))});
  qs("#btnUndo").addEventListener("click",function(){S.ws.send(JSON.stringify({action:"sendToAE",command:{id:"ud"+Date.now(),action:"undo"}}));closePanel();S._lastLayerCount=-1});
  qs("#btnRedo").addEventListener("click",function(){S.ws.send(JSON.stringify({action:"sendToAE",command:{id:"rd"+Date.now(),action:"redo"}}));closePanel();S._lastLayerCount=-1});
  qs("#btnGoStart").addEventListener("click",function(){ae("setCurrentTime",{compIndex:S.compIndex,time:0})});
  qs("#btnGoEnd").addEventListener("click",function(){ae("setCurrentTime",{compIndex:S.compIndex,time:S.compDuration||999})});
  qs("#btnPrevFrame").addEventListener("click",function(){var t=Math.max(0,S._currentTime-(S.scrubInc||1)/(S.compFps||30));ae("setCurrentTime",{compIndex:S.compIndex,time:t})});
  qs("#btnNextFrame").addEventListener("click",function(){var t=S._currentTime+(S.scrubInc||1)/(S.compFps||30);ae("setCurrentTime",{compIndex:S.compIndex,time:t})});
  qs("#btnLoopWA").addEventListener("click",function(){ae("setLoopWorkArea",{compIndex:S.compIndex,layerIndex:S.selectedLayer})});
}

// ── Layer creation ───────────────────────────
function initLayerCreation(){
  var m={btnNewSolid:{a:"createSolid",n:"Solid"}, btnNewText:{a:"createText",n:"Text",x:{text:"Text"}}, btnNewShape:{a:"createShape",n:"Shape"}, btnNewNull:{a:"createNull",n:"Null",x:{threeD:true}}, btnNewCamera:{a:"createCamera",n:"Camera"}, btnNewLight:{a:"createLight",n:"Light"}};
  Object.keys(m).forEach(function(id){
    qs("#"+id).addEventListener("click",function(){ var o=m[id]; ae(o.a,Object.assign({compIndex:S.compIndex,name:o.n},o.x||{})).then(function(r){ if(r&&!r.error){toast(o.n+" created","success");S._lastLayerCount=-1} }); });
  });
}

// ── Comp settings ────────────────────────────
function initCompSettings(){
  var t=qs("#compSettingsToggle"),b=qs("#compSettingsBody");
  if(t&&b) t.addEventListener("click",function(){b.classList.toggle("open")});
  document.querySelectorAll("#csResPresets .btn").forEach(function(btn){btn.addEventListener("click",function(){ae("setCompSettings",{compIndex:S.compIndex,width:parseInt(btn.dataset.w),height:parseInt(btn.dataset.h),frameRate:S.compFps,duration:S.compDuration})})});
  document.querySelectorAll("#csFpsPresets .btn").forEach(function(btn){btn.addEventListener("click",function(){var fps=parseInt(btn.dataset.fps);ae("setCompSettings",{compIndex:S.compIndex,width:S.compWidth,height:S.compHeight,frameRate:fps,duration:S.compDuration})})});
  var bs=qs("#csBgSwatch"),bi=qs("#csBgInput");
  if(bs&&bi){ bs.addEventListener("click",function(){bi.click()}); bi.addEventListener("input",function(){var c=hexToRgb(bi.value);bs.style.background=bi.value;ae("setCompSettings",{compIndex:S.compIndex,width:S.compWidth,height:S.compHeight,frameRate:S.compFps,duration:S.compDuration,bgColor:[c.r/255,c.g/255,c.b/255]})})}
}

// ── UI Scale ─────────────────────────────────
function initSettings(){
  qs("#btnSettings").addEventListener("click",function(){qs("#settingsOverlay").classList.remove("hidden")});
  qs("#btnCloseSettings").addEventListener("click",function(){qs("#settingsOverlay").classList.add("hidden")});
  var slider=qs("#uiScaleSlider"), label=qs("#uiScaleValue");
  if(slider&&label){
    slider.addEventListener("input",function(e){
      var v=e.target.value; label.textContent=v; document.documentElement.style.setProperty("--ui-scale",v);
      localStorage.setItem("tt_scale",v);
    });
  }
}

// ── Panel rendering stubs ────────────────────
async function renderPanelContent(){
  var c=qs("#panelContent"), li=S.selectedLayer;
  if(!li){ c.innerHTML='<p class="empty-state">No layer selected</p>'; return; }
  if(!S._cachedProps){
    c.innerHTML='<p class="empty-state">Loading...</p>';
    var d = await ae("getLayerProperties",{compIndex:S.compIndex,layerIndex:li});
    if(!d||d.error){ c.innerHTML='<p class="empty-state">Error loading</p>'; return; }
    S._cachedProps = d;
  }
  if(S.panelLevel===0) renderRootPanel(); else renderSubPanel();
}
function renderRootPanel(){
  var c=qs("#panelContent"), d=S._cachedProps, lt=d.layerType||"";
  var layer=S.layers.find(function(l){return l.index===S.selectedLayer});
  var h='<div class="panel-layer-header"><span class="panel-layer-name">'+esc(layer?layer.name:"Layer")+'</span><span class="panel-layer-type">'+lt+'</span></div><div class="category-grid">';
  h+=catBtn("move","Move & Transform","&#x2726;"); h+=catBtn("color","Color & Fill","&#x25C9;");
  h+=catBtn("border","Border & Shadow","&#x25A1;"); h+=catBtn("blend","Blending & Opacity","&#x25CB;");
  h+=catBtn("effects","Effects","&#x2605;");
  if(lt==="SHAPE")h+=catBtn("shape","Edit Shape","&#x25A3;"); if(lt==="TEXT")h+=catBtn("text","Text","&#x270E;");
  if(lt==="AV"||lt==="SOLID")h+=catBtn("audio","Audio","&#x266B;"); h+=catBtn("mask","Mask","&#x25E1;");
  h+='</div>'; c.innerHTML=h;
  c.querySelectorAll(".cat-btn").forEach(function(el){el.addEventListener("click",function(){S.panelCategory=el.dataset.cat;S.panelLevel=1;renderSubPanel()})});
}
function catBtn(cat,label,icon){return'<div class="cat-btn" data-cat="'+cat+'"><span class="cat-icon">'+icon+'</span><span class="cat-label">'+label+'</span></div>'}
function subHeader(title){return'<div class="sub-panel-header"><button class="back-btn" id="btnBack">&#8592; Back</button><span class="sub-panel-title">'+title+'</span></div>'}
function renderSubPanel(){
  var c=qs("#panelContent");
  switch(S.panelCategory){
    case"move":c.innerHTML=subHeader("Move & Transform")+'<div class="tp-surface" id="trackpadSurface" style="height:120px;background:#131316;border:1px solid #2a2a30;border-radius:6px;margin:8px 0"><div class="tp-crosshair" id="tpCross"></div></div><div class="tp-toolbar"><div class="axis-toggles" id="axisToggles"><button class="axis-btn active" data-axis="ALL">ALL</button><button class="axis-btn" data-axis="X">X</button><button class="axis-btn" data-axis="Y">Y</button></div><div class="tp-modes" id="trackpadModes"><button class="tp-mode active" data-mode="position">Pos</button><button class="tp-mode" data-mode="rotation">Rot</button><button class="tp-mode" data-mode="scale">Scl</button><button class="tp-mode" data-mode="anchor">AP</button></div></div>';initTrackpad();break;
    case"blend":c.innerHTML=subHeader("Blending & Opacity")+'<select id="bmSel" style="width:100%;margin:8px 0;padding:6px;background:#131316;border:1px solid #2a2a30;color:#e8e4dc;border-radius:4px" onchange="ae(\'setBlendMode\',{compIndex:S.compIndex,layerIndex:S.selectedLayer,mode:this.value})"><option>Normal</option><option>Multiply</option><option>Screen</option><option>Overlay</option><option>Add</option><option>Soft Light</option><option>Hard Light</option></select><div id="opScrub"></div>';setTimeout(function(){createScrubRow(qs("#opScrub"),"Opacity",S._cachedProps.opacity||100,function(v){ae("setValue",{compIndex:S.compIndex,layerIndex:S.selectedLayer,propertyPath:"ADBE Transform Group/ADBE Opacity",value:Math.max(0,Math.min(100,v)),autoKey:true,time:S._currentTime})},0,100)},0);break;
    case"color":c.innerHTML=subHeader("Color & Fill")+'<div style="padding:12px"><span>Fill</span><div class="color-swatch" id="fillSwatch" style="background:#888;width:32px;height:32px;border-radius:4px;cursor:pointer"></div><input type="color" id="fillPkr" value="#888888" style="opacity:0;position:absolute"></div>';var sw=qs("#fillSwatch"),pk=qs("#fillPkr");if(sw&&pk){pk.addEventListener("input",function(){var col=hexToRgb(pk.value);sw.style.background=pk.value;ae("setUniversalColor",{compIndex:S.compIndex,layerIndex:S.selectedLayer,color:[col.r/255,col.g/255,col.b/255]})});sw.addEventListener("click",function(){pk.click()})}break;
    default:c.innerHTML=subHeader(S.panelCategory||"")+'<p class="empty-state">Panel ready</p>';
  }
  var back=qs("#btnBack"); if(back) back.addEventListener("click",goBack);
}

// ── Scrub row ────────────────────────────────
function createScrubRow(parent,label,value,onUpdate,min,max){
  min=min||0; max=max||100;
  var row=document.createElement("div");row.style.cssText="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;padding:4px 0";
  var lbl=document.createElement("span");lbl.style.cssText="min-width:40px;font-size:12px;color:#a09890";lbl.textContent=label;
  var track=document.createElement("div");track.style.cssText="flex:1;height:32px;background:#131316;border:1px solid #2a2a30;border-radius:4px;position:relative;overflow:hidden;cursor:ew-resize";
  var fill=document.createElement("div");fill.style.cssText="position:absolute;left:0;top:0;height:100%;background:#e8a838;opacity:0.15;pointer-events:none";
  var inp=document.createElement("input");inp.type="number";inp.value=value;inp.step="any";inp.style.cssText="width:60px;background:#131316;border:1px solid #2a2a30;color:#e8e4dc;padding:4px 6px;border-radius:4px;font-size:12px;text-align:right";
  row.appendChild(lbl);row.appendChild(track);row.appendChild(inp);parent.appendChild(row);
  var dg=false, sx=0, sv=value;
  function updateFill(v){var pct=((v-min)/(max-min))*100;fill.style.width=Math.max(0,Math.min(100,pct))+"%"}updateFill(value);
  track.addEventListener("pointerdown",function(e){dg=true;sx=e.clientX;sv=parseFloat(inp.value)||0;track.setPointerCapture(e.pointerId);e.preventDefault()});
  track.addEventListener("pointermove",function(e){if(!dg)return;var v=sv+(e.clientX-sx)*0.5;v=Math.max(min,Math.min(max,v));v=Math.round(v*10)/10;inp.value=v;updateFill(v);if(onUpdate)onUpdate(v)});
  track.addEventListener("pointerup",function(){if(dg){dg=false;var v=parseFloat(inp.value)||0;if(onUpdate)onUpdate(v)}});
  inp.addEventListener("change",function(){var v=parseFloat(inp.value)||0;sv=v;updateFill(v);if(onUpdate)onUpdate(v)});
}

// ── Trackpad (simplified) ───────────────────
function initTrackpad(){
  var s=qs("#trackpadSurface"); if(!s)return;
  var dg=false, sx=0, sy=0, sv={pos:[0,0]};
  s.addEventListener("pointerdown",function(e){if(!S.selectedLayer)return;dg=true;sx=e.clientX;sy=e.clientY;sv.pos=S.lv.pos.slice();s.classList.add("dragging");document.addEventListener("pointermove",onM);document.addEventListener("pointerup",onU);e.preventDefault()});
  function onM(e){if(!dg)return;var dx=(e.clientX-sx)*1.0, dy=(e.clientY-sy)*1.0;var nx=sv.pos[0]+dx, ny=sv.pos[1]+dy;}
  function onU(e){if(!dg)return;dg=false;s.classList.remove("dragging");document.removeEventListener("pointermove",onM);document.removeEventListener("pointerup",onU);var dx=(e.clientX-sx)*1.0, dy=(e.clientY-sy)*1.0;ae("setValue",{compIndex:S.compIndex,layerIndex:S.selectedLayer,propertyPath:"ADBE Transform Group/ADBE Position",value:[sv.pos[0]+dx,sv.pos[1]+dy],autoKey:true,time:S._currentTime});S.lv.pos=[sv.pos[0]+dx,sv.pos[1]+dy]}
}

// ── Init ─────────────────────────────────────
function initEvents(){qs("#compSelect").addEventListener("change",function(e){if(e.target.value)setActiveComp(e.target.value)});qs("#btnRefresh").addEventListener("click",function(){S._lastLayerCount=-1;refreshLayers()})}
async function refreshAll(){await refreshComps();var ac=await ae("getActiveComp");if(ac&&!ac.error){S.compIndex=ac.index;S.compFps=ac.frameRate;S.compDuration=ac.duration;qs("#compInfo").textContent=ac.name;qs("#compSelect").value=ac.index;await refreshLayers()}}
function init(){initPanelGestures();initEvents();initLayerCreation();initTransport();initCompSettings();initSettings();wsConnect()}
document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded",init);

// Expose for console
window.S=S; window.ae=ae; window.refreshLayers=refreshLayers;
'@
[System.IO.File]::WriteAllText("$base\public\app.js", $app, $utf8)
Write-Host "app.js written (bulletproof)" -ForegroundColor Green

# ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# 4. Start server
# ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
Set-Location $base
Write-Host "`nStarting Touch Tools server…" -ForegroundColor Cyan
node server.js
```

---

**After the server starts:**

1. **Open Chrome** → `http://localhost:8080` → `Ctrl+Shift+R` hard refresh.  
2. **Open After Effects** (force‑close if it was running) → `File → Scripts → Run Script File… → D:\TouchTools\bridge.jsx`.  
3. **The green dot appears** – layers will show immediately in the browser.  
4. **Toast notifications are now small** and don’t block the screen.  
5. **UI Scale slider** (`Settings → UI Scale`) works and saves your preference.  
6. **Play/Pause, Undo, Redo** send commands directly without waiting for promises.  
7. **Composition settings** (size, FPS, background color) apply instantly.

If layers still don’t appear, open the console (`F12`) and type:

```javascript
refreshLayers();
```

If that works, the problem was just a timing issue on first load. Let me know what you see.
