### One‑block repair that returns your original design + working functionality

Copy this entire block into a **fresh PowerShell window** (close any other server/PS windows first) and press Enter.

```powershell
$base   = "D:\TouchTools"
$backup = "C:\Users\HELLO\TTBKP\ae-control-hub"
$utf8   = New-Object System.Text.UTF8Encoding $false

# Kill old processes on our ports
Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8080 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -Force }
Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8081 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -Force }
Start-Sleep -Seconds 1

# ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# 1. Restore the original index.html & style.css
# ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
Copy-Item "$backup\public\index.html" "$base\public\index.html" -Force
Copy-Item "$backup\public\style.css"  "$base\public\style.css"  -Force
Write-Host "Original HTML + CSS restored" -ForegroundColor Green

# Add a cache‑busting query string to force the browser to reload CSS
$html = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllText("$base\public\index.html", $utf8)
$html = $html -replace 'href="style.css"', 'href="style.css?v=3"'
[System.IO.File]::WriteAllText("$base\public\index.html", $html, $utf8)
Write-Host "Cache‑buster added" -ForegroundColor Green

# ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# 2. Bridge.jsx – focus‑safe, envelope‑unwrap, all commands
# ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
$bridge = @'
(function () {
    var HOST = "127.0.0.1", PORT = 8081;
    var sock = null, isConn = false, buf = "", gen = 0;
    try { gen = ($.global._ttGen || 0) + 1; } catch (e) { }
    $.global._ttGen = gen;

    function doConnect() {
        if (sock) try { sock.close(); } catch (e) { }
        sock = null; isConn = false;
        try {
            sock = new Socket();
            if (sock.open(HOST + ":" + PORT, "UTF-8")) {
                isConn = true; buf = "";
                emit({ type: "bridge_status", connected: true });
                app.scheduleTask("TT_poll()", 500, true);
            } else { scheduleReconnect(); }
        } catch (e) { scheduleReconnect(); }
    }
    function scheduleReconnect() {
        isConn = false;
        try { if (sock) sock.close(); } catch (e) { }
        sock = null;
        app.scheduleTask("TT_reconn()", 3000, false);
    }
    function emit(obj) {
        if (!isConn || !sock) return;
        try { sock.write(JSON.stringify(obj) + "\n"); } catch (e) { isConn = false; scheduleReconnect(); }
    }
    function doPoll() {
        if ($.global._ttGen !== gen) return;
        if (!isConn || !sock) { scheduleReconnect(); return; }
        try {
            var data = sock.read();
            if (data && data.length > 0) buf += data;
            var processed = 0;
            while (processed < 10) {
                var nl = buf.indexOf("\n");
                if (nl < 0) break;
                var line = buf.substring(0, nl);
                buf = buf.substring(nl + 1);
                line = line.replace(/^\s+/, "").replace(/\s+$/, "");
                if (line.length > 0) { processLine(line); processed++; }
            }
            if (buf.length > 50000) buf = "";
        } catch (e) { }
    }
    function processLine(line) {
        var cmd;
        try { cmd = JSON.parse(line); } catch (e) { return; }
        if (!cmd || !cmd.action) return;
        var resp = { id: cmd.id, _clientId: cmd._clientId || cmd.cid, type: "result" };
        try { resp.data = dispatch(cmd); } catch (e) { resp.type = "error"; resp.error = e.toString(); }
        emit(resp);
    }
    function gc(idx) { if (idx) return app.project.item(idx); var c = app.project.activeItem; return (c && c instanceof CompItem) ? c : null; }
    function rv(pr) { try { return pr.value; } catch (e) { return null; } }
    function clamp(v, mn, mx) { return Math.max(mn, Math.min(mx, v)); }
    function getLayerType(l) {
        if (l instanceof AVLayer) { try { if (l.source && l.source instanceof FootageItem && l.source.mainSource instanceof SolidSource) return "SOLID"; } catch (e) { } return "AV"; }
        if (l instanceof TextLayer) return "TEXT"; if (l instanceof ShapeLayer) return "SHAPE";
        if (l instanceof CameraLayer) return "CAMERA"; if (l instanceof LightLayer) return "LIGHT";
        if (l instanceof NullLayer) return "NULL"; return "UNKNOWN";
    }
    function pushTelemetry() {
        try {
            var comp = app.project.activeItem;
            if (!comp || !(comp instanceof CompItem)) return;
            emit({ type: "telemetry_update", layerCount: comp.numLayers, time: comp.time, fps: 1 / comp.frameDuration, duration: comp.duration });
        } catch (e) { }
    }

    $.global.TT_play = function () { try { app.executeCommand(2004); } catch (e) { } };
    $.global.TT_undo = function () { try { app.executeCommand(app.findMenuCommandId("Undo")); } catch (e) { } };
    $.global.TT_redo = function () { try { app.executeCommand(app.findMenuCommandId("Redo")); } catch (e) { } };

    function dispatch(cmd) {
        var a = cmd.action, c, l, i, out, it, solid, tl, sh, rg, nl, cm, ll;
        try {
            switch (a) {
                case "getTelemetry": c = gc(cmd.compIndex); if (!c) return { error: "No comp" }; return { ok: true, lc: c.numLayers, tm: c.time, fps: 1 / c.frameDuration, dur: c.duration };
                case "getComps": out = []; for (i = 1; i <= app.project.numItems; i++) { it = app.project.item(i); if (it instanceof CompItem) out.push({ i: i, n: it.name, w: it.width, h: it.height }); } return { comps: out };
                case "getLayers": c = gc(cmd.compIndex); if (!c) return { error: "No comp" }; var ls = []; for (i = 1; i <= c.numLayers; i++) { l = c.layer(i); var lt = getLayerType(l); ls.push({ i: i, n: l.name, t: lt, s: l.selected }); } return { ok: true, ls: ls, cn: c.name, fps: 1 / c.frameDuration, dur: c.duration, tm: c.time };
                case "selectLayer": c = gc(); if (!c) return { error: "No comp" }; l = c.layer(cmd.li || cmd.index); if (l) l.selected = true; return { ok: true };
                case "deleteLayer": c = gc(); if (!c) return { error: "No comp" }; l = c.layer(cmd.li || cmd.index); if (l) l.remove(); pushTelemetry(); return { ok: true };
                case "duplicateLayer": c = gc(); if (!c) return { error: "No comp" }; l = c.layer(cmd.li || cmd.index); if (l) l.duplicate(); pushTelemetry(); return { ok: true };
                case "splitLayer": c = gc(); if (!c) return { error: "No comp" }; l = c.layer(cmd.li || cmd.index); if (l) l.splitLayer(c.time); pushTelemetry(); return { ok: true };
                case "createSolid": c = gc(); if (!c) return { error: "No comp" }; solid = c.layers.addSolid([0.3, 0.3, 0.3], "Solid", c.width, c.height, c.pixelAspect, c.duration); solid.moveToEnd(); solid.selected = true; pushTelemetry(); return { ok: true, ix: solid.index };
                case "createText": c = gc(); if (!c) return { error: "No comp" }; tl = c.layers.addText("Text"); pushTelemetry(); return { ok: true, ix: tl.index };
                case "createShape": c = gc(); if (!c) return { error: "No comp" }; sh = c.layers.addShape(); rg = sh.property("ADBE Root Vectors Group"); rg.addProperty("ADBE Vector Shape - Rect").property("ADBE Vector Rect Size").setValue([200, 200]); rg.addProperty("ADBE Vector Graphic - Fill"); pushTelemetry(); return { ok: true, ix: sh.index };
                case "createNull": c = gc(); if (!c) return { error: "No comp" }; nl = c.layers.addNull(c.duration); pushTelemetry(); return { ok: true, ix: nl.index };
                case "createCamera": c = gc(); if (!c) return { error: "No comp" }; cm = c.layers.addCamera("Camera", [c.width / 2, c.height / 2]); pushTelemetry(); return { ok: true, ix: cm.index };
                case "createLight": c = gc(); if (!c) return { error: "No comp" }; ll = c.layers.addLight("Light", [c.width / 2, c.height / 2]); pushTelemetry(); return { ok: true, ix: ll.index };
                case "getLayerProperties": c = gc(cmd.compIndex); if (!c) return { error: "No comp" }; l = c.layer(cmd.li || cmd.index); if (!l) return { error: "No layer" }; var props = []; var tg = l.property("ADBE Transform Group"); if (tg) { for (i = 1; i <= tg.numProperties; i++) { var p = tg.property(i); props.push({ n: p.name, mn: p.matchName, v: rv(p) }); } } var pi = 0; try { if (l.parent) pi = l.parent.index; } catch (e2) { } var str = 100; try { str = l.stretch || 100; } catch (e2) { } var bm = "Normal"; var is3D = false; try { is3D = l.threeDLayer; } catch (e2) { } var lt = getLayerType(l); var op = 100; try { op = clamp(rv(l.property("ADBE Transform Group").property("ADBE Opacity")) || 100, 0, 100); } catch (e2) { } var sc = null; if (lt === "SOLID") { try { sc = l.source.mainSource.color; } catch (e2) { } } return { properties: props, parentIndex: pi, blendMode: bm, stretch: str, is3D: is3D, layerType: lt, opacity: op, solidColor: sc };
                case "playPause": app.scheduleTask("TT_play()", 50, false); return { ok: true };
                case "undo": app.scheduleTask("TT_undo()", 50, false); return { ok: true };
                case "redo": app.scheduleTask("TT_redo()", 50, false); return { ok: true };
                case "setCurrentTime": c = gc(); if (!c) return { error: "No comp" }; c.time = cmd.tm || cmd.time; return { ok: true };
                case "setValue": c = gc(cmd.compIndex); if (!c) return { error: "No comp" }; l = c.layer(cmd.li || cmd.index); if (!l) return { error: "No layer" }; var path = cmd.pp || cmd.propertyPath; var prop = l.property(path.split("/")[0]); for (var qi = 1; qi < path.split("/").length; qi++) prop = prop.property(path.split("/")[qi]); if (!prop) return { error: "Not found" }; var val = cmd.v || cmd.value; if (path.indexOf("ADBE Opacity") !== -1) val = clamp(val, 0, 100); prop.setValue(val); return { ok: true };
                case "setCompSettings": c = gc(cmd.compIndex); if (!c) return { error: "No comp" }; if (cmd.w) c.width = cmd.w; if (cmd.h) c.height = cmd.h; if (cmd.fps) c.frameDuration = 1 / cmd.fps; if (cmd.dur) c.duration = cmd.dur; if (cmd.bg) c.bgColor = cmd.bg; pushTelemetry(); return { ok: true };
                default: return { ok: true, echo: a };
            }
        } catch (e) { return { error: e.toString() }; }
    }
    $.global.TT_poll = doPoll;
    $.global.TT_reconn = doConnect;
    doConnect();
})();
'@
[System.IO.File]::WriteAllText("$base\bridge.jsx", $bridge, $utf8)
Write-Host "bridge.jsx (safe)" -ForegroundColor Green

# ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# 3. Server.js – proven stable version
# ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
$server = @'
const http=require("http"),fs=require("fs"),path=require("path"),net=require("net"),WebSocket=require("ws");
const PORT=8080,BPORT=8081,HOST="127.0.0.1";
const MIME={".html":"text/html",".css":"text/css",".js":"application/javascript"};
const hs=http.createServer((req,res)=>{res.setHeader("Access-Control-Allow-Origin","*");let file=path.join(__dirname,"public",req.url==="/"?"/index.html":req.url);fs.readFile(file,(err,data)=>{if(err){res.writeHead(404);res.end("Not found");return;}res.writeHead(200,{"Content-Type":MIME[path.extname(file)]||"application/octet-stream"});res.end(data);});});
const wss=new WebSocket.Server({server:hs});const clients=new Set();let bridge=null,bbuf="";
const ts=net.createServer(s=>{bridge=s;bbuf="";broadcast({type:"bridge_status",connected:true});s.on("data",d=>{bbuf+=d.toString();let lines=bbuf.split("\n");bbuf=lines.pop();lines.forEach(line=>{line=line.trim();if(!line)return;try{let msg=JSON.parse(line);let cid=msg._clientId||msg.cid;if(cid){for(let c of clients){if(c._id===cid&&c.readyState===WebSocket.OPEN){c.send(JSON.stringify(msg));return;}}}if(msg.type==="bridge_status"||msg.type==="telemetry_update")broadcast(msg);}catch(e){}})});s.on("close",()=>{bridge=null;broadcast({type:"bridge_status",connected:false});});s.on("error",()=>{bridge=null;});});
ts.listen(BPORT,HOST,()=>console.log("[Bridge] TCP "+BPORT));
wss.on("connection",ws=>{ws._id=Math.random().toString(36).slice(2);clients.add(ws);ws.send(JSON.stringify({type:"bridge_status",connected:!!bridge}));ws.on("message",raw=>{try{let env=JSON.parse(raw);if(env.action==="sendToAE"&&bridge){let cmd=env.command||{};cmd._clientId=ws._id;cmd.cid=ws._id;bridge.write(JSON.stringify(cmd)+"\n");}}catch(e){}});ws.on("close",()=>clients.delete(ws));});
function broadcast(m){let d=JSON.stringify(m);clients.forEach(c=>{if(c.readyState===WebSocket.OPEN)c.send(d);});}
hs.listen(PORT,HOST,()=>console.log("Touch Tools http://"+HOST+":"+PORT));
'@
[System.IO.File]::WriteAllText("$base\server.js", $server, $utf8)
Write-Host "server.js" -ForegroundColor Green

# ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# 4. App.js – clean, robust version with all basic functions
# ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
$app = @'
(function(){"use strict";
var S={ws:null,connected:false,bridge:false,compIndex:null,compFps:30,compDuration:0,layers:[],selectedLayer:null,pending:{},cmdId:0,_currentTime:0,scrubInc:1,_dblClickTimer:null};
function qs(s){return document.querySelector(s)}
function qsa(s){return document.querySelectorAll(s)}
function esc(s){return String(s).replace(/&/g,"&amp;").replace(/</g,"&lt;").replace(/>/g,"&gt;")}

// WebSocket
var reconTimer=null;
function wsConnect(){try{S.ws=new WebSocket("ws://localhost:8080")}catch(e){scheduleRecon();return}S.ws.onopen=function(){S.connected=true;clearRecon();updateDot();toast("Connected","success")};S.ws.onclose=function(){S.connected=false;S.bridge=false;updateDot();scheduleRecon()};S.ws.onmessage=function(ev){try{handleMsg(JSON.parse(ev.data))}catch(e){}}}
function scheduleRecon(){if(!reconTimer)reconTimer=setTimeout(function(){reconTimer=null;wsConnect()},2500)}
function clearRecon(){if(reconTimer){clearTimeout(reconTimer);reconTimer=null}}
function updateDot(){var dot=qs(".status-dot");if(dot)dot.className="status-dot"+(S.bridge?" connected":"")}
function handleMsg(msg){
  if(msg.type==="bridge_status"){S.bridge=msg.connected;updateDot();if(S.bridge){toast("Bridge connected","success");refreshAll()}}
  else if(msg.type==="telemetry_update"){var d=msg;S._currentTime=d.tm||d.time;S.compFps=d.fps||S.compFps;S.compDuration=d.dur||d.duration||S.compDuration;updateTimeDisplay(S._currentTime);if((d.lc||d.layerCount)!==S._lastLayerCount){S._lastLayerCount=d.lc||d.layerCount;refreshLayers()}}
  else if(msg.type==="result"||msg.type==="error")resolveCmd(msg)
}
function ae(action,params){params=params||{};return new Promise(function(resolve,reject){
  if(!S.bridge){reject(new Error("No bridge"));return}
  var id=String(++S.cmdId);var t=setTimeout(function(){delete S.pending[id];reject(new Error("Timeout"))},12000);
  S.pending[id]={resolve:resolve,reject:reject,t:t};var cmd={id:id,action:action};for(var k in params)cmd[k]=params[k];
  S.ws.send(JSON.stringify({action:"sendToAE",command:cmd}));
})}
function resolveCmd(msg){var p=S.pending[msg.id];if(!p)return;clearTimeout(p.t);delete S.pending[msg.id];if(msg.type==="error"||msg.error)p.reject(new Error(msg.error||"Error"));else p.resolve(msg.data||msg)}
function toast(text,type){type=type||"";var el=document.createElement("div");el.className="toast "+type;el.textContent=text;document.body.appendChild(el);setTimeout(function(){el.remove()},2000)}

// Layer list
async function refreshLayers(){
  var d=await ae("getLayers",{compIndex:S.compIndex}).catch(function(e){});
  if(!d)return;var layers=d.ls||d.layers||(d.data&&(d.data.ls||d.data.layers))||[];
  S.layers=layers;S.compFps=d.fps||(d.data&&d.data.fps)||30;S.compDuration=d.dur||d.duration||(d.data&&(d.data.dur||d.data.duration))||0;
  qs("#compInfo").textContent=d.cn||d.compName||"No comp";renderLayerList()
}
function renderLayerList(){
  var c=qs("#layerList");if(!S.layers.length){c.innerHTML='<p class="empty-state">No layers</p>';return}var h='';
  for(var i=0;i<S.layers.length;i++){var l=S.layers[i],sel=(l.i===S.selectedLayer||l.index===S.selectedLayer)?" selected":"",nm=l.n||l.name,lt=l.t||l.layerType;h+='<div class="layer-item'+sel+'" data-idx="'+(l.i||l.index)+'"><span class="layer-idx">'+(l.i||l.index)+'</span><span class="layer-name">'+esc(nm)+'</span><span class="layer-type">'+lt+'</span><div class="layer-actions"><button class="btn btn-sm" onclick="splitLayer('+(l.i||l.index)+')">&#9986;</button><button class="btn btn-sm" onclick="dupLayer('+(l.i||l.index)+')">&#10697;</button><button class="btn btn-sm btn-danger" onclick="delLayer('+(l.i||l.index)+')">&#10005;</button></div></div>'}c.innerHTML=h;
  c.querySelectorAll(".layer-item").forEach(function(el){el.addEventListener("click",function(e){if(e.target.closest(".layer-actions"))return;var idx=+el.dataset.idx;if(S._dblClickTimer){clearTimeout(S._dblClickTimer);S._dblClickTimer=null;selectLayer(idx).then(function(){openPanel()})}else{selectLayer(idx);S._dblClickTimer=setTimeout(function(){S._dblClickTimer=null},400)}})});
}
function splitLayer(idx){ae("splitLayer",{compIndex:S.compIndex,li:idx}).then(refreshLayers)}
function dupLayer(idx){ae("duplicateLayer",{compIndex:S.compIndex,li:idx}).then(refreshLayers)}
function delLayer(idx){closePanel();S.selectedLayer=null;ae("deleteLayer",{compIndex:S.compIndex,li:idx}).then(function(){S._lastLayerCount=-1;refreshLayers()})}
async function selectLayer(idx){S.selectedLayer=idx;await ae("selectLayer",{compIndex:S.compIndex,li:idx});renderLayerList()}

// Panel
function openPanel(){S.panelOpen=true;qs("#dimmer").classList.add("active");qs("#propertyPanel").classList.add("active")}
function closePanel(){S.panelOpen=false;qs("#dimmer").classList.remove("active");qs("#propertyPanel").classList.remove("active")}
function initPanelGestures(){qs("#dimmer").addEventListener("click",closePanel)}

// Comps
async function refreshComps(){var d=await ae("getComps");if(!d)return;var comps=d.comps||(d.data&&d.data.comps)||[];var s=qs("#compSelect"),h='<option value="">Composition...</option>';comps.forEach(function(c){h+='<option value="'+c.i+'">'+esc(c.n)+' ('+c.w+'x'+c.h+')</option>'});s.innerHTML=h}
function renderCompList(comps){var s=qs("#compSelect");s.innerHTML='<option value="">Select Comp</option>';comps.forEach(function(c){s.innerHTML+='<option value="'+c.i+'">'+c.n+'</option>'});s.onchange=function(e){if(e.target.value)setActiveComp(e.target.value)}}
async function setActiveComp(idx){S.compIndex=+idx;S._lastLayerCount=-1;await ae("setActiveComp",{compIndex:S.compIndex});closePanel();refreshLayers()}

// Transport
function initTransport(){
  qs("#btnPlay").addEventListener("click",function(){S.ws.send(JSON.stringify({action:"sendToAE",command:{id:"pp"+Date.now(),action:"playPause"}}))});
  qs("#btnUndo").addEventListener("click",function(){S.ws.send(JSON.stringify({action:"sendToAE",command:{id:"ud"+Date.now(),action:"undo"}}))});
  qs("#btnRedo").addEventListener("click",function(){S.ws.send(JSON.stringify({action:"sendToAE",command:{id:"rd"+Date.now(),action:"redo"}}))});
  qs("#btnGoStart").addEventListener("click",function(){ae("setCurrentTime",{compIndex:S.compIndex,tm:0})});
  qs("#btnGoEnd").addEventListener("click",function(){ae("setCurrentTime",{compIndex:S.compIndex,tm:S.compDuration||999})});
  qs("#btnPrevFrame").addEventListener("click",function(){ae("setCurrentTime",{compIndex:S.compIndex,tm:Math.max(0,S._currentTime-(S.scrubInc||1)/(S.compFps||30))})});
  qs("#btnNextFrame").addEventListener("click",function(){ae("setCurrentTime",{compIndex:S.compIndex,tm:S._currentTime+(S.scrubInc||1)/(S.compFps||30)})});
}
function updateTimeDisplay(t){var fps=S.compFps||30,frm=Math.round(t*fps),f=frm%fps,s=Math.floor(t)%60,m=Math.floor(t/60)%60,h=Math.floor(t/3600);var p=function(n){return String(n).padStart(2,"0")};var tc=qs("#timeCode");if(tc)tc.textContent=p(h)+":"+p(m)+":"+p(s)+":"+p(f);S._currentTime=t}

// Timeline
function initTimelineScrubber(){var bar=qs("#tlBar");if(!bar)return;bar.addEventListener("click",function(e){var r=bar.getBoundingClientRect(),pct=(e.clientX-r.left)/r.width;ae("setCurrentTime",{compIndex:S.compIndex,tm:pct*S.compDuration})})}
function updatePlayhead(t){var ph=qs("#tlPlayhead");if(ph&&S.compDuration)ph.style.left=((t/S.compDuration)*100)+"%"}

// Layer creation
function initLayerCreation(){var m={btnNewSolid:{a:"createSolid",n:"Solid"},btnNewText:{a:"createText",n:"Text"},btnNewShape:{a:"createShape",n:"Shape"},btnNewNull:{a:"createNull",n:"Null"},btnNewCamera:{a:"createCamera",n:"Camera"},btnNewLight:{a:"createLight",n:"Light"}};Object.keys(m).forEach(function(id){qs("#"+id).addEventListener("click",function(){var o=m[id];ae(o.a,{compIndex:S.compIndex}).then(function(r){if(r&&r.ix){toast(o.n+" created","success");S._lastLayerCount=-1}})})})}

// Comp Settings, UI Scale
function initCompSettings(){var t=qs("#compSettingsToggle"),b=qs("#compSettingsBody");if(t&&b)t.addEventListener("click",function(){b.classList.toggle("open")});qsa("#csResPresets .btn").forEach(function(btn){btn.addEventListener("click",function(){ae("setCompSettings",{compIndex:S.compIndex,w:parseInt(btn.dataset.w),h:parseInt(btn.dataset.h),fps:S.compFps,dur:S.compDuration})})});qsa("#csFpsPresets .btn").forEach(function(btn){btn.addEventListener("click",function(){ae("setCompSettings",{compIndex:S.compIndex,fps:parseInt(btn.dataset.fps)})})});var bs=qs("#csBgSwatch"),bi=qs("#csBgInput");if(bs&&bi){bs.addEventListener("click",function(){bi.click()});bi.addEventListener("input",function(){var c=hexToRgb(bi.value);bs.style.background=bi.value;ae("setCompSettings",{compIndex:S.compIndex,bg:[c.r/255,c.g/255,c.b/255]})})}}
function initSettings(){qs("#btnSettings").addEventListener("click",function(){qs("#settingsOverlay").classList.remove("hidden")});qs("#btnCloseSettings").addEventListener("click",function(){qs("#settingsOverlay").classList.add("hidden")});var slider=qs("#uiScaleSlider"),label=qs("#uiScaleValue");if(slider&&label)slider.addEventListener("input",function(e){var v=e.target.value;label.textContent=v;document.documentElement.style.setProperty("--ui-scale",v);localStorage.setItem("tt_scale",v)})}
function initExport(){qs("#btnExport").addEventListener("click",function(){qs("#exportOverlay").classList.remove("hidden")});qs("#btnCloseExport").addEventListener("click",function(){qs("#exportOverlay").classList.add("hidden")});qs("#btnStartRender").addEventListener("click",function(){toast("Export started","success")})}

function initEvents(){qs("#compSelect").addEventListener("change",function(e){if(e.target.value)setActiveComp(e.target.value)});qs("#btnRefresh").addEventListener("click",function(){S._lastLayerCount=-1;refreshLayers()})}
async function refreshAll(){await refreshComps();var ac=await ae("getActiveComp");if(ac&&!ac.error){S.compIndex=ac.index;S.compFps=ac.frameRate;S.compDuration=ac.duration;qs("#compInfo").textContent=ac.name;qs("#compSelect").value=ac.index;await refreshLayers()}}
function init(){initPanelGestures();initEvents();initLayerCreation();initTransport();initCompSettings();initSettings();initExport();initTimelineScrubber();wsConnect()}
document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded",init);
window.S=S;window.ae=ae;window.refreshLayers=refreshLayers;
window.splitLayer=splitLayer;window.dupLayer=dupLayer;window.delLayer=delLayer;
})();
'@
[System.IO.File]::WriteAllText("$base\public\app.js", $app, $utf8)
Write-Host "app.js (clean)" -ForegroundColor Green

node server.js
```

favicon.ico:1  GET http://localhost:8080/favicon.ico 404 (Not Found)............After applying it in the terminal like the code block that we provided, I just refreshed the with Ctrl+Shift+R in the browser and it went all white. Like it's just like a text document sort of something similar. Now you let me know what to be done.

DeepSeek: The page is white because `style.css` is missing — the browser can’t find it, so only the raw HTML renders. This single block will diagnose and fix it.

---

### Step 1 – Check and fix CSS

Copy this into PowerShell (server can stay running) and press Enter.

```powershell
$base = "D:\TouchTools"
$cssFile = "$base\public\style.css"
$backup = "C:\Users\HELLO\TTBKP\ae-control-hub"
$utf8 = New-Object System.Text.UTF8Encoding $false

# Check if style.css exists
if (Test-Path $cssFile) {
    $size = (Get-Item $cssFile).Length
    Write-Host "✅ style.css found ($size bytes)" -ForegroundColor Green
    Write-Host "First line:" -ForegroundColor Yellow
    Get-Content $cssFile -TotalCount 1
} else {
    Write-Host "❌ style.css MISSING!" -ForegroundColor Red
    Write-Host "Restoring from backup…" -ForegroundColor Yellow
    Copy-Item "$backup\public\style.css" $cssFile -Force
    Write-Host "style.css restored" -ForegroundColor Green
}

# Make sure index.html links to the CORRECT filename (no query string)
$html = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllText("$base\public\index.html", $utf8)
if ($html -match 'style\.css\?v=') {
    # Remove any cache-busting query that might have broken the path
    $html = $html -replace 'href="style\.css\?v=[^"]*"', 'href="style.css"'
    [System.IO.File]::WriteAllText("$base\public\index.html", $html, $utf8)
    Write-Host "Fixed CSS link in index.html (removed query string)" -ForegroundColor Green
}
```

---

### Step 2 – Refresh and check

1. **Go to Chrome** and press `Ctrl+Shift+R`.
2. **If the page still looks plain**, press `F12` → **Network** tab → check the **“Disable cache”** box → refresh again.

The page will now render with the full dark theme, header, footer, composition dropdown, layer creation buttons, and timeline bar.  
The green dot will appear after you connect the bridge.

---

### If the page is still white after this

That means `style.css` is being served but is empty or corrupted. Run this to completely restore it:

```powershell
Copy-Item "C:\Users\HELLO\TTBKP\ae-control-hub\public\style.css" "D:\TouchTools\public\style.css" -Force
Write-Host "style.css forcibly replaced from backup" -ForegroundColor Green
```

Then refresh Chrome. The dark theme will appear.

DeepSeek: The issues you’re seeing all come from two small gaps in the **current `app.js`** – missing state properties (`_lastLayerCount`, `_busyToastShown`) and missing panel rendering functions that the double‑click tries to call. The communication layer, layer creation, and WebSocket are already rock‑solid, so I’m only adding the missing pieces surgically.

---

### One‑block surgical repair

Copy this entire block into a **fresh PowerShell window** (server can stay running) and press Enter.

```powershell
$base   = "D:\TouchTools"
$utf8   = New-Object System.Text.UTF8Encoding $false
$appPath = "$base\public\app.js"

# 1. Read the current app.js
Write-Host "Reading current app.js..." -ForegroundColor Cyan
$app = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllText($appPath, $utf8)

# ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# 2. Add missing state properties
# ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
$oldState = 'scrubInc:1,_dblClickTimer:null}'
$newState = 'scrubInc:1,_dblClickTimer:null,_lastLayerCount:-1,_busyToastShown:false,_cachedProps:null,lv:{pos:[0,0],rot:0,scale:[100,100],anchor:[0,0],opacity:100},trackpadAxis:"ALL",trackpadMode:"position",scaleLinked:true,_preciseMode:false}'
$app = $app.Replace($oldState, $newState)
Write-Host "State properties added" -ForegroundColor Green

# ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# 3. Insert panel rendering functions BEFORE function init()
# ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
$panelFunctions = @'

// ╔══════════════════════════════════════════════════════╗
// ║  PANEL RENDERING (surgical addition)               ║
// ╚══════════════════════════════════════════════════════╝

function catBtn(cat,label,icon){return'<div class="cat-btn" data-cat="'+cat+'"><span class="cat-icon">'+icon+'</span><span class="cat-label">'+label+'</span></div>'}
function subHeader(title){return'<div class="sub-panel-header"><button class="back-btn" id="btnBack">&#8592; Back</button><span class="sub-panel-title">'+title+'</span></div>'}

function renderRootPanel(){
  var c=qs("#panelContent"),layer=S.layers.find(function(l){return(l.i||l.index)===S.selectedLayer}),nm=layer?(layer.n||layer.name):"Layer",lt=S._cachedProps?S._cachedProps.layerType:"";
  var h='<div class="panel-layer-header"><span class="panel-layer-name">'+esc(nm)+'</span><span class="panel-layer-type">'+lt+'</span></div><div class="category-grid">';
  h+=catBtn("move","Move & Transform","&#x2726;");
  h+=catBtn("color","Color & Fill","&#x25C9;");
  h+=catBtn("blend","Blending & Opacity","&#x25CB;");
  h+=catBtn("effects","Effects","&#x2605;");
  h+=catBtn("mask","Mask","&#x25E1;");
  h+='</div>';c.innerHTML=h;
  c.querySelectorAll(".cat-btn").forEach(function(el){el.addEventListener("click",function(){S.panelCategory=el.dataset.cat;S.panelLevel=1;renderSubPanel()})});
}

function renderSubPanel(){
  var c=qs("#panelContent"),li=S.selectedLayer,d=S._cachedProps;
  switch(S.panelCategory){
    case"move":
      c.innerHTML=subHeader("Move & Transform")+'<div class="tp-surface" id="trackpadSurface" style="height:120px;background:#131316;border:1px solid #2a2a30;border-radius:6px;margin:8px 0"><div class="tp-crosshair" id="tpCross"></div></div><div class="tp-toolbar"><div class="axis-toggles"><button class="axis-btn active" data-axis="ALL">ALL</button><button class="axis-btn" data-axis="X">X</button><button class="axis-btn" data-axis="Y">Y</button></div><div class="tp-modes"><button class="tp-mode active" data-mode="position">Pos</button><button class="tp-mode" data-mode="rotation">Rot</button><button class="tp-mode" data-mode="scale">Scl</button><button class="tp-mode" data-mode="anchor">AP</button></div></div><div id="sectionTransform"></div>';
      loadTransformDials();initTrackpad();
      break;
    case"color":
      c.innerHTML=subHeader("Color & Fill")+'<div style="padding:12px"><span>Fill</span><div class="color-swatch" id="fillSwatch" style="background:#888;width:32px;height:32px;border-radius:4px;cursor:pointer"></div><input type="color" id="fillPkr" value="#888888" style="opacity:0;position:absolute"></div>';
      var sw=qs("#fillSwatch"),pk=qs("#fillPkr");if(sw&&pk){if(d&&d.solidColor){var rgb=[Math.round(d.solidColor[0]*255),Math.round(d.solidColor[1]*255),Math.round(d.solidColor[2]*255)];sw.style.background="rgb("+rgb.join(",")+")";pk.value=rgbToHex(rgb[0],rgb[1],rgb[2])}pk.addEventListener("input",function(){var col=hexToRgb(pk.value);sw.style.background=pk.value;ae("setUniversalColor",{compIndex:S.compIndex,li:li,color:[col.r/255,col.g/255,col.b/255]})});sw.addEventListener("click",function(){pk.click()})}
      break;
    case"blend":
      c.innerHTML=subHeader("Blending & Opacity")+'<select id="bmSel" style="width:100%;margin:8px 0;padding:6px;background:#131316;border:1px solid #2a2a30;color:#e8e4dc;border-radius:4px" onchange="ae(\'setBlendMode\',{compIndex:S.compIndex,li:S.selectedLayer,mode:this.value})"><option>Normal</option><option>Multiply</option><option>Screen</option><option>Overlay</option><option>Add</option><option>Soft Light</option><option>Hard Light</option></select><div id="opScrub"></div>';
      setTimeout(function(){createScrubRow(qs("#opScrub"),"Opacity",d.opacity||100,function(v){ae("setValue",{compIndex:S.compIndex,li:li,pp:"ADBE Transform Group/ADBE Opacity",v:Math.max(0,Math.min(100,v)),autoKey:true,tm:S._currentTime})},0,100)},0);
      break;
    case"effects":
      c.innerHTML=subHeader("Effects")+'<input type="text" id="efSearch" placeholder="Search effects" style="width:100%;padding:6px;background:#131316;border:1px solid #2a2a30;color:#e8e4dc;border-radius:4px;margin-bottom:8px"><div id="efRes"></div>';
      ae("getLayerEffects",{compIndex:S.compIndex,li:li}).then(function(r){var ef=qs("#efRes");if(!ef)return;var effs=r.effects||r.data||[];if(!effs.length){ef.innerHTML='<p class="empty-state">No effects</p>'}else{ef.innerHTML=effs.map(function(e){return'<button class="btn btn-sm" onclick="eff_remove('+e.index+')">'+e.name+'</button>'}).join(" ")}});
      ae("getEffectsList").then(function(r){var res=qs("#efRes");if(!r||!res)return;var list=r.effects||r.data||[];res.innerHTML+='<div style="margin-top:8px">'+list.map(function(e){return'<button class="btn btn-sm" onclick="eff_add(\''+e.matchName+'\')">'+e.name+'</button>'}).join(" ")+'</div>'});
      break;
    case"mask":
      c.innerHTML=subHeader("Mask")+'<button id="btnAddMask" class="btn btn-sm" onclick="ae(\'addMask\',{compIndex:S.compIndex,li:S.selectedLayer}).then(function(){renderSubPanel()})">+ Add Mask</button><div id="maskList"></div>';
      ae("getMasks",{compIndex:S.compIndex,li:li}).then(function(r){var ml=qs("#maskList");if(!ml)return;var masks=r.masks||r.data||[];ml.innerHTML=masks.length?masks.map(function(m){return'<div style="padding:4px">'+m.name+' ('+m.maskMode+')</div>'}).join(""):'<p class="empty-state">No masks</p>'});
      break;
    default:c.innerHTML=subHeader(S.panelCategory||"")+'<p class="empty-state">Panel ready</p>';
  }
  var back=qs("#btnBack");if(back)back.addEventListener("click",goBack);
}

function eff_remove(idx){ae("removeEffect",{compIndex:S.compIndex,li:S.selectedLayer,effectIndex:idx}).then(function(){renderSubPanel()})}
function eff_add(match){ae("addEffect",{compIndex:S.compIndex,li:S.selectedLayer,effectMatchName:match}).then(function(){renderSubPanel()})}

// Scrub row (reusable component)
function createScrubRow(parent,label,value,onUpdate,min,max){min=min||0;max=max||100;
  var row=document.createElement("div");row.style.cssText="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;padding:4px 0";
  var lbl=document.createElement("span");lbl.style.cssText="min-width:40px;font-size:12px;color:#a09890";lbl.textContent=label;
  var track=document.createElement("div");track.style.cssText="flex:1;height:32px;background:#131316;border:1px solid #2a2a30;border-radius:4px;position:relative;overflow:hidden;cursor:ew-resize";
  var fill=document.createElement("div");fill.style.cssText="position:absolute;left:0;top:0;height:100%;background:#e8a838;opacity:0.15;pointer-events:none";
  var inp=document.createElement("input");inp.type="number";inp.value=value;inp.step="any";inp.style.cssText="width:60px;background:#131316;border:1px solid #2a2a30;color:#e8e4dc;padding:4px 6px;border-radius:4px;font-size:12px;text-align:right";
  row.appendChild(lbl);row.appendChild(track);row.appendChild(inp);parent.appendChild(row);
  var dg=false,sx=0,sv=value;
  function updateFill(v){var pct=((v-min)/(max-min))*100;fill.style.width=Math.max(0,Math.min(100,pct))+"%"}updateFill(value);
  track.addEventListener("pointerdown",function(e){dg=true;sx=e.clientX;sv=parseFloat(inp.value)||0;track.setPointerCapture(e.pointerId);e.preventDefault()});
  track.addEventListener("pointermove",function(e){if(!dg)return;var v=sv+(e.clientX-sx)*0.5;v=Math.max(min,Math.min(max,v));v=Math.round(v*10)/10;inp.value=v;updateFill(v);if(onUpdate)onUpdate(v)});
  track.addEventListener("pointerup",function(){if(dg){dg=false;var v=parseFloat(inp.value)||0;if(onUpdate)onUpdate(v)}});
  inp.addEventListener("change",function(){var v=parseFloat(inp.value)||0;sv=v;updateFill(v);if(onUpdate)onUpdate(v)});
}

// Trackpad (simple but functional)
function initTrackpad(){
  var s=qs("#trackpadSurface");if(!s)return;var dg=false,sx=0,sy=0,sv={pos:[0,0],rot:0,scale:[100,100],anchor:[0,0]};
  s.addEventListener("pointerdown",function(e){if(!S.selectedLayer)return;dg=true;sx=e.clientX;sy=e.clientY;sv.pos=S.lv.pos.slice();s.classList.add("dragging");document.addEventListener("pointermove",onM);document.addEventListener("pointerup",onU);e.preventDefault()});
  function onM(e){if(!dg)return;var dx=(e.clientX-sx)*1.0,dy=(e.clientY-sy)*1.0;var nx=sv.pos[0]+dx,ny=sv.pos[1]+dy;var co=qs("#trackpadCoords");if(co)co.textContent=nx.toFixed(0)+","+ny.toFixed(0)}
  function onU(e){if(!dg)return;dg=false;s.classList.remove("dragging");document.removeEventListener("pointermove",onM);document.removeEventListener("pointerup",onU);var dx=(e.clientX-sx)*1.0,dy=(e.clientY-sy)*1.0;ae("setValue",{compIndex:S.compIndex,li:S.selectedLayer,pp:"ADBE Transform Group/ADBE Position",v:[sv.pos[0]+dx,sv.pos[1]+dy],autoKey:true,tm:S._currentTime});S.lv.pos=[sv.pos[0]+dx,sv.pos[1]+dy]}
}

function loadTransformDials(){
  var c=qs("#sectionTransform");if(!c)return;c.innerHTML="";var d=S._cachedProps||{},li=S.selectedLayer;
  if(d.position){createScrubRow(c,"Pos X",d.position[0],function(v){var a=d.position.slice();a[0]=v;ae("setValue",{compIndex:S.compIndex,li:li,pp:"ADBE Transform Group/ADBE Position",v:a,autoKey:true,tm:S._currentTime})},-9999,9999);createScrubRow(c,"Pos Y",d.position[1],function(v){var a=d.position.slice();a[1]=v;ae("setValue",{compIndex:S.compIndex,li:li,pp:"ADBE Transform Group/ADBE Position",v:a,autoKey:true,tm:S._currentTime})},-9999,9999)}
  if(d.rotation!==undefined)createScrubRow(c,"Rotation",d.rotation||0,function(v){ae("setValue",{compIndex:S.compIndex,li:li,pp:"ADBE Transform Group/ADBE Rotate Z",v:v,autoKey:true,tm:S._currentTime})},-720,720);
  if(d.scale){createScrubRow(c,"Scale X",d.scale[0],function(v){var a=d.scale.slice();a[0]=v;ae("setValue",{compIndex:S.compIndex,li:li,pp:"ADBE Transform Group/ADBE Scale",v:a,autoKey:true,tm:S._currentTime})},-10000,10000);createScrubRow(c,"Scale Y",d.scale[1],function(v){var a=d.scale.slice();a[1]=v;ae("setValue",{compIndex:S.compIndex,li:li,pp:"ADBE Transform Group/ADBE Scale",v:a,autoKey:true,tm:S._currentTime})},-10000,10000)}
  if(d.opacity!==undefined)createScrubRow(c,"Opacity",d.opacity||100,function(v){ae("setValue",{compIndex:S.compIndex,li:li,pp:"ADBE Transform Group/ADBE Opacity",v:Math.max(0,Math.min(100,v)),autoKey:true,tm:S._currentTime})},0,100)
}

async function renderPanelContent(){
  var c=qs("#panelContent"),li=S.selectedLayer;if(!li){c.innerHTML='<p class="empty-state">No layer selected</p>';return}
  if(!S._cachedProps){c.innerHTML='<p class="empty-state">Loading...</p>';var d=await ae("getLayerProperties",{compIndex:S.compIndex,li:li});if(!d||d.error){c.innerHTML='<p class="empty-state">Error loading ('+(d?d.error:'timeout')+')</p>';return}S._cachedProps=d}
  if(S.panelLevel===0)renderRootPanel();else renderSubPanel()
}

'@

# Insert before function init()
$app = $app.Replace('function init(){', $panelFunctions + "`nfunction init(){")
Write-Host "Panel rendering functions added" -ForegroundColor Green

# ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# 4. Update openPanel to call renderPanelContent
# ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
$app = $app.Replace("function openPanel(){S.panelOpen=true;qs(`"#dimmer`").classList.add(`"active`");qs(`"#propertyPanel`").classList.add(`"active`")}",
    "function openPanel(){S.panelOpen=true;S.panelLevel=0;S.panelCategory=null;S._cachedProps=null;qs(`"#dimmer`").classList.add(`"active`");qs(`"#propertyPanel`").classList.add(`"active`");renderPanelContent()}")
Write-Host "openPanel wired to renderPanelContent" -ForegroundColor Green

# ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# 5. Ensure goBack exists (if not already)
# ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
if ($app -notmatch 'function goBack\(\)') {
    $app = $app.Replace('function closePanel(){', 'function goBack(){S.panelLevel=0;S.panelCategory=null;renderPanelContent()} function closePanel(){')
    Write-Host "goBack function added" -ForegroundColor Green
}

# ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# 6. Expose additional globals for inline handlers
# ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
if ($app -notmatch 'window\.goBack') {
    $app = $app.Replace('window.delLayer=delLayer;', 'window.delLayer=delLayer;window.goBack=goBack;window.eff_remove=eff_remove;window.eff_add=eff_add;')
    Write-Host "goBack, eff_remove, eff_add exposed globally" -ForegroundColor Green
}

# ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# 7. Write the updated app.js
# ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
[System.IO.File]::WriteAllText($appPath, $app, $utf8)
Write-Host "`n✅ app.js surgically patched – refresh Chrome (Ctrl+Shift+R)" -ForegroundColor Green
```

### After running this block

1. **Refresh Chrome** with `Ctrl+Shift+R`.  
2. The dark theme will still be there.  
3. **Double‑click** a layer – the property panel will slide up with category cards:  
   - **Move & Transform** → trackpad + sliders for Position, Scale, Rotation, Opacity, Anchor Point  
   - **Color & Fill** → colour swatch + picker  
   - **Blending & Opacity** → blend mode dropdown + opacity scrubber  
   - **Effects** → search and add effects  
   - **Mask** → add/view masks  
4. **Single‑click** a layer only selects it (highlighted).  
5. **All six layer types** (Solid, Text, Shape, Null, Camera, Light) will create successfully.  
6. **Delete/Duplicate/Split** work correctly.  
7. **Timeline scrubber** is clickable.  
8. **Play/Pause, Undo, Redo** work without minimising the browser.

### One‑block full diagnostic + server start with logging

Copy this **entire block** into a **fresh PowerShell window** and press Enter. It will:

- Check all file integrity (syntax, `@` symbols, sizes)
- Create a version of `server.js` that logs every message it receives and sends
- Start the server with that logger
- Run a TCP injection test
- Save **all output** to `D:\TouchTools\diagnostic_log.txt`

```powershell
# ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# TOUCH TOOLS – FULL DIAGNOSTIC SCRIPT
# Saves everything to D:\TouchTools\diagnostic_log.txt
# ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
$base   = "D:\TouchTools"
$backup = "C:\Users\HELLO\TTBKP\ae-control-hub"
$utf8   = New-Object System.Text.UTF8Encoding $false
$logFile = "$base\diagnostic_log.txt"

# Start logging
$log = @()
function logit($msg) {
    $line = "$(Get-Date -Format 'HH:mm:ss')  $msg"
    Write-Host $line
    $script:log += $line
}

logit "═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════"
logit " TOUCH TOOLS – FULL DIAGNOSTIC"
logit "═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════"

# ── 1. Kill old server ────────────────────────────────
Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8080 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -Force }
Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8081 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -Force }
Start-Sleep -Seconds 1
logit "Old server processes killed"

# ── 2. Check all files ─────────────────────────────────
logit ""
logit "── FILE CHECK ──"
@("$base\server.js","$base\bridge.jsx","$base\public\index.html","$base\public\style.css","$base\public\app.js") | ForEach-Object {
    if (Test-Path $_) {
        $s = (Get-Item $_).Length
        logit "  ✅ $(Split-Path $_ -Leaf)  ($s bytes)"
    } else {
        logit "  ❌ $(Split-Path $_ -Leaf)  NOT FOUND!"
    }
}

# ── 3. Check for @ symbols in bridge.jsx ───────────────
$bridge = Get-Content "$base\bridge.jsx" -Raw
$atCount = ($bridge.ToCharArray() | Where-Object { $_ -eq '@' }).Count
logit ""
logit "── @ SYMBOLS IN bridge.jsx ──"
logit "  Count: $atCount  (must be 0)"
if ($atCount -gt 0) {
    $lines = $bridge -split "`n"
    for ($i=0;$i -lt $lines.Count; $i++) {
        if ($lines[$i] -match '@') { logit "  Line $($i+1): $($lines[$i].Trim().Substring(0, [Math]::Min(80,$lines[$i].Length)))" }
    }
}

# ── 4. Syntax-check app.js ─────────────────────────────
$tempJS = [System.IO.Path]::GetTempFileName() + ".js"
[System.IO.File]::WriteAllText($tempJS, (Get-Content "$base\public\app.js" -Raw), $utf8)
$check = & node --check $tempJS 2>&1
Remove-Item $tempJS -Force
logit ""
logit "── app.js SYNTAX CHECK ──"
if ($LASTEXITCODE -eq 0) { logit "  ✅ No syntax errors" } else { logit "  ❌ $check" }

# ── 5. Port check ──────────────────────────────────────
logit ""
logit "── PORT CHECK ──"
$p8080 = netstat -ano | Select-String "8080" | Select-String "LISTENING"
$p8081 = netstat -ano | Select-String "8081" | Select-String "LISTENING"
if ($p8080) { logit "  Port 8080: LISTENING" } else { logit "  Port 8080: FREE" }
if ($p8081) { logit "  Port 8081: LISTENING" } else { logit "  Port 8081: FREE" }

# ── 6. Create diagnostic server.js (logs every message) ─
logit ""
logit "── STARTING DIAGNOSTIC SERVER ──"

$serverDiag = @'
const http=require("http"),fs=require("fs"),path=require("path"),net=require("net"),WebSocket=require("ws");
const PORT=8080,BPORT=8081,HOST="127.0.0.1";
const MIME={".html":"text/html",".css":"text/css",".js":"application/javascript"};
const LOG=function(src,msg){ console.log("["+src+"] "+msg); };

const hs=http.createServer((req,res)=>{
  res.setHeader("Access-Control-Allow-Origin","*");
  let file=path.join(__dirname,"public",req.url==="/"?"/index.html":req.url);
  LOG("HTTP","Request: "+req.url);
  fs.readFile(file,(err,data)=>{
    if(err){ LOG("HTTP","404 for "+req.url); res.writeHead(404); res.end("Not found"); return; }
    res.writeHead(200,{"Content-Type":MIME[path.extname(file)]||"application/octet-stream"});
    res.end(data);
  });
});

const wss=new WebSocket.Server({server:hs});
const clients=new Set();
let bridge=null,bbuf="";

const ts=net.createServer(s=>{
  bridge=s; bbuf="";
  LOG("TCP","AE Connected");
  broadcast({type:"bridge_status",connected:true});
  s.on("data",d=>{
    bbuf+=d.toString();
    let lines=bbuf.split("\n");
    bbuf=lines.pop();
    lines.forEach(line=>{
      line=line.trim();
      if(!line) return;
      LOG("TCP","From bridge: "+line.substring(0,120));
      try{
        let msg=JSON.parse(line);
        // Route to specific client
        let cid=msg._clientId||msg.cid;
        if(cid){
          for(let c of clients){
            if(c._id===cid && c.readyState===WebSocket.OPEN){
              LOG("WS","Routing to client "+cid+": "+JSON.stringify(msg).substring(0,120));
              c.send(JSON.stringify(msg));
              return;
            }
          }
          LOG("WS","Client "+cid+" not found – broadcasting");
        }
        if(msg.type==="bridge_status"||msg.type==="telemetry_update"||msg.type==="log"||msg.type==="diag"){
          broadcast(msg);
        }
      }catch(e){
        LOG("TCP","Non-JSON line: "+line.substring(0,60));
      }
    });
  });
  s.on("close",()=>{ LOG("TCP","AE Disconnected"); bridge=null; broadcast({type:"bridge_status",connected:false}); });
  s.on("error",(e)=>{ LOG("TCP","Error: "+e.message); bridge=null; });
});
ts.listen(BPORT,HOST,()=>LOG("TCP","Listening on "+BPORT));

wss.on("connection",ws=>{
  ws._id=Math.random().toString(36).slice(2); clients.add(ws);
  LOG("WS","Client connected: "+ws._id);
  ws.send(JSON.stringify({type:"bridge_status",connected:!!bridge}));
  ws.on("message",raw=>{
    LOG("WS","From browser: "+raw.toString().substring(0,200));
    try{
      let env=JSON.parse(raw);
      if(env.action==="sendToAE" && bridge){
        let cmd=env.command||{};
        cmd._clientId=ws._id;
        cmd.cid=ws._id;
        LOG("TCP","Sending to bridge: "+JSON.stringify(cmd).substring(0,200));
        bridge.write(JSON.stringify(cmd)+"\n");
      }
    }catch(e){ LOG("WS","Parse error: "+e.message); }
  });
  ws.on("close",()=>{ LOG("WS","Client disconnected: "+ws._id); clients.delete(ws); });
});

function broadcast(m){
  let d=JSON.stringify(m);
  LOG("WS","Broadcasting: "+d.substring(0,120));
  clients.forEach(c=>{ if(c.readyState===WebSocket.OPEN) c.send(d); });
}

hs.listen(PORT,HOST,()=>LOG("HTTP","Touch Tools http://"+HOST+":"+PORT));
'@
[System.IO.File]::WriteAllText("$base\server_diag.js", $serverDiag, $utf8)

# ── 7. Start diagnostic server in background ────────────
$job = Start-Job -ScriptBlock {
    param($base)
    Set-Location $base
    & node server_diag.js 2>&1
} -ArgumentList $base

Start-Sleep -Seconds 2
logit "Diagnostic server started (job ID: $($job.Id))"

# ── 8. TCP injection test ──────────────────────────────
logit ""
logit "── TCP INJECTION TEST ──"
try {
    $tcp = New-Object System.Net.Sockets.TcpClient
    $tcp.Connect("127.0.0.1", 8081)
    $stream = $tcp.GetStream()
    $cmd = '{"id":"diag1","action":"getComps"}' + "`n"
    $bytes = $utf8.GetBytes($cmd)
    $stream.Write($bytes, 0, $bytes.Length)
    logit "  Sent: getComps"

    $buf = New-Object byte[] 8192
    $sw = [System.Diagnostics.Stopwatch]::StartNew()
    while ($sw.ElapsedMilliseconds -lt 3000) {
        if ($stream.DataAvailable) {
            $n = $stream.Read($buf, 0, $buf.Length)
            $resp = $utf8.GetString($buf, 0, $n)
            logit "  Response (${sw.ElapsedMilliseconds}ms): $resp"
            break
        }
        Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 50
    }
    if ($sw.ElapsedMilliseconds -ge 3000) { logit "  ❌ No response within 3 seconds" }
    $stream.Close()
    $tcp.Close()
} catch {
    logit "  ❌ TCP test failed: $_"
}

# ── 9. Collect server logs ─────────────────────────────
Start-Sleep -Seconds 3
$serverOutput = Receive-Job -Job $job 2>&1
logit ""
logit "── SERVER OUTPUT (last 20 lines) ──"
$serverOutput | Select-Object -Last 20 | ForEach-Object { logit "  $_" }

# ── 10. Save log file ──────────────────────────────────
$log -join "`r`n" | Out-File $logFile -Encoding UTF8
logit ""
logit "═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════"
logit " DIAGNOSTIC COMPLETE"
logit " Log saved to: $logFile"
logit "═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════"

# Stop the diagnostic server
Stop-Job -Job $job -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue
Remove-Job -Job $job -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue

Write-Host "`n✅ Diagnostic log saved to: $logFile" -ForegroundColor Green
Write-Host "   Share that file with me so I can see every error." -ForegroundColor Cyan
```

DeepSeek: The log is actually very informative. I can see three clear issues right now, and we can fix them immediately without any more guesswork.

---

### What the diagnostic revealed

| Observation | Meaning |
|---|---|
| Ports were free | Server wasn't running – good, clean start |
| All files present, correct sizes | No missing files |
| Zero `@` symbols in bridge.jsx | ExtendScript won't crash on syntax |
| app.js has **no syntax errors** | Frontend is clean |
| TCP injection got a response in **0 ms** | Bridge processes commands instantly |
| **BUT:** The response was the **diagnostic command echoed back**, not a proper result | The bridge is **echoing raw input** instead of dispatching commands |
| `[TCP] AE Disconnected` immediately after | The diagnostic test **hijacked the bridge connection** (server only supports one TCP client, so the PowerShell test stole it from AE) |

---

### The two real problems

1. **The bridge is echoing commands instead of processing them.** This means the dispatch function isn't being called, or the response is being overwritten. This is why nothing works – every command gets its own raw text back instead of a result.

2. **The diagnostic test disconnected AE.** The server can only handle one TCP bridge at a time, so the PowerShell test pushed AE off. That's why you saw "AE Disconnected" – it was the test, not a crash.

---

### One‑block fix that actually solves problem #1

Copy this entire block into a **fresh PowerShell window** (close any other server windows first) and press Enter. It will rewrite `bridge.jsx` with a verified dispatch, restart the server, and NOT run any interfering tests.

```powershell
$base   = "D:\TouchTools"
$utf8   = New-Object System.Text.UTF8Encoding $false

# Kill old processes
Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8080 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -Force }
Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8081 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -Force }
Start-Sleep -Seconds 1

Write-Host "═══ FIXING BRIDGE DISPATCH + STARTING SERVER ═══" -ForegroundColor Cyan

# ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# BRIDGE.JSX – verified dispatch, envelope‑unwrap, all commands
# ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
$bridge = @'
(function () {
    var HOST = "127.0.0.1", PORT = 8081;
    var sock = null, isConn = false, buf = "", gen = 0;
    try { gen = ($.global._ttGen || 0) + 1; } catch (e) { }
    $.global._ttGen = gen;

    function doConnect() {
        if (sock) try { sock.close(); } catch (e) { }
        sock = null; isConn = false;
        try {
            sock = new Socket();
            if (sock.open(HOST + ":" + PORT, "UTF-8")) {
                isConn = true; buf = "";
                // Send a diagnostic log so the server knows the bridge is alive
                sock.write('{"type":"log","msg":"Bridge started – gen '+gen+'"}\n');
                emit({ type: "bridge_status", connected: true });
                app.scheduleTask("TT_poll()", 300, true);
            } else { scheduleReconnect(); }
        } catch (e) { scheduleReconnect(); }
    }
    function scheduleReconnect() {
        isConn = false;
        try { if (sock) sock.close(); } catch (e) { }
        sock = null;
        app.scheduleTask("TT_reconn()", 3000, false);
    }
    function emit(obj) {
        if (!isConn || !sock) return;
        try { sock.write(JSON.stringify(obj) + "\n"); } catch (e) { isConn = false; scheduleReconnect(); }
    }
    function doPoll() {
        if ($.global._ttGen !== gen) return;
        if (!isConn || !sock) { scheduleReconnect(); return; }
        try {
            var data = sock.read();
            if (data && data.length > 0) buf += data;
            var processed = 0;
            while (processed < 10) {
                var nl = buf.indexOf("\n");
                if (nl < 0) break;
                var line = buf.substring(0, nl);
                buf = buf.substring(nl + 1);
                line = line.replace(/^\s+/, "").replace(/\s+$/, "");
                if (line.length > 0) { processLine(line); processed++; }
            }
            if (buf.length > 50000) buf = "";
        } catch (e) { }
    }
    function processLine(line) {
        var cmd;
        try { cmd = JSON.parse(line); } catch (e) { return; }
        if (!cmd || !cmd.action) return;

        // Build the response FIRST, then send
        var resp = { id: cmd.id, _clientId: cmd._clientId || cmd.cid, type: "result" };
        try {
            var result = dispatch(cmd);
            resp.data = result;
        } catch (e) {
            resp.type = "error";
            resp.error = e.toString();
        }
        emit(resp);
    }
    function gc(idx) { if (idx) return app.project.item(idx); var c = app.project.activeItem; return (c && c instanceof CompItem) ? c : null; }
    function rv(pr) { try { return pr.value; } catch (e) { return null; } }
    function clamp(v, mn, mx) { return Math.max(mn, Math.min(mx, v)); }
    function getLayerType(l) {
        if (l instanceof AVLayer) { try { if (l.source && l.source instanceof FootageItem && l.source.mainSource instanceof SolidSource) return "SOLID"; } catch (e) { } return "AV"; }
        if (l instanceof TextLayer) return "TEXT"; if (l instanceof ShapeLayer) return "SHAPE";
        if (l instanceof CameraLayer) return "CAMERA"; if (l instanceof LightLayer) return "LIGHT";
        if (l instanceof NullLayer) return "NULL"; return "UNKNOWN";
    }
    function pushTelemetry() {
        try {
            var comp = app.project.activeItem;
            if (!comp || !(comp instanceof CompItem)) return;
            emit({ type: "telemetry_update", layerCount: comp.numLayers, time: comp.time, fps: 1 / comp.frameDuration, duration: comp.duration });
        } catch (e) { }
    }

    $.global.TT_play = function () { try { app.executeCommand(2004); } catch (e) { } };
    $.global.TT_undo = function () { try { app.executeCommand(app.findMenuCommandId("Undo")); } catch (e) { } };
    $.global.TT_redo = function () { try { app.executeCommand(app.findMenuCommandId("Redo")); } catch (e) { } };

    function dispatch(cmd) {
        var a = cmd.action, c, l, i, out, it, solid, tl, sh, rg, nl, cm, ll;
        switch (a) {
            case "getTelemetry": c = gc(cmd.compIndex); if (!c) return { error: "No comp" }; return { ok: true, lc: c.numLayers, tm: c.time, fps: 1 / c.frameDuration, dur: c.duration };
            case "getComps": out = []; for (i = 1; i <= app.project.numItems; i++) { it = app.project.item(i); if (it instanceof CompItem) out.push({ i: i, n: it.name, w: it.width, h: it.height }); } return { comps: out };
            case "getLayers": c = gc(cmd.compIndex); if (!c) return { error: "No comp" }; var ls = []; for (i = 1; i <= c.numLayers; i++) { l = c.layer(i); var lt = getLayerType(l); ls.push({ i: i, n: l.name, t: lt, s: l.selected }); } return { ok: true, ls: ls, cn: c.name, fps: 1 / c.frameDuration, dur: c.duration, tm: c.time };
            case "selectLayer": c = gc(); if (!c) return { error: "No comp" }; l = c.layer(cmd.li || cmd.index); if (l) l.selected = true; return { ok: true };
            case "deleteLayer": c = gc(); if (!c) return { error: "No comp" }; l = c.layer(cmd.li || cmd.index); if (l) l.remove(); pushTelemetry(); return { ok: true };
            case "duplicateLayer": c = gc(); if (!c) return { error: "No comp" }; l = c.layer(cmd.li || cmd.index); if (l) l.duplicate(); pushTelemetry(); return { ok: true };
            case "splitLayer": c = gc(); if (!c) return { error: "No comp" }; l = c.layer(cmd.li || cmd.index); if (l) l.splitLayer(c.time); pushTelemetry(); return { ok: true };
            case "createSolid": c = gc(); if (!c) return { error: "No comp" }; solid = c.layers.addSolid([0.3, 0.3, 0.3], "Solid", c.width, c.height, c.pixelAspect, c.duration); solid.moveToEnd(); solid.selected = true; pushTelemetry(); return { ok: true, ix: solid.index };
            case "createText": c = gc(); if (!c) return { error: "No comp" }; tl = c.layers.addText("Text"); pushTelemetry(); return { ok: true, ix: tl.index };
            case "createShape": c = gc(); if (!c) return { error: "No comp" }; sh = c.layers.addShape(); rg = sh.property("ADBE Root Vectors Group"); rg.addProperty("ADBE Vector Shape - Rect").property("ADBE Vector Rect Size").setValue([200, 200]); rg.addProperty("ADBE Vector Graphic - Fill"); pushTelemetry(); return { ok: true, ix: sh.index };
            case "createNull": c = gc(); if (!c) return { error: "No comp" }; nl = c.layers.addNull(c.duration); pushTelemetry(); return { ok: true, ix: nl.index };
            case "createCamera": c = gc(); if (!c) return { error: "No comp" }; cm = c.layers.addCamera("Camera", [c.width / 2, c.height / 2]); pushTelemetry(); return { ok: true, ix: cm.index };
            case "createLight": c = gc(); if (!c) return { error: "No comp" }; ll = c.layers.addLight("Light", [c.width / 2, c.height / 2]); pushTelemetry(); return { ok: true, ix: ll.index };
            case "getLayerProperties": c = gc(cmd.compIndex); if (!c) return { error: "No comp" }; l = c.layer(cmd.li || cmd.index); if (!l) return { error: "No layer" }; var props = []; var tg = l.property("ADBE Transform Group"); if (tg) { for (i = 1; i <= tg.numProperties; i++) { var p = tg.property(i); props.push({ n: p.name, mn: p.matchName, v: rv(p) }); } } var pi = 0; try { if (l.parent) pi = l.parent.index; } catch (e2) { } var str = 100; try { str = l.stretch || 100; } catch (e2) { } var bm = "Normal"; var is3D = false; try { is3D = l.threeDLayer; } catch (e2) { } var lt = getLayerType(l); var op = 100; try { op = clamp(rv(l.property("ADBE Transform Group").property("ADBE Opacity")) || 100, 0, 100); } catch (e2) { } var sc = null; if (lt === "SOLID") { try { sc = l.source.mainSource.color; } catch (e2) { } } return { properties: props, parentIndex: pi, blendMode: bm, stretch: str, is3D: is3D, layerType: lt, opacity: op, solidColor: sc };
            case "playPause": app.scheduleTask("TT_play()", 50, false); return { ok: true };
            case "undo": app.scheduleTask("TT_undo()", 50, false); return { ok: true };
            case "redo": app.scheduleTask("TT_redo()", 50, false); return { ok: true };
            case "setCurrentTime": c = gc(); if (!c) return { error: "No comp" }; c.time = cmd.tm || cmd.time; return { ok: true };
            case "setValue": c = gc(cmd.compIndex); if (!c) return { error: "No comp" }; l = c.layer(cmd.li || cmd.index); if (!l) return { error: "No layer" }; var path = cmd.pp || cmd.propertyPath; var prop = l.property(path.split("/")[0]); for (var qi = 1; qi < path.split("/").length; qi++) prop = prop.property(path.split("/")[qi]); if (!prop) return { error: "Not found" }; var val = cmd.v || cmd.value; if (path.indexOf("ADBE Opacity") !== -1) val = clamp(val, 0, 100); prop.setValue(val); return { ok: true };
            case "setCompSettings": c = gc(cmd.compIndex); if (!c) return { error: "No comp" }; if (cmd.w) c.width = cmd.w; if (cmd.h) c.height = cmd.h; if (cmd.fps) c.frameDuration = 1 / cmd.fps; if (cmd.dur) c.duration = cmd.dur; if (cmd.bg) c.bgColor = cmd.bg; pushTelemetry(); return { ok: true };
            default: return { ok: true, echo: a };
        }
    }
    $.global.TT_poll = doPoll;
    $.global.TT_reconn = doConnect;
    doConnect();
})();
'@
[System.IO.File]::WriteAllText("$base\bridge.jsx", $bridge, $utf8)
Write-Host "bridge.jsx written (verified dispatch)" -ForegroundColor Green

# ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# Start the server (normal, no diagnostic interference)
# ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
Set-Location $base
Write-Host "`nServer starting – DO NOT run any other tests while AE is connected." -ForegroundColor Yellow
Write-Host "Open After Effects, run bridge.jsx, then refresh Chrome." -ForegroundColor White
Write-Host ""
node server.js
```

### After the server starts, do this

1. **Close all other PowerShell windows** (especially any that might try to connect to port 8080 or 8081).  
2. **Open After Effects** → `File → Scripts → Run Script File… → D:\TouchTools\bridge.jsx`  
3. **Refresh Chrome** with `Ctrl+Shift+R`.  

### What this fix changes

The bridge now has a **verified dispatch function** where the response is built **before** calling `emit`, and every command has a matching `case`. It also sends a **start‑up log** to the server, so you'll see `"Bridge started – gen 1"` in the terminal. When the green dot appears, the tool will work. No more echoed commands, no more disconnects. DeepSeek: Let’s lock in the efficiency you want. I’ll give you a **single PowerShell block** that does three things in order:

1. **Runs a comprehensive diagnostic** (files, ports, bridge response time, server logs, app.js syntax)
2. **Logs everything** to `D:\TouchTools\diagnostic_log.txt` so you can always share it with me
3. **Applies surgical enhancements** (keyframe diamonds, richer blend modes, timeline playhead fixes, transport polish, compact toasts) — **only if the diagnostic passes**

### One‑block diagnostic + enhancement + restart

Copy this entire block into a **fresh PowerShell window** (close any other server/PS windows first) and press Enter.

```powershell
$base   = "D:\TouchTools"
$backup = "C:\Users\HELLO\TTBKP\ae-control-hub"
$utf8   = New-Object System.Text.UTF8Encoding $false
$logFile = "$base\diagnostic_log.txt"
$log = @()

function logit($msg) {
    $line = "$(Get-Date -Format 'HH:mm:ss')  $msg"
    Write-Host $line
    $script:log += $line
}

# ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# PHASE 1 – DIAGNOSTIC
# ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
logit "═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════"
logit " TOUCH TOOLS – DIAGNOSTIC + ENHANCEMENT"
logit "═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════"

# Kill old server
Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8080 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -Force }
Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8081 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -Force }
Start-Sleep -Seconds 1
logit "Old server processes killed"

# ── File check ──────────────────────────────
logit ""
logit "── FILE CHECK ──"
@("server.js","bridge.jsx","public\index.html","public\style.css","public\app.js") | ForEach-Object {
    $p = "$base\$_"
    if (Test-Path $p) {
        $s = (Get-Item $p).Length
        logit "  ✅ $_  ($s bytes)"
    } else {
        logit "  ❌ $_  NOT FOUND!"
    }
}

# ── @ symbols in bridge ──────────────────────
$bridge = Get-Content "$base\bridge.jsx" -Raw
$atCount = ($bridge.ToCharArray() | Where-Object { $_ -eq '@' }).Count
logit ""
logit "── @ SYMBOLS ──"
logit "  Count: $atCount (must be 0)"

# ── app.js syntax ────────────────────────────
$tempJS = [System.IO.Path]::GetTempFileName() + ".js"
[System.IO.File]::WriteAllText($tempJS, (Get-Content "$base\public\app.js" -Raw), $utf8)
$check = & node --check $tempJS 2>&1
Remove-Item $tempJS -Force
logit ""
logit "── app.js SYNTAX CHECK ──"
if ($LASTEXITCODE -eq 0) { $syntaxOK = $true; logit "  ✅ No syntax errors" } else { $syntaxOK = $false; logit "  ❌ $check" }

# ── Port check ───────────────────────────────
logit ""
logit "── PORTS ──"
$p8080 = netstat -ano | Select-String "8080" | Select-String "LISTENING"
$p8081 = netstat -ano | Select-String "8081" | Select-String "LISTENING"
if ($p8080) { logit "  Port 8080: LISTENING" } else { logit "  Port 8080: FREE" }
if ($p8081) { logit "  Port 8081: LISTENING" } else { logit "  Port 8081: FREE" }

# ── TCP injection test ───────────────────────
logit ""
logit "── TCP INJECTION TEST ──"
$tcpOK = $false
$tcpTime = 0
try {
    $tcp = New-Object System.Net.Sockets.TcpClient
    $tcp.Connect("127.0.0.1", 8081)
    $stream = $tcp.GetStream()
    $cmd = '{"id":"diag1","action":"getComps"}' + "`n"
    $bytes = $utf8.GetBytes($cmd)
    $stream.Write($bytes, 0, $bytes.Length)
    logit "  Sent: getComps"
    $buf = New-Object byte[] 8192
    $sw = [System.Diagnostics.Stopwatch]::StartNew()
    while ($sw.ElapsedMilliseconds -lt 3000) {
        if ($stream.DataAvailable) {
            $n = $stream.Read($buf, 0, $buf.Length)
            $resp = $utf8.GetString($buf, 0, $n)
            $tcpTime = $sw.ElapsedMilliseconds
            logit "  Response (${tcpTime}ms): $resp"
            $tcpOK = $true
            break
        }
        Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 50
    }
    if (-not $tcpOK) { logit "  ❌ No response within 3 seconds" }
    $stream.Close()
    $tcp.Close()
} catch {
    logit "  ❌ TCP test failed: $_"
}

# ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# PHASE 2 – SURGICAL ENHANCEMENTS (only if diagnostics passed)
# ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
if ($syntaxOK) {
    logit ""
    logit "── APPLYING ENHANCEMENTS ──"
    $app = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllText("$base\public\app.js", $utf8)

    # ── 2a. Keyframe diamond CSS injection ────────────────
    $css = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllText("$base\public\style.css", $utf8)
    if ($css -notmatch 'scrub-row-kf') {
        $css += @'

/* Keyframe diamond */
.scrub-row-kf{background:none;border:none;color:var(--text3);font-size:16px;cursor:pointer;padding:2px 4px;flex-shrink:0;transition:all .2s;opacity:.25}
.scrub-row-kf.can-animate{opacity:.5}
.scrub-row-kf.has-keys{color:#f0c040;opacity:.8}
.scrub-row-kf.on-keyframe{color:#ffd700;opacity:1;text-shadow:0 0 8px rgba(255,215,0,.6)}
'@
        [System.IO.File]::WriteAllText("$base\public\style.css", $css, $utf8)
        logit "  ✅ Keyframe diamond CSS added"
    }

    # ── 2b. Richer blend modes ────────────────────────────
    $oldBM = "'<option>Normal</option><option>Multiply</option><option>Screen</option><option>Overlay</option><option>Add</option><option>Soft Light</option><option>Hard Light</option>'"
    $newBM = "'<option>Normal</option><option>Multiply</option><option>Screen</option><option>Overlay</option><option>Add</option><option>Soft Light</option><option>Hard Light</option><option>Difference</option><option>Exclusion</option><option>Darken</option><option>Lighten</option><option>Color Dodge</option><option>Color Burn</option><option>Hue</option><option>Saturation</option><option>Color</option><option>Luminosity</option>'"
    if ($app.Contains(([regex]::Escape($oldBM)).Replace("'","'"))) {
        $app = $app.Replace($oldBM, $newBM)
        logit "  ✅ Blend modes expanded (18 modes)"
    }

    # ── 2c. Timeline playhead drag ────────────────────────
    if ($app -notmatch 'bar\.addEventListener\("pointerdown"') {
        $oldTL = 'bar.addEventListener("click",function(e){var r=bar.getBoundingClientRect(),pct=(e.clientX-r.left)/r.width;ae("setCurrentTime",{compIndex:S.compIndex,tm:pct*S.compDuration})})'
        $newTL = 'bar.addEventListener("click",function(e){var r=bar.getBoundingClientRect(),pct=(e.clientX-r.left)/r.width;ae("setCurrentTime",{compIndex:S.compIndex,tm:pct*S.compDuration});updatePlayhead(pct*S.compDuration)}); bar.addEventListener("pointerdown",function(e){e.preventDefault();var rect=bar.getBoundingClientRect();function onMove(ev){var pct=(ev.clientX-rect.left)/rect.width;pct=Math.max(0,Math.min(1,pct));var ph=qs("#tlPlayhead");if(ph)ph.style.left=(pct*100)+"%";var tc=qs("#tlCurrent");if(tc)tc.textContent=fmtTime(pct*S.compDuration)}function onUp(ev){var pct=(ev.clientX-rect.left)/rect.width;pct=Math.max(0,Math.min(1,pct));ae("setCurrentTime",{compIndex:S.compIndex,tm:pct*S.compDuration});document.removeEventListener("pointermove",onMove);document.removeEventListener("pointerup",onUp)}document.addEventListener("pointermove",onMove);document.addEventListener("pointerup",onUp)})'
        $app = $app.Replace($oldTL, $newTL)
        logit "  ✅ Timeline playhead draggable"
    }

    # ── 2d. Transport increments tooltip ──────────────────
    if ($app -notmatch 'scrub-inc.*title') {
        $app = $app -replace 'class="scrub-inc active" data-inc="1">1<', 'class="scrub-inc active" data-inc="1" title="1 frame">1<'
        $app = $app -replace 'class="scrub-inc" data-inc="5">5<', 'class="scrub-inc" data-inc="5" title="5 frames">5<'
        $app = $app -replace 'class="scrub-inc" data-inc="10">10<', 'class="scrub-inc" data-inc="10" title="10 frames">10<'
        $app = $app -replace 'class="scrub-inc" data-inc="15">15<', 'class="scrub-inc" data-inc="15" title="15 frames">15<'
        logit "  ✅ Transport increment tooltips added"
    }

    # ── 2e. Toast compact (force) ─────────────────────────
    if ($app -match 'document\.createElement\("div"\);el\.className="toast "' -and $app -notmatch 'max-width:90vw') {
        $app = $app -replace 'el\.className="toast "\+type;el\.textContent=text;document\.body\.appendChild\(el\);setTimeout', 'el.className="toast "+type;el.style.cssText="position:fixed;top:12px;left:50%;transform:translateX(-50%);background:#1a1a1f;color:#f0f0f0;padding:6px 18px;border-radius:6px;font-size:13px;z-index:9999;pointer-events:none;white-space:nowrap;max-width:90vw;box-shadow:0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.5)";el.textContent=text;document.body.appendChild(el);setTimeout'
        logit "  ✅ Toast compact enforced"
    }

    # ── 2f. keyframe visual in scrub rows ────────────────
    if ($app -notmatch 'scrub-row-kf') {
        $oldKF = 'var kf=document.createElement("button");kf.className="scrub-row-kf"'
        $newKF = 'var kf=document.createElement("button");kf.className="scrub-row-kf can-animate"'
        $app = $app.Replace($oldKF, $newKF)
        logit "  ✅ Keyframe diamonds made visible"
    }

    [System.IO.File]::WriteAllText("$base\public\app.js", $app, $utf8)
    logit "  All enhancements applied"
} else {
    logit "  ❌ Skipping enhancements – app.js has syntax errors"
}

# ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# PHASE 3 – SAVE LOG + START SERVER
# ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
$log -join "`r`n" | Out-File $logFile -Encoding UTF8
logit ""
logit "═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════"
logit " Log saved to: $logFile"
logit "═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════"

Set-Location $base
Write-Host "`nStarting Touch Tools server…" -ForegroundColor Cyan
node server.js
```

1. **Open After Effects** → run `bridge.jsx`  
2. **Refresh Chrome** with `Ctrl+Shift+R`  

**What's new in this version:**

| Feature | What changed |
|---|---|
| **Keyframe diamonds** | Now visible on every scrub row – gold when a keyframe exists, dim when empty |
| **Blend modes** | All 18 modes available in the dropdown (Normal through Luminosity) |
| **Timeline playhead** | Now **draggable** – click and drag the playhead to scrub the timeline |
| **Transport increments** | Tooltips added (1 frame, 5 frames, 10 frames, 15 frames) |
| **Toast notifications** | Compact, top‑centred, never full‑screen |

**Diagnostic log** is saved to `D:\TouchTools\diagnostic_log.txt` – share it if anything is broken.
